Today, I echo my father’s latest endorsement – Bernie Moreno is the candidate to WIN in the Ohio Senate race.

**Bernie is a true conservative fighter whom we can trust to WIN this seat and stand for our values and shared beliefs in Washington. He is an America First patriot and has my full endorsement.**

[ ** Add your support for Bernie Moreno **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=57ac8100e067430c9b1eff26e62e7d6f&_e=G5EbHfJSMKnhbfpMOHqqZi3dkYbZJZtAdqyz78pC555fJv2j_RO6pGHZhHFYyvrFhlzXwSjfh1m-e13gg6WD5Kk9RBtmTUzZNASEHqk0Ftj1YE5vJSzwJBVWWJpBGWneNIG2YeCRSQ83rgziSxjWis7eK6buflGPsRqDhsEouF6aQvWr16wa8rZzKOIVB-DD-ODnoBgSf1nT5PBIBkXbOIpj59j9cvITj0-_IZipIl1T1ba_j9jGMm4TbFxyvs6v3-t264aaVl7_HFMs_jDOkQLMSyIgsVKIAIeXNWKrbMvYWH3EA4Uwc4Yacpf0Q1shuGYp1A2OFMgOLYIb69Nm-jGYVQQJLh563KlyS-08fiMAo_AlSlMEY2Lm1CKHCFdsvk_XPZEgM8UtUcW4R6F6IQ%3D%3D)
Let me tell you a bit about Bernie.

Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia, and came with his family legally to the U.S. at age five, becoming a U.S. citizen by age 18.

Despite resistance from industry insiders, he became a successful businessman by investing every cent of his own money into his first car dealership and growing into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

After a successful career, Bernie sold his businesses to focus on his passion: **protecting the American Dream for the next generation.**

That’s why Bernie is running for the United States Senate.

subject: VIDEO: Dave Min Releases First Ad In CA-47 Race
body:
“United” Highlights Support From The Democratic Party & Incumbent Rep. Katie Porter | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c2e14bb805dc/video-dave-min-releases-first-ad-in-ca-47-race-15667868?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** January 2nd, 2024
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com) **VIDEO: Dave Min Releases First Ad In CA-47 Race**
_“United” Highlights Support From The Democratic Party & Incumbent Rep. Katie Porter _
**IRVINE, CA** — Today, State Senator Dave Min, the Democratic Party’s nominee for California’s 47th Congressional District, released his first television ad of the 2024 cycle, titled “United.” The ad highlights Dave’s Korean immigrant parents and his lifetime of service to preserve and protect the American Dream. In the State Senate, Dave passed legislation to ban gun shows on all state property, [authored](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=53c52568d2&e=7017cc100e) Proposition 1 which declared abortion as a constitutional right in California, and is the only candidate [rated](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=06cff8da4d&e=7017cc100e) 100% by Planned Parenthood. Dave is backed by a broad and united Democratic coalition, scoring an early endorsement from incumbent Representative Katie Porter, securing the overwhelming support of local activists and the California Democratic Party, and earning endorsements from over 60 local elected officials, labor unions, law enforcement organizations, and national groups. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=32c0d8419f&e=7017cc100e).
**To Watch The Ad Titled “United”**[**Click Here**](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=74f5c89be6&e=7017cc100e)
[](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=629ea42109&e=7017cc100e)
_“California Democrats are united behind one candidate: Dave Min.
Unwavering. Tenacious. The son of Korean immigrants, State Senator Dave Min has taken on the gun lobby, corporate polluters, and MAGA extremists who’ve tried to hijack our schools. Dave authored legislation to protect abortion, and is rated 100% by Planned Parenthood.
The only candidate endorsed by Katie Porter and the Democratic Party.
Tested. Trusted. Dave Min.”_

The advertisement is part of a six figure buy that will run on cable and digital platforms.

###

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _
---
| | **Our mailing address is:**
PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT at TPUSA
subject: Can I Send You This Anti-Woke T-Shirt?
body:
a student attendee asked me to address those on-campus who "actively feel victimized"
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Ry7jCYIOz9EvET0tksaxrg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnd1XaP0RgaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHVzYS1ibGV4aXQvYTc0N2FkMDMtNGIzMy00NzQ2LThmNDEtMjJiNDlkMWExOTFhP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPVJPTjQ1Mjg4VwNzcGNCCmWDraeUZdP3c5VSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
Fellow Patriot, At my first Live Free Tour event with Turning Point USA this fall, a student attendee asked me to address those on-campus who "actively feel victimized" ... _just by my physical presence_. My answer was simple, and I bet it's one you'd tell your own kids and grandkids:
---
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Ry7jCYIOz9EvET0tksaxrg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnd1XaP0RgaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHVzYS1ibGV4aXQvYTc0N2FkMDMtNGIzMy00NzQ2LThmNDEtMjJiNDlkMWExOTFhP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPVJPTjQ1Mjg4VwNzcGNCCmWDraeUZdP3c5VSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
"Life is tough. Get a helmet, man."
---
| | The room erupted with applause from BLEXIT activists and TPUSA students ... and then, when the video was posted online, it went viral – reaching millions of people in just a few hours. **[Today I want to send YOU a "Life is tough. Get a helmet, man" T-shirt of your own. All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of any amount to help BLEXIT at TPUSA cover costs.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Ry7jCYIOz9EvET0tksaxrg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnd1XaP0RgaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHVzYS1ibGV4aXQvYTc0N2FkMDMtNGIzMy00NzQ2LThmNDEtMjJiNDlkMWExOTFhP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPVJPTjQ1Mjg4VwNzcGNCCmWDraeUZdP3c5VSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** But please don't wait: to receive a FREE T-shirt of your own with my thanks, you must make a gift before MIDNIGHT on November 30.
---
[Get your free T-shirt now](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Ry7jCYIOz9EvET0tksaxrg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnd1XaP0RgaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHVzYS1ibGV4aXQvYTc0N2FkMDMtNGIzMy00NzQ2LThmNDEtMjJiNDlkMWExOTFhP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPVJPTjQ1Mjg4VwNzcGNCCmWDraeUZdP3c5VSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
| | At BLEXIT -- the non-profit I founded with Brandon Tatum -- we are committed to DESTROYING the Victimhood Mentality that has taken over America and building up a Victor's Mentality instead. The Left's toxic Victimhood Mentality has created a society of emotional toddlers – people who complain, erupt into tantrums, protest without knowing why or what they’re protesting, and lack education, reason, purpose, conviction, or courage. _And the result is a generation of young people who expect everyone to coddle, compliment, or otherwise indulge them in whatever Victimhood Mentality they've wrongly learned._ It takes courage to speak the truth, and that's just what BLEXIT does in order to awaken, empower, and inspire young Americans to adopt a Victor's Mindset and pursue their own American Dreams. **[Can I send you a FREE "Life is tough. Get a helmet, man." T-shirt to thank you for your support of BLEXIT today?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Ry7jCYIOz9EvET0tksaxrg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnd1XaP0RgaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHVzYS1ibGV4aXQvYTc0N2FkMDMtNGIzMy00NzQ2LThmNDEtMjJiNDlkMWExOTFhP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPVJPTjQ1Mjg4VwNzcGNCCmWDraeUZdP3c5VSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of any amount, even just a dollar, to help BLEXIT cover the costs ... but I must hear from you before MIDNIGHT on November 30!
---
[Get your free T-shirt now](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Ry7jCYIOz9EvET0tksaxrg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnd1XaP0RgaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHVzYS1ibGV4aXQvYTc0N2FkMDMtNGIzMy00NzQ2LThmNDEtMjJiNDlkMWExOTFhP3NvdXJjZV9jb2RlPVJPTjQ1Mjg4VwNzcGNCCmWDraeUZdP3c5VSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
I truly believe that, thanks to our continued work through BLEXIT, Americans are beginning to wake up – and they're tired of the Victimhood Mentality that has nearly destroyed our communities and our culture. Thank you for your continued support. Together, we are making a difference. Candace OwensChair of BLEXIT Turning Point USA
---

But please don't wait: to receive a FREE T-shirt of your own with my thanks, you must make a gift before MIDNIGHT on November 30. | | At BLEXIT -- the non-profit I founded with Brandon Tatum -- we are committed to DESTROYING the Victimhood Mentality that has taken over America and building up a Victor's Mentality instead. The Left's toxic Victimhood Mentality has created a society of emotional toddlers – people who complain, erupt into tantrums, protest without knowing why or what they’re protesting, and lack education, reason, purpose, conviction, or courage. And the result is a generation of young people who expect everyone to coddle, compliment, or otherwise indulge them in whatever Victimhood Mentality they've wrongly learned. It takes courage to speak the truth, and that's just what BLEXIT does in order to awaken, empower, and inspire young Americans to adopt a Victor's Mindset and pursue their own American Dreams. All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of any amount, even just a dollar, to help BLEXIT cover the costs ... but I must hear from you before MIDNIGHT on November 30! I truly believe that, thanks to our continued work through BLEXIT, Americans are beginning to wake up – and they're tired of the Victimhood Mentality that has nearly destroyed our communities and our culture. Thank you for your continued support. Together, we are making a difference. Candace OwensChair of BLEXIT Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

Friend, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running to flip Florida's Senate seat blue, and this is one of our best — and only — chances to expand our Senate majority in 2024.

Rick Scott is one of the worst Republicans in Washington. _His radical policies are even too extreme for Mitch McConnell!_ If he had things his way, he’d end Social Security and Medicare, raise taxes on working families, and ban abortions.
**But here’s the good news:** As Scott has grown more radical and unpopular, his favorability ratings and chances of winning reelection have PLUMMETED. He won his seat last time with only 0.12% of the vote — and now, experts at _CNN, Roll Call_, and ___FiveThirtyEight_ are calling Florida one of Democrats’ best pickup opportunities in 2024.
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running against him to defend our democracy, strengthen our economy, stop gun violence, and protect reproductive rights. In an election year as critical as 2024, we must take advantage of this incredible opportunity to flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.
**With Rick Scott sitting on a massive war chest, the only way Debbie can fight back and win is with a surge of grassroots resources from people like YOU.**

name: James Carville
subject: I need your opinion ASAP!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m gonna level with you: **This might be the most important email I’ve sent your way in a while.**

See, in my decades working in politics, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.**

That's why I'm holding strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- but time’s running out before the interview closes, and **I don't see your response![So please click here to get started right now and take the survey:](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240102-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240102-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13086%2E9716520%2E2IiG0J)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240102-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240102-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13086%2E9716520%2E2IiG0J)
---

I’ll be honest: If we lose the Senate, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all President Biden's progress to a halt -- and that’ll just be the beginning!**

Republicans are out there taking away a woman’s right to choose, restricting the right to vote, flat-out denying climate change... **And unless Democrats get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans are gonna control the Senate pretty soon.**

That's where you come in. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political insiders -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you join my interview by completing a quick survey?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewJanuary/](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240102-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240102-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13086%2E9716520%2E2IiG0J)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240102-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240102-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13086%2E9716520%2E2IiG0J)
---

Thank you.

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240102-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240102-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13086%2E9716520%2E2IiG0J)

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=396d596649854e7ebcd3d36edab351a8&_e=ukV9WnqdNUGxb7wClgkyFQhzAMdqvX55qDAHXWR9Fe7665AruNsmi1PS3RidVj6DjqVdw8Uyx0rgahcp4VzVe-_OYG4-HxJ6h78RlfMPBOP-mFHQa-geXyZZUYSfafssSx2N3zzo9tI8CEkLqR_QKzwm2zfnNXmtDQx3XmY25sasKIo0O7mRMFvEewNGHH3ptoR1A3ch8K9zEhW2x2M5k_1n6_SIYxZiBUYtlaPPKqDHDXmhZmihLT7moZY22upJsF2vqpERN2nF6FhVdW_YNWA5l_SNRANvGOm18Ecw8Ofx2xuEMnqWY_aPkwLeH1FTY6gS9Ssf76C5gG8W9mv6UqcGvMVzg1oWSmVLFVKVkK6RZMv3LZHriarPOwFjWbCsHf_W3yhn5su_f-8LSmNLS2BeY4pbtZiLV_h3xcv15JBSgD9kaZCciYEt2nb2dzhv)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Let’s win together.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| With less than 70 days to prepare for our Primary Election on Super Tuesday, I'm confident we can build up our ground game, but I need your support to make it happen.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4951%2E5257348%2Eosw5jB)
Derek –
As we step into the election year and with the Primary Election just around the corner, I wanted to share a brief reflection on our nation and the upcoming U.S. Senate race.
After two impeachments, an insurrection, and four indictments (and counting) for the ex-president and leading Republican candidate Donald Trump, my takeaway is this:
**You can have the best-written Constitution in the world, and have the best-written laws meant to constrain the worst impulses of human nature — but it won’t be enough if people don’t give meaning to their oath of office.**
And if that oath isn’t informed by ideas of right and wrong, and if people are unwilling to accept the truth, or even that there is something called fact, none of it will be enough.
In one of our two parties, there is an ethos that would make a public servant like Anthony Fauci into a villain and a villain like George Santos into a public servant.
But here’s the good news. As Democrats, we have an opportunity to reshape the trajectory of our country this year by doing what we do so well.
Organize. Fight. And **Win**.
We can win this Senate race. We can take back the House of Representatives. And we can re-elect Joe Biden and create an economy that works for all of us.
We have just over two months to build up our ground game for March 5. I know we can get it done — but I'll need your help to do it.
**[Will you stand with me in the fight for our democracy, Derek? Contribute $10 now to help us establish the most extensive grassroots campaign in California's history.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2024_abs_em.sN9m5T&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20240102_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4951%2E5257348%2Eosw5jB)**

name: Our Revolution
subject: Join Barbara Lee for a LIVE Peace for All Town Hall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13113?source=email-20240102&t=1011&akid=5134%2E5885482%2ENCDw5_ ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13113?source=email-20240102&t=1012&akid=5134%2E5885482%2ENCDw5_ ]RSVP HERE!

Peter Willis, you’re
invited!

On Thursday, Our Revolution will kick off the new year with our LIVE Peace
for All Town Hall with Rep. Barbara Lee and other progressive champions
fighting for peace, including Noa Kattler Kupetz of If Not Now, and peace
activists from around the country!

Progressives are leading the call for a Ceasefire in Gaza, but now the
AIPAC lobby is set on spending $100 million to try to defeat our biggest
peace champions in 2024. We must stand together in the push for peace.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13113?source=email-20240102&t=1013&akid=5134%2E5885482%2ENCDw5_ ]RSVP now and we'll send you a Zoom link to organize for Peace directly
with Barbara Lee and other special guests!

Barbara Lee is the Peace Candidate in the U.S. Senate race in California
and has long been calling for a Ceasefire in Gaza. She stood alone against
the military industrial complex to vote no to George W. Bush’s blank check
for the disastrous war in Afghanistan, and we need her strong antiwar
voice in the Senate.

The virtual event will kick off at 5:30 pm Pacific / 8:30 pm Eastern — and
we hope you’ll join us in this movement for peace.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13113?source=email-20240102&t=1014&akid=5134%2E5885482%2ENCDw5_ ]Click here to make sure you get a reminder to tune in to the exciting
live event on Thursday — and share it with your friends!

When we organize, we win.

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] [ ][IMG] [ ]RSVP HERE! Peter Willis, you’re invited! On Thursday, Our Revolution will kick off the new year with our LIVE Peace for All Town Hall with Rep. Barbara Lee and other progressive champions fighting for peace, including Noa Kattler Kupetz of If Not Now, and peace activists from around the country! Progressives are leading the call for a Ceasefire in Gaza, but now the AIPAC lobby is set on spending $100 million to try to defeat our biggest peace champions in 2024. We must stand together in the push for peace. [ ]RSVP now and we'll send you a Zoom link to organize for Peace directly with Barbara Lee and other special guests! Barbara Lee is the Peace Candidate in the U.S. Senate race in California and has long been calling for a Ceasefire in Gaza. She stood alone against the military industrial complex to vote no to George W. Bush’s blank check for the disastrous war in Afghanistan, and we need her strong antiwar voice in the Senate. The virtual event will kick off at 5:30 pm Pacific / 8:30 pm Eastern — and we hope you’ll join us in this movement for peace. [ ]Click here to make sure you get a reminder to tune in to the exciting live event on Thursday — and share it with your friends! When we organize, we win. * * *
The Colorado Supreme Court just disqualified Donald Trump from being on the 2024 ballot, citing Section 3 of the 14th Amendment.
**Section 3 of the 14th Amendment** _“No person shall ... hold any office, civil or military, under the United States ... who, having previously taken an oath ... as an officer of the United States ... to support the Constitution of the United States,**shall have engaged in insurrection or rebellion** against the same, or given aid or comfort to the enemies thereof.”_
---
In the Court’s eyes, Donald Trump’s actions on Jan. 6 violated the 14th Amendment, after he incited a mob to march on the Capitol in a plot to overturn the election.
This decision has sparked a nationwide debate and other states are now exploring the option to ban Trump from the ballot
**[In light of the Colorado Supreme Court’s ruling, we’re launching an urgent opinion poll and want to know what you think:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76367766/447341665/972736240?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2ExMjY4My1kNWE5LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_XGGK5Tg63gUVwRhKUzGo7gmqQ070cIR-WNKuvnx-gw=&emci=11d99c93-b5a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=57a12683-d5a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=26828920)**

👉 **In 2022,** we led Democrats to the most successful state legislative midterm year for the president’s party in nearly a century – flipping four chambers, expanding our Democratic power, and securing four new trifectas in states nationwide. 👉 **In 2023,** our winning streak continued – we won over 30 special elections, expanded our majorities in the New Jersey House and Senate, and FLIPPED Virginia’s General Assembly. 👉 **In 2024,** we’re zooming in on our nine target states – battlegrounds where we’re committed to protecting and expanding our existing majorities, making power plays for vulnerable GOP-held chambers, and building Democratic power seat-by-seat. name: Mazi Pilip
subject: I was born under the Ethiopian sun
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi for Congress
body:
I fought my way to the Promised Land and now I'm working to protect it.

| |
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d049f0754d5e41b5814f439bb34dfdc3&_e=kcGDIVeIKLqZG0LmgljBdkf-cAIUr4LugL6W7EiE3d11wOwf4U1MC_54DMslKenqhTe7toIWrV_qBTP8GB87u-QqBdMDFuNMu7WL3XqiFNGqwqUuuZsYfZLOmWuOscV6wnbOHvfedyKXkieP2ruy-mVKxWIwmVA-cEz_CDC91liULRSol0hi53zMYBeNh4dFqZQucT8cfqwX8wuac1HfXeC1kIUMmbrhk4eNM4wHKIJRu45o8w-u6OXXE5zBjUknLL3d0GB4qTfg2Xh6mkhobxKJTagQop4ewadUYGYmJHZIRqKtmKeTIaK7n3SrlqhdxV6W65h8hf1gjH0qLbsLDSjvEcH8BUPc1mz8r4jQYpdJMeVXyqNw1NzG9ojaAto8Oq6cuIqdaAoWRS4Q-_lj-8Vl_8KxGEeE0iRWKsbrNwv-rsjSVU7J7NPntOqEujMg)

**I was born under the Ethiopian sun.

I was molded in the crucible of the Israel Defense Force.

I fought my way to the Promised Land.

And now I'm working to protect it.

Friend, my name is Mazi Melesa Pilip & I'm the GOP nominee for the biggest race in America - the NY-03 Special Election.

If you don't know me already, let me tell you a little about myself:

I'm an Ethiopian-born Jew who fled to Israel at the age of 12 to escape antisemitism.

At 18, I enlisted in the Israel Defense Force & joined the elite Paratrooper Brigade to defend freedom & Democracy from radical Islamic terrorists.

Following my service in the IDF, I legally immigrated to the US to pursue the American Dream.**

**_Now, I 'm running for Congress to protect this great country from the Radical Left._**

**But I have to be blunt with you - this Special Election was announced just days ago and we only have a few short weeks until voting begins. _So what happens now will decide everything._

If we're going to win this all-important race and prevent the Democrats from destroying our slim House Majority, we have to start this campaign strong.

_[That 's why I've set an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 by the end of the day. Hitting this goal is our only chance of winning this race so I'm humbly asking for your help.](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d049f0754d5e41b5814f439bb34dfdc3&_e=kcGDIVeIKLqZG0LmgljBdkf-cAIUr4LugL6W7EiE3d11wOwf4U1MC_54DMslKenqhTe7toIWrV_qBTP8GB87u-QqBdMDFuNMu7WL3XqiFNGqwqUuuZsYfZLOmWuOscV6wnbOHvfedyKXkieP2ruy-mVKxWIwmVA-cEz_CDC91liULRSol0hi53zMYBeNh4dFqZQucT8cfqwX8wuac1HfXeC1kIUMmbrhk4eNM4wHKIJRu45o8w-u6OXXE5zBjUknLL3d0GB4qTfg2Xh6mkhob0UgdurGG_yZew2Fwc-taYpoMgLJTDDOJSBm8z3p2euB7MT84ZyZKTduLW8WcL7jZSS1HxGdo5HMroagf_TQf_igK_mDuW5b9v4KGvcaa1-8DTIdFW6VM6wWTNl4B2E-ElBnX3k8yBu6bzR0QoJwC6wTstVc75cHRh1n8eZvnNkD "That’s why I’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 by the end of the day. Hitting this goal is our only chance of winning this race so I’m humbly asking for your help.")_

This race will be won and lost at the grassroots level - and a $5 gift right now could be the difference between winning and losing.**

clean_body: I fought my way to the Promised Land and now I'm working to protect it. | | | | | | | | | | | I was born under the Ethiopian sun. I was molded in the crucible of the Israel Defense Force. I fought my way to the Promised Land. And now I'm working to protect it. Friend, my name is Mazi Melesa Pilip & I'm the GOP nominee for the biggest race in America - the NY-03 Special Election. If you don't know me already, let me tell you a little about myself: I'm an Ethiopian-born Jew who fled to Israel at the age of 12 to escape antisemitism. At 18, I enlisted in the Israel Defense Force & joined the elite Paratrooper Brigade to defend freedom & Democracy from radical Islamic terrorists. Following my service in the IDF, I legally immigrated to the US to pursue the American Dream. Now, I 'm running for Congress to protect this great country from the Radical Left. But I have to be blunt with you - this Special Election was announced just days ago and we only have a few short weeks until voting begins. So what happens now will decide everything. If we're going to win this all-important race and prevent the Democrats from destroying our slim House Majority, we have to start this campaign strong. "That’s why I’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 by the end of the day. Hitting this goal is our only chance of winning this race so I’m humbly asking for your help." This race will be won and lost at the grassroots level - and a $5 gift right now could be the difference between winning and losing. | | ---|--- | ---|--- So if this email fails, it 's all over. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
On behalf of Alexandria and our entire team, **we wanted to take a moment and personally thank you for your donation.**
**Together, we’ve made real change.** We created the American Climate Corps, secured funding for high speed rail, forgave $132 billion in student loans, and gave out 700 Thanksgiving turkeys to families in our district.
**We’ve still got a lot of work ahead of us.** This year, Alexandria is up for reelection, and we’ll face unprecedented attacks from dark money groups like AIPAC who oppose her decision to stand up for Palestinian rights. We’re also going to be taking part in the larger fight to stop Donald Trump, and we’ll never stop pushing President Biden to enact progressive policies _now_.
There’s a lot to do, but we’re heartened by all we’ve already accomplished, together. Thank you for standing with us.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240102?refcode=em20240102-5576-P_FND_TYE_MIS&t=1&refcode2=5576_2526796_vgptUW&akid=5576%2E2526796%2EvgptUW)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240102-5576-P_FND_TYE_MIS&t=2&akid=5576%2E2526796%2EvgptUW)**

subject: Can we slay the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message
body:
Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | [](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6595033e6dcf170118692fc2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D659501fd6dcf170118690bee%26ss_email_id%3D6595033e6dcf170118692fc2%26ss_campaign_name%3DCan%2Bwe%2Bslay%2Bthe%2BRanked%2BChoice%2BVoting%2BDragon%253F%2B%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-01-03T06%253A48%253A42Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_659501fd6dcf170118690bee&l=en-US&s=IxjLuUN2Kxe6OYjTu6CCGd_ECqA%3D)
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
### **The Tale of the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon**
---
In a land of breathtaking mountains and icy wonders, a story unfolds – a tale of determination and unity among the people of Alaska. This is the story of how over 700 Alaskan volunteers, driven by a shared purpose, embarked on a quest to challenge the mighty Ranked Choice Voting Dragon. It began as a murmur among the people, a shared sentiment that grew into a roaring call for change. The Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, a formidable creature reigning over the electoral landscape, needed to be confronted. To do this, a band of brave volunteers united, each one as determined as the other, each one a proud Alaskan. Their mission was daunting: to gather 40,000 signatures from across the vast and rugged terrain of Alaska, a number far exceeding the required 26,000. This was no small feat in a land where distances are great and the elements unforgiving. But the spirit of Alaskans is strong and resilient, born of the land they call home. From the fishing villages to the snow-capped peaks, from the bustling streets of Anchorage to the remote corners of the wilderness, these volunteers ventured. They worked tirelessly, their voices echoing the sentiment of thousands, their efforts a testament to their dedication to their cause and to their state. In every signature collected, there was a story – a story of an Alaskan who believed in the power of unity and the importance of their voice. Each signature was a pledge, a commitment to the vision of a different future, a future shaped by the will of the people. As they reached and surpassed their goal, the volunteers knew that their journey was about more than signatures. It was a journey of empowerment, a demonstration of what can be achieved when Alaskans come together for a common purpose. Their effort, By Alaskans, For Alaskans, was a beacon of hope and a symbol of the indomitable Alaskan spirit. And so, the story of these volunteers, their quest against the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, became a legend, a reminder of the power of unity and the strength of the Alaskan heart. It was a story that would be told for generations, inspiring others to stand together, for their state, for their beliefs, and for each other.Thank You All for Your Support,~Phil Izon
---
---

### **Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.**
### **The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**
#### _**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**_
#### _**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**_
#### _**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_

| [](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6595033e6dcf170118692fc2&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2023%2F12%2F07%2Felection-commission-rejects-ranked-choice-groups-attempt-to-halt-signature-gathering-campaign-to-repeal-rcv%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_659501fd6dcf170118690bee&l=en-US&s=Eh-hkacma-rV7nAye0NElJdF3DQ%3D)
---
**The Pro-RCV Group Hired a “SPY” & “LIED” “STOLE” & Lost Anyway!!!****Imagine a scene straight out of a spy novel: The Pro-Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) group, in a twist of espionage, allegedly hired a 'spy' to infiltrate and disrupt the grassroots movement against RCV, and Stole 2 of our Petition Books, which we filed a Police Report on. But the plot thickens. In a bold move, the Pro-RCV group and their attorney attempted to persuade the State of Alaska to shut down our constitutional right to petition the government. Fortunately, the State stood firm and declined their request.****This isn’t fiction. It’s the reality of our ongoing battle to uphold our Republic in Alaska. We emerged victorious in this clash, but the war is far from over.****Our determination is stronger than ever, reflected in the over 34,000 signatures we've gathered so far, a number that continues to grow each day.****Our focus now turns to Anchorage Districts 14 through 18, where our efforts need to intensify. Below, you'll find an up-to-date chart detailing our progress and the work that lies ahead. Your support and participation are crucial. Join us in this fight to preserve our right to petition and shape the future of voting in Alaska.**
---
---
|
---
### [**Read The Article On The Watchman**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6595033e6dcf170118692fc2&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2023%2F10%2F13%2Fpro-ranked-choice-voting-group-hit-with-elections-complaint-from-leader-of-repeal-effort%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_659501fd6dcf170118690bee&l=en-US&s=Gb4NjphyyM_QvqTZ8BI3XrVM3dk%3D)
---
#### **PSA:**
#### **We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms.**
#### **Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information.**

Each signature was a pledge, a commitment to the vision of a different future, a future shaped by the will of the people. As they reached and surpassed their goal, the volunteers knew that their journey was about more than signatures. It was a journey of empowerment, a demonstration of what can be achieved when Alaskans come together for a common purpose. Their effort, By Alaskans, For Alaskans, was a beacon of hope and a symbol of the indomitable Alaskan spirit. And so, the story of these volunteers, their quest against the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, became a legend, a reminder of the power of unity and the strength of the Alaskan heart. It was a story that would be told for generations, inspiring others to stand together, for their state, for their beliefs, and for each other.Thank You All for Your Support,~Phil Izon 550+ Petition Books Returned Mail your petition book after getting it notarized to: Phil Izon - 4201 Dimond Way Wasilla, AK 99654 - Call if you need helptel:+19078028116 Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter. The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets. Their new Incorporation is their top donor. Then "Article Four from Virginia" Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C." | | | | | | The Pro-RCV Group Hired a “SPY” & “LIED” “STOLE” & Lost Anyway!!!Imagine a scene straight out of a spy novel: The Pro-Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) group, in a twist of espionage, allegedly hired a 'spy' to infiltrate and disrupt the grassroots movement against RCV, and Stole 2 of our Petition Books, which we filed a Police Report on. But the plot thickens. In a bold move, the Pro-RCV group and their attorney attempted to persuade the State of Alaska to shut down our constitutional right to petition the government. Fortunately, the State stood firm and declined their request.This isn’t fiction. It’s the reality of our ongoing battle to uphold our Republic in Alaska. We emerged victorious in this clash, but the war is far from over.Our determination is stronger than ever, reflected in the over 34,000 signatures we've gathered so far, a number that continues to grow each day.Our focus now turns to Anchorage Districts 14 through 18, where our efforts need to intensify. Below, you'll find an up-to-date chart detailing our progress and the work that lies ahead. Your support and participation are crucial. Join us in this fight to preserve our right to petition and shape the future of voting in Alaska. | PSA: We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms. Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information. | | Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers! tel:+19078028116 mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter | | This Communication Was Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message. The Top 3 Contributors Are Phillip Izon, Wasilla, AK, Ranked Choice Education Association, Anchorage, AK, ; And Carolyn Overstreet, Anchorage, AK | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Alaskans For Honest Elections 2521 E. Mtn Village Dr Ste B #904 Wasilla, AK USA

body:
| Peter,

Happy New Year! I want to say thank you for your support during my Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline at the end of the year.

Now that we have rung in the new year, we are officially entering the 2024 elections. Between Republican disinformation and voter suppression, we are up against a lot this year to take back the House and keep Democrats like me fighting for you.

**But with grassroots supporters like you on my team, I know we will do what it takes to win.**

Thank you for being on this team with me.

Be well,
Ami

As some of you know, I have relatives in Gaza. They are my dad's first cousins. Tragically, several of them were killed in October when an Israeli airstrike destroyed part of the complex at Saint Porphyrius Orthodox Church where they had been sheltering.
The past few months have been extremely difficult for our cousins in Gaza and heartbreaking for our family in the United States. There's no avenue to get them out, and our communication with them has been sporadic since November. Occasionally, I'll receive a passed-along message about their well-being, which at least lets me know they're still alive.
A lot of people were surprised to learn there are Christians living in Gaza, but this community has existed since the earliest days of Christianity. Followers of Christ have long called Gaza home.
The people known today as Palestinian Christians are the descendants of Canaanites, Phoenicians, and Israelites who resided in the region that comprises present-day Israel, Gaza, and the West Bank. Palestinian Christians can trace much of their ancestry back to Jews and Samaritans who lived in the Levant thousands of years ago and became early Christians.
The Christians of Gaza are descendants of both the ancient Gazan Christian community and other nearby ancient Christian communities. The Amash family, many of whom now reside in Gaza, descend from Christians who lived for centuries in and around the cities of Lydda (Lod) and Ramle (Ramla) before Israeli forces expelled them from their homes in 1948. Some, like my dad's immediate family, were blessed to find refuge in the United States. Others made their way to the West Bank and Gaza--and they, their children, and their grandchildren remain there to this day.

name: Your America
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38653%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9o4MnMi1G071oH2MfucsvQ&sysid=1) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That’s why I’m asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38654%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=43CWUV6i6EsX1n2liQgY%2bw&sysid=1)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today’s ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America’s great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America’s leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we’ve seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38654%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=43CWUV6i6EsX1n2liQgY%2bw&sysid=1)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Your America News
---

subject: Can I Send You This Anti-Woke T-Shirt?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---

---
Fellow Patriot, At my first Live Free Tour event with Turning Point USA this fall, a student attendee asked me to address those on-campus who "actively feel victimized" ... _just by my physical presence_. My answer was simple, and I bet it's one you'd tell your own kids and grandkids:
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjQ1MzExIn0/V-bN5QARbOEvMRHyY8PFLQ)
---
"Life is tough. Get a helmet, man."
---
| | The room erupted with applause from BLEXIT activists and TPUSA students ... and then, when the video was posted online, it went viral – reaching millions of people in just a few hours. **[Today I want to send YOU a "Life is tough. Get a helmet, man" T-shirt of your own. All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of any amount to help BLEXIT at TPUSA cover costs.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjQ1MzExIn0/j_P0WdZf_ED77tJsigocfg)** But please don't wait: to receive a FREE T-shirt of your own with my thanks, you must make a gift before MIDNIGHT on November 30.
---
[Get your free T-shirt now](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjQ1MzExIn0/3yr3WkotKNi2d_Hkv_tSmg)
---
| | At BLEXIT -- the non-profit I founded with Brandon Tatum -- we are committed to DESTROYING the Victimhood Mentality that has taken over America and building up a Victor's Mentality instead. The Left's toxic Victimhood Mentality has created a society of emotional toddlers – people who complain, erupt into tantrums, protest without knowing why or what they’re protesting, and lack education, reason, purpose, conviction, or courage. _And the result is a generation of young people who expect everyone to coddle, compliment, or otherwise indulge them in whatever Victimhood Mentality they've wrongly learned._ It takes courage to speak the truth, and that's just what BLEXIT does in order to awaken, empower, and inspire young Americans to adopt a Victor's Mindset and pursue their own American Dreams. **[Can I send you a FREE "Life is tough. Get a helmet, man." T-shirt to thank you for your support of BLEXIT today?](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjQ1MzExIn0/SPuuEZBi4fBOCFYE1HZvMA)** All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of any amount, even just a dollar, to help BLEXIT cover the costs ... but I must hear from you before MIDNIGHT on November 30!
---
[Get your free T-shirt now](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkFMUjQ1MzExIn0/Xq7gsC22S_7pAEPLEDH-0Q)

I truly believe that, thanks to our continued work through BLEXIT, Americans are beginning to wake up – and they're tired of the Victimhood Mentality that has nearly destroyed our communities and our culture. Thank you for your continued support. Together, we are making a difference. Candace OwensChair of BLEXIT Turning Point USA

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbo7ec5ok1i2iaki9s5g21i36q97qpom2hogv760_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gecoj6cph2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zps0nsfevlg8rj33l9pfrnujs990vruvlqqihh8o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c9gecoj6cph2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Trump Train News

| Dear Friend, I am honored to receive two more endorsements; Rev. William Cook, and the Black Robe Regiment for my 5th Congressional District campaign. The Black Robe Regiment is a resource and networking entity where church leaders and laypeople can network and educate themselves as to our biblical responsibility to stand up for our Lord and Savior and to protect the freedoms and liberties granted to a moral people in the divinely inspired US Constitution. The Regiment had its historical beginnings during the Revolutionary War when Pastors from across the colonies arose and lead their congregations into the battle for freedom. Learn more about The Black Robe Regiment here: [http://www.blackrobereg.org](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UOUOSxKDilHiSv1lLtAEIoF83KAzBS3Euy6noxgqKYTz71PLGErc47eLKMh0xxb5jIouNrABNRQg3SKYEHwiu3TM3PnD17T3CPeuIISm1GsF68sgcy5x-AHe1YpFH8thSnVsELQj8c8wKAEz75K0JA==&c=EsEyCXzEbfOE8AVfxqritr9cdBXSoxu_XK0W4tdtGjZOxFNtiyggNQ==&ch=qVl-H27tsmmX_HKMlaaeoNVow4TdB8wG_0ZfqCWFilYSqnrX1wKa1A==).

John will never waver from true conservative values, and I ask you to join me in my support and vote for him at the 5th Congressional District Primary. John is who we need to represent our conservative values."

name: Congressman Paul Broun
subject: Sign the petition to ban transgender child mutilation
body:
Ban Child Mutilation Nationwide

Dear Concerned American,

Should so-called doctors be
allowed to sexually mutilate or chemically sterilize children -
even children as young as 8 years for girls and 10 years for
boys?

Should publicly-funded schools be
permitted to promote this radical trans-sexual abuse, often
behind the backs of parents?

I hope you say ABSOLUTELY NOT!

Yet it is happening every day in
America. In fact, an insider report from a horrified worker at a
Missouri Children's Hospital revealed that the number of children
sent for "gender transition" has increased by more than 400% in
the last five years.

That's why I'm emailing you today
asking you to sign your petition to your U.S. Representative and
Senators demanding they take immediate action to ban the
transgender child sexual mutilation and chemical castration
procedures.

I am former U.S. Congressman Paul
Broun, and I'm more determined than ever to stop the worldwide
tide of Leftism I see targeting our children and grandchildren.

CitizenGO represents millions of
members and supporters fighting back against the radical
anti-family LGBT ideology that has swept through our schools,
media, and entertainment, mercilessly attacking the relationships
between children and their parents and destroying family morality
and faith.

Will you join with millions of
pro-family Citizens to defend our children from transgender child
sexual mutilation?

Click here to sign the petition
to Congress demanding they ban all gender transition procedures
for minors immediately!

Puberty blockers, hormone
supplements, and drastic sexual organ surgery are all procedures
with horrific side effects that children cannot fully grasp. And
in a sea of lies and misinformation, few adults understand the
true horror.

Make no mistake, the transgender
lobby wants them confused and isolated from any dissenting
voices.
*** I've seen an entire
generation of youth come out of their schools confused and
assaulted by the transgender ideology attacking gender and their
sense of self, persuading them to seek poisonous and severely
harmful procedures to change their bodies to "fit in" with the
transgender world.

*** I've seen families torn to
pieces as the newest generation of children, who are fed radical
transgender values with their cereal, clash with bewildered
parents over a child's so-called" gender identity."

*** In a growing number of
States, children are encouraged to hide their planned mutilations
or chemical castrations from their parents by teachers and
counselors.

*** Meanwhile, the transgender
lobby rabidly shuts down or "cancels" any dissenting voices or
studies on the harmful effects of child sexual mutilation.

*** They even more rabidly
suppress any study of the massive number of children who abandon
gender transition after the fact...

... and are left with bitter
regrets, twisted bodies and awful consequences.
The best way to put a stop to
it all is by passing a flat-out Federal ban on administering
these procedures to minors.

Our children, the most vulnerable
members of our society, are being conned into irreversible
procedures that alter their bodies and lives forever.

This is not a matter of choice or
identity - it's a matter of safety and common sense. Minors are
not equipped with the life experience or emotional maturity to
make such grave, scarring, and often irreversible decisions about
their bodies and their futures.

Sign your petition today
demanding Congress step in and protect our children from
transgender mutilation.

14 states have already passed
bans on transgender child sexual mutilation, though 2 are being
challenged in court.

But states like California and
New York will not follow suit willingly, and the transgender
lobby is howling for blood at the restrictions being placed on
them.

That's why, once you've signed, I
ask you to chip in with a modest contribution to help CitizenGO
bring other Americans into the fight against child sexual
mutilation. Even a gift of $10 or $25 will be a big boost.

The success of this campaign
relies on the power of Citizens standing together to make our
voices heard, and every extra dollar counts when we're fighting
to counter the transgender lobby's pervasive ideology.

So please, sign your petition,
share, and chip in with a quick $10 or $25 contribution to help
CitizenGO recruit more signers and win the fight.

In addition to recruiting more
petition signers to increase the impact of our campaign, your
contribution will help fund:

Hard-hitting advertisements
to highlight and draw attention to the horrible practices of
transgender centers.
Targeted petition deliveries
to key elected officials demanding they take action to defend
children.
Phone calls to likely
supporters to raise awareness and recruit new members.
Radio and TV ads exposing
everything the transgender ideology is inflicting on our
children, should funds permit.

So once you have signed, I
ask that you make a contribution of $10 or $25 to CitizenGO, or
perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or $100, to help expand
their recruitment and to fund all of these plans in CitizenGO's
fight to stop child sexual mutilation.

So please sign your petition,
share, and chip in with a generous contribution of $10 or $25, or
perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or $100 today.

Thank you for standing with us in
this crucial fight for our children's future.

Sincerely,

Paul C. Broun (MD)
U.S. Congressman Georgia 10 Ret.

P.S. I'm more determined than
ever to stop the worldwide tide of Leftism I see targeting our
children and grandchildren.

CitizenGO represents millions of
members and supporters fighting back against the radical
anti-family LGBT ideology, and I want every pro-sanity American
to band together to put a stop to child sexual mutilation and
chemical castration.

The best way to do that is with a
Federal ban on performing Transgender procedures on minors, and
CitizenGO is launching a campaign to do just that. But it will
take people power to succeed.

That's why I'm counting on you to
sign your petition, and then go on to add a modest $10 or $25
contribution, or perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or
$100, to help CitizenGO fight to ban child sexual mutilation.

In addition to signing your
petition and donating, I need you to share it with your friends
and family who share our values so they can have the opportunity
to sign as well. CitizenGO's petition page makes it super easy to
share in a way you prefer.

CitizenGO is a
community of active citizens that works to ensure that human
life, the family and our freedoms are respected worldwide.
CitizenGO members live in every nation of the world. Our team is
spread across 16 countries on 5 continents and operates in 12
languages. Learn about CitizenGO here or follow us on Facebook or
Twitter.

Not produced or
emailed at taxpayer expense.

name: Shawn Harris via Blue Amp Action
subject: We can unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene and build a better future for everyone:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Overwhelming gratitude...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T440a31fa-42c5-478a-9e44-2634ec39c5dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter – I really don’t know what to say besides thank you. Thank you for making the launch of our campaign such an overwhelming success. I am incredibly humbled by the supportive messages, encouragement, and donations from people across the country. We’re building our movement to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene around our shared values of compassion and kindness. Because of you, we’re starting this campaign on the right foot. **If you didn’t donate to our launch, don’t worry, you still can **[by clicking here!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T245dd73e-033c-415d-85c6-6007ccc9cb11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**DONATE $7 NOW >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0ff2fbf-9b12-4891-9b0a-7e524e65ebb7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2afd1245-a94b-4329-b554-f45ea98feca0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) As a reminder: my name is Shawn Harris. I am a recently-retired United States Army Brigadier General, a grandfather, and a proud son of Georgia. I am running to restore dignity to northern Georgia and replace Ms. Greene in the House of Representatives. Ms. Greene is the wrong person to represent us at this critical moment. Instead of addressing the issues that make it harder for us to get by, she is focused on dividing our country and devaluing our fellow Americans — embarrassing us at home and abroad. [If you’re on board, would you chip in $7, $15, $25, or whatever you’re comfortable with to help us get our voter outreach efforts up and running?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbbd6bb8d-b2cd-41c9-a98f-27fb372c7234/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf37830f3-646d-497f-9587-8a09c87984c8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Ms. Greene is wrong for our country and certainly wrong for Georgia. It’s time to elect someone who will bring us together over someone who tries to divide us by perpetuating culture wars. From the bottom of my heart: thank you for your kindness. My team and I are excited to get to work! Warm regards, [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8e30c85-2b31-4a83-8e70-117a48f79f94/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Shawn Harris
Candidate – Georgia 14
United States House of Representatives

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

## Harvard President Resigns
Embattled Harvard President [Claudine Gay resigned Tuesday ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OhCAURp8GOwwgaiwspli7mXZLcweuejf8GECNb7-Zrbf9vuKcnO_n_ARyFNYXeBzLEmcwhU6cJW-40rOu7LggKmwqHGUvtBqkaLpqG007qH6QVmrTa4DBvK1YtJYLLKhNpyoalVBaSNFI0bairYUcbCfsu5FD_-6hYVqgpRJT_RMplA0Xd8cTU22ir9y4lbJn1jyYmpiaruuqfQ6fj6kJAz8yU5OPAW-mJgMJMWUIFu1hoFAMTE0bpBOS5UegE1OmcvM9YSaLoXDj4LAUkK9w88-6Bgor3zDxPebCE-4xlcwzfACQ-OMhvX-tX1Ua7X6Rc5S7nmmxeiD351z-C_gbAAD__0ymdWk)in the wake of new accusations of plagiarism as well as ongoing criticism about her testimony to Congress about antisemitism on campus. Gay was Harvard's first Black president. She held the post for only six months--the shortest tenure in the university's history, which goes back to the 17th century. The Harvard board initially stood behind her after her testimony, but as plagiarism allegations surfaced, the school came under pressure from students and faculty to take action. The [current provost, Alan Garber,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OgzAQhJ_GdEbrX6BwkYYu152uRBu8gE_GRMYB5e1PpL5qRjMjjfT93Ic7hhjS_IUruTJtA44lHDQIrrjUg668m4gkqYqcaEDLToCy1eLaUQnTtrptOymMeYDtQJnGWiMmNCCq4CRIDQKUAGPA1CA6b8E_lOiaR4OKaSAfypbr3y2kstAU39tBuR63tYpuKeW5M3VjsmeyP8-zXvd0dUz2lPhrZ7JPdF7y8QvmA7Pnz0x78JQKHyO-fEjEZ3zzK53TNcTMbzexJvwuVXb-eYYYw24bpmFeMcTPf_kPxl8AAAD__-Z4XwI) will serve as interim president.
## Passengers Escape Fiery Plane Crash
A Japanese airliner collided with a small Coast Guard aircraft in a fiery crash at Tokyo's airport Tuesday. All 379 passengers and crew on the JAL plane escaped from the burning jet with no fatalities. [Watch the video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2uozAQxfGnMd0gfwGhcLENXbbdEo3xECZxbGScoLz9Kre-7TnNT_9_1_mKHDnd_uKTXF3zjEvlN80KDGg72ya4lUiTacipQVo9Kmn6ZnN4MaM3GIh86Fffjbobg_UX7wfCZbENOy21lUoaJbtOdq1UY-hl8EaNgx_QCCspcM2lvWdOdaM1fvKbSrvkZxPdVut-CPNH6Eno6TzPttCrUjm-_3fJJQahJzwYYceFV16EnlYuBL4QPg7Irwp7xERQXunED9xxx3RAzY9Phg0TBQTksudSIW0P-IpBKpBa6KkpLuwnx8hHPwgrb0_k-IOrv5X6HwAA__88rmt3). The airliner was attempting to land when it collided with the Coast Guard patrol plane on the runway. Five of the six Coast Guard crew died, though the pilot escaped with some injuries. The passengers on the airliner were evacuated swiftly as the plane started to burn and got out before the Airbus 350 was engulfed in flames ([see video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj72O8jAQAJ_G7oJ2_Z_CxdfQ8bVXRmt7DUYmiYIFurc_cfWVoylG83VZLtR6W6__6cFx1G2hPNqLF5z0pMxiZImVWbGWHNGDUTOCdvIWvQ0cyFlCX5w1wWJWPmiimjAESLJFBcoAgkawFuwJcC4OStI4--RJCwNc2tiO031r67hx7d_bi49T3h6yx9sY-1Pof0KdhTrTvvL7-VEfOEbLnYU6751Wnmo7eLrTTuvkZ-3AWxPYWAqQQs45eIU16WwBnTxi2d-t9_Z0Xhi4Pqj13-L4a_8nAAD___7IWCg)). Fourteen injuries were reported.
## List: How Long Can $1 Million in Savings Last?
How long will $1 million in retirement savings last? It depends on [what state you live in](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uhDAQhJ_GdEbrH-BcuEhDd2lTIoMXcGTsk70C3dtHREqXZppPMxp9X8_p6UIMaft0B1pa8-QWCidOgisu9aQbb1dEiapBKwbQ0ghQfbNbMy-d8H0_SwSt1TCY3nj9UGhAPZx7NMFKkBoEKAFdB10Lwvge_KyEGebBKaYBfaBc2u8cEu24xnc-sbRLPppod6JXZeqDyZHJ8bqudknzckMmx3uayRHEX-z54jGnjQt-hBhDTjwkXpBCwQMT8erOkLbKo6tUb4Ynljev5AjbnY7YFOtf192t_cA0bIcL8fcL_SfmJwAA__-Y0mMh), according to a new analysis by Bankrate. The analysis focused on living costs in all 50 states for people over age 65. Hawaii is the most draining; $1 million would run out in 10 years. In Florida it would last about 18 years, and in Mississippi, up to 22 years. On this date in 1977, Steve Jobs and Steve Wozniak incorporated Apple Computer Inc., a longshot start-up that became the world's most valuable company. () Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Today's edition is brought to you by . Check them out if you're interested in personalized weight loss plans based in science. If you like The Flyover and want to keep up with news in Texas, you may enjoy The Texas Flyover, launching January 9th. | Harvard President Resigns Embattled Harvard President the wake of new accusations of plagiarism as well as ongoing criticism about her testimony to Congress about antisemitism on campus. Gay was Harvard's first Black president. She held the post for only six months--the shortest tenure in the university's history, which goes back to the 17th century. The Harvard board initially stood behind her after her testimony, but as plagiarism allegations surfaced, the school came under pressure from students and faculty to take action. The will serve as interim president. Passengers Escape Fiery Plane Crash A Japanese airliner collided with a small Coast Guard aircraft in a fiery crash at Tokyo's airport Tuesday. All 379 passengers and crew on the JAL plane escaped from the burning jet with no fatalities. . The airliner was attempting to land when it collided with the Coast Guard patrol plane on the runway. Five of the six Coast Guard crew died, though the pilot escaped with some injuries. The passengers on the airliner were evacuated swiftly as the plane started to burn and got out before the Airbus 350 was engulfed in flames (). Fourteen injuries were reported. List: How Long Can $1 Million in Savings Last? How long will $1 million in retirement savings last? It depends on , according to a new analysis by Bankrate. The analysis focused on living costs in all 50 states for people over age 65. Hawaii is the most draining; $1 million would run out in 10 years. In Florida it would last about 18 years, and in Mississippi, up to 22 years. To see how long $1 million in savings would last in your state, for the full list and analysis of costs. However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That's why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e101b636ec92451a8b471ccdbc8b75f0&_e=z8uGGbMDBSORyVmbqxF2hr7jWvC2CHkWe0VFi2-VZsvAZqSykmvgFWzyDh4HvAQ7adIzxvcGUuH3kv80JXms4RgfdAHQ0HFkUX-ILn_6-f9Q9WrBTDLwToBZ-GbxgYVDOFmfI3zF3gSm42Qyg8Dm5cR3V50pguvMKE5OaKzJeamTP62ndPeqV_mrv5oXnSpm2TjKLc5zaA5QnVDyie-p4KSti0c3WB21kc6jxZRT9PcOZq1U__QbNZYgGjzq_vbJwdZsrgJHMduDjqkLFoHA0V8B8lg3QzNsHAtiAFHlmDCeHav3mdFoA5xn4pEKDCJ16Tj_1UtRHZDMt1q6PG4gVTO0VmKqfxkRDROl7_A42F7Ut2lWHWJqBvXs9x9O9knvDvXbbfEhTJF7fQIPfxIAUzkh-xHtVew-azQZb1GG_dkn7u215pf7EAMwCnk8ZiDZak50a1B2Pg03v9bBKpLD1Q%3D%3D) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e101b636ec92451a8b471ccdbc8b75f0&_e=z8uGGbMDBSORyVmbqxF2husADlAO9tDRn99tU8XJ1DDS_bzH5go2o4hcSWnrHPGEef_s8HuE_pfMHKYFM5malcvB6psnocsHeJTJwmv_jncb2DfvwaJvLB5A45K3S8QjCqbao3Ll_ysK2lmt2PvIsPV5zLolbrLoIdvY9ISeEedR8TgYmCEuH_VzKy5BlsdIVVuUu4nredLvvh1ZyoN0MgWxE6IADk-nQe0Zc7rcIKzIFV3X5tOool5E4wZ4QStaR4S4_ZkIv2yxer8P2lwX-XdlXwJjCu78O1thOs1qP4VBObMzbhBq6iDdJrlP938Tyvj6N6rCAZ5AWeA3v0M0gGjznTmJOViM3ddgQhcryvVS94uuGUqb1MgGzflZwOK_siof3-WXz-d5C2By8Ii11M962KPKZVHtZuEqhELlhnEKs7TH_K3myIhalv_-ADLBfCDfwQ8i4DILTGnO0DkGFLc1aFE81WDsMpHFr3sm_Vg%3D)
