name: Freedom First Project
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDAzLTJkOGEyNTg3MDY0MTRlNzdhYzU3OTJjMzNkMTRhMDRiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvZGVwYXJ0bWVudC1vZi1qdXN0aWNlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDEwNDBOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWRvanN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GRk80NTMxNSJ9/UnHhL8ciHySdWpD1-JyFkg) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That’s why I’m asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDAzLTJkOGEyNTg3MDY0MTRlNzdhYzU3OTJjMzNkMTRhMDRiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvZGVwYXJ0bWVudC1vZi1qdXN0aWNlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDEwNDBOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWRvanN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GRk80NTMxNSJ9/Dvcafxdbz2FlxOC488fTiQ)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today’s ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America’s great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America’s leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we’ve seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDAzLTJkOGEyNTg3MDY0MTRlNzdhYzU3OTJjMzNkMTRhMDRiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvZGVwYXJ0bWVudC1vZi1qdXN0aWNlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDEwNDBOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWRvanN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GRk80NTMxNSJ9/mfLbHshIca4o1tty_KQp4A)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That’s why I’m asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today’s ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America’s great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America’s leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we’ve seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. ## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/l9wwv1i5xEVnO89C38Xgjw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnd_~~ "Take Retirement Quiz")

---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/O8C1aLcTNBufarp4qRn9fA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnd_~)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/O8C1aLcTNBufarp4qRn9fA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnd_~)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/l9wwv1i5xEVnO89C38Xgjw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnd_~~) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/O8C1aLcTNBufarp4qRn9fA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnd_~)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Try this no-cost tool to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.

This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. Hey, it's Team DeSantis. We have to be honest about what it's going to take to put an end to the nightmare Joe Biden is putting America through. **_If we fail to raise what we need before the Iowa Caucuses on January 15th, three things will happen:_** **1)** The media will spin a story that our support won't go the distance._And voters will believe it._ **2)** Caucusgoers in Iowa may question if their support is met across the country or if they're the _only ones_ fighting for Ron DeSantis for President. **3)** The Left will be _thrilled_ to see that the one candidate who can take them down at the ballot box next November doesn't have the support needed to finish the fight.

| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7df2f67db48e4200a8147b82cdc752ec&_e=r1vZ6uWG_dst6Rm5pBen7M98RDMfrDsqOcng1qix_tnMyiy5DnwRh30sewcYl4R4aTvHLRAJUHzqnEZfQeCE6mFbiPsF_u7hqTEVLS8jcfEWia8vKfjep4fbp4TQAecnDUdc6Jk0vNUM-0WS1fQfs6mSlGvUa9FfYKixCEVZPhVva6QNraV3NzT4zAgFPx2RdNtLdA50PUNYm2HygjObf2y9u3an1Lomnxt8-sRGiEj9in32FCZQo5FxhHAixzslaUMxDy0nCWdXt9lq-zAFzqBFlAB31frkI0WV-RerJZqtf0tg--njjSj4bPXlrTKhtXKTc4UHuqYIk4yVSPz0jWbraZfIittXUjOIaDbcx7kvjNTZ6QHJJ1d7YEb9qMxCbqVom7YKhrb3IFhfGgW9xL_nTpx5NCv1uumZS-oBQjeADlwyxXZeO5huecbRWxWN)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7df2f67db48e4200a8147b82cdc752ec&_e=r1vZ6uWG_dst6Rm5pBen7M98RDMfrDsqOcng1qix_tnMyiy5DnwRh30sewcYl4R4aTvHLRAJUHzqnEZfQeCE6mFbiPsF_u7hqTEVLS8jcfEWia8vKfjep4fbp4TQAecnDUdc6Jk0vNUM-0WS1fQfs6mSlGvUa9FfYKixCEVZPhVva6QNraV3NzT4zAgFPx2RdNtLdA50PUNYm2HygjObf2y9u3an1Lomnxt8-sRGiEj9in32FCZQo5FxhHAixzslaUMxDy0nCWdXt9lq-zAFzp-6y0Ls_2QlRINIizN-JskJWr93GWfh250rXPZfMzsji7KjSsvBIYB_3ZOHI6WpremfVoVSO8T7reSc1aGWU9Enzfmk7X04FeghAHEFTiHguFGIZ7XIHaXi0Z-wFw5RQxmzftlmcIov3xD2QjL59bTAH3f_hYGPluZLj8W95DTK)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

If we fail to raise what we need before the Iowa Caucuses on January 15th, three things will happen: 1) The media will spin a story that our support won't go the distance.And voters will believe it. 2) Caucusgoers in Iowa may question if their support is met across the country or if they're the only ones fighting for Ron DeSantis for President. 3) The Left will be thrilled to see that the one candidate who can take them down at the ballot box next November doesn't have the support needed to finish the fight. | | We have reached the point where your support makes a direct difference in how votes are cast. We know that it's YOU who drives this campaign and YOU who decides this election. This is why you're the most important voice on our team. We are running out of time. If you're able to help us reach our $37,000 daily goal, _. We need 115 more people to pitch in $30 or more, and we'll stay be on pace to finish this night strong. Thank you for sticking by us, Team DeSantis | | | Get to Know Ron DeSantis | | | Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. | On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._ | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02a583a2413049429e849681c3eca2ae&_e=AyTfNDYwEgPLg_NA7CE1xODoGJSVqvZhgocjLqFoq1ZChWU9m0o4Ak4tKQ2UJo8qST0b5m8YOB8nXhojLG0_cNWaxghnqClIIoc0UCtliCMDNIPQFO_alLK8uwXv2U6GC8OStkFl1nIza6pD0CWesd4h6ZO9nOvMkDIdX4iaP85s6ysGExb_vTZiwSqNyxvSSwR4RPfVl1NEvZ8L9ldLbrwvGSWaN9inNrzwZ2tmTNfQNBmcGjXBzH0ThjEDTbFOT_PH_4twSmka5VguJv1uOmPId832B08rJ5g-fjI1F6s3mDwGH24iqK-AsAbqg3GEINyuqwwPue_14aE4HDw7Rbw_9ICpJTRbZaPCuc0xg_clAcKNa_5v73StKgj-YuUUhkKr6GQ9wemeinTQBsEgNg%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02a583a2413049429e849681c3eca2ae&_e=AyTfNDYwEgPLg_NA7CE1xODoGJSVqvZhgocjLqFoq1ZChWU9m0o4Ak4tKQ2UJo8qST0b5m8YOB8nXhojLG0_cNWaxghnqClIIoc0UCtliCMDNIPQFO_alLK8uwXv2U6GC8OStkFl1nIza6pD0CWesd4h6ZO9nOvMkDIdX4iaP85s6ysGExb_vTZiwSqNyxvSSwR4RPfVl1NEvZ8L9ldLbrwvGSWaN9inNrzwZ2tmTNdfSQpFwmzjFKTX3y9OZo_ABuyNmTVgHrsl5zndqdeoussoHxsBBzLvFopfi9-i1ZK8YZf2o9t__cXehLPaWxInxy7VxVyvvEDpdvL1ufDmyetRoPiJt3v3zR1AXhezhJRaB6TNnmr4INaJnIhteuxOR71SuLeYwU30LxGo87E9LQ%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02a583a2413049429e849681c3eca2ae&_e=AyTfNDYwEgPLg_NA7CE1xODoGJSVqvZhgocjLqFoq1ZChWU9m0o4Ak4tKQ2UJo8qST0b5m8YOB8nXhojLG0_cNWaxghnqClIIoc0UCtliCMDNIPQFO_alLK8uwXv2U6GC8OStkFl1nIza6pD0CWesd4h6ZO9nOvMkDIdX4iaP85s6ysGExb_vTZiwSqNyxvSSwR4RPfVl1NEvZ8L9ldLbrwvGSWaN9inNrzwZ2tmTNcGiL2fZWbh6nRZzx_Vi5oIb5RT5MGtvIIO3efWBbMqlGk-8Og4ScFijKrW3u82qTHT59WCb_Y84xewMdKtv075Vt5PVD5z3tjALeUcAlGFl46506Yu20FNS87t7XwB9RqN628bhDlTLoWdxJESNbjDovogO_z11IJ935TFe-4vjQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=02a583a2413049429e849681c3eca2ae&_t=uFO3pRN1wHP8uh0b3tGqA7EBoao0zJjXD-G-Wc7cnfX8hSVIZBBSfKSKqfaXZRO9mDCucbaetHQfGqw5rCxggmboaPSRPaJfYFmbDc0njZ5ipSGu6uNzgxgxAfEs83tsejJYaAlDfthAnOFLJLWsxrL8J0YFKzlo7KPC6Fqb9vg%3D)

subject: I hate to come to you with this news
body:

| |

name: Rubio, Marco
subject: I won’t ask you again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
This is the final time I’ll be personally asking you.

| |
---
| | | I've reached out before.

My team may have reached out too.

This is the final time I'll be _personally_ asking you.

**[Will you please sign the 2024 Petition to STOP DC Statehood and help us reach our signature goal?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp0aoad1el097tg06pseuutmmefppjjdbp8oa9v8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg6co36cth2bs "Will you please sign the 2024 Petition to STOP DC Statehood and help us reach our signature goal?")**
---
| | [STOP DC STATEHOOD](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhh7punik0hb1bg61vqgrrc0p6nlr6btj6hm594g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg6co36cth2bs "STOP DC STATEHOOD")
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8edosf9vb8pngaj7e9sq8ffei45ppj8nsrlsnoo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg6co36cth2bs "Sign the petition to stop DC Statehood. - Marco Rubio")
---
I really can't emphasize this enough: we are at a critical moment now. **44** Democrat senators support making DC our 51st state.

**This is a huge deal, Friend.** This was once a radical, far-Left position, but now it's the norm!
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z88ehbntnqftgtlvqcof25b0p6fochd3e4t9sr08_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg6co36cth2bs "DC Statehood means adding 2 new liberal senators. - Marco Rubio")
---
I've said it before, and I'll say it as many times as necessary: it is absolutely _crucial_ that we stay vigilant. If Democrats get their way and grant DC Statehood, they will seize control of the Senate and our country for _decades_!
_I'm really worried that if we don't stop them now, we won't get another chance._
**This isn 't an exaggeration or overreaction, Friend. We MUST stop DC Statehood in NOW and _FOREVER_!**

**[Please add your name to the 2024 Stop DC Statehood Petition:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrf7579jmvoh8f55a1o3ejo1friih525ja201c90_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg6co36cth2bs "Please add your name to the 2024 Stop DC Statehood Petition:")**
---
| | [STOP DC STATEHOOD](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7fjlkil94coihq4aespfhfjvni2de5nsfb0buq0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg6co36cth2bs "STOP DC STATEHOOD")
---
I look forward to seeing your name on the petition.

Thank you,
Marco
---
| | |

* * *
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmpnmcd5nra55u6avfolmlcjmg5f6qooong5p6to_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg6co36cth2bs "Read Marco Rubio's Confidential Memo!")

[Access Marco Rubio's latest memo!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlgcqsmnhdtr1sa8bcv731ne0c6cd0sb2arft4e8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg6co36cth2bs "Access Marco Rubio’s latest memo!")

Enter your phone number & zip code to unlock his latest message about the status of our country, where we're headed, and how we fix it.

| [UNLOCK THE MEMO!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znpv1g8g6eb12si574jk6gmcm7jj2ulnr3ivcgd0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg6co36cth2bs "UNLOCK THE MEMO!")
---

---

It's Marco Rubio, and I know that times are hard right now in Joe Biden's America. If you can't afford to donate, do you think you could endorse my American Dream Team Candidates?

They could really use your support and prayers.

Thank you!

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Breaking the Narrative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
BREAKING: CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!

|
**BREAKING:** CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!

**Censorship, cherry-picking polls, and legal threats are just the mainstream media’s latest tactics to prop up their favorite pick-of-the-month puppet.**

They have disgracefully, cherry-picked arbitrary poll parameters to favor requirements. Morning Consult recently had me polling ahead of Nikki Haley in one of the largest-conducted Iowa polls. The latest American Research Group Inc. also has me polling at #2 amongst “probable” GOP primary voters in New Hampshire:

Trump – 33%
**Ramaswamy—18%**
DeSantis—14%
Christie—9%
Haley—8%
Undecided—16%
| [** STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6tvkemh4ilif0raenkn9vtv2g0bqgo517g5jhv8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg6co36cth2bs)
---

This is of course, after they cut my Iowa town hall short after I pointed out uncomfortable truths about January 6 and related topics, which CNN instantly and desperately covered up as "conspiracy theories.”

[**You know it and I know it, the TRUTH is: CNN is afraid of open dialogue on the issues and allowing a perspective they disagree with.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm8erp862vqkr3ru6up0t12dc0jbjee1t95o1bg8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg6co36cth2bs) Their floating head talk show hosts have never missed an opportunity to to slander me saying, I’m “infecting the public with conspiracy,” “one step away from Nazi propaganda,” and “selling sinister lies.”

[** SHUT DOWN THE CORRUPTION **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztedidlfm8cipri74nu6mea5tnjvrdvpqgviav60_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg6co36cth2bs)
---

Open your eyes and see what CNN and other mainstream media outlets are trying to do: implement a plot to prop up the establishment-approved GOP puppet. Don’t let them get away with it. This is an insult to GOP caucusgoers in Iowa and the American people.

While the mainstream media desperately tries to count me out, we’re bypassing them and _**going straight to you, the people,**_ to expose a new layer of media corruption. On Wednesday, January 10, at 8 PM EST/7 PM CT, podcast host Tim Pool will host a live-studio audience town hall with me.

I hope you’ll tune in for the TRUTH.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaa323ftk7fo5e3qaj298fah6tnkssj9trq1epno_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg6co36cth2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhg1ojofm77n5cdeni2hc0n5d853lj7kg2h4htvg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg6co36cth2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb5g8i7srntvsl3nni4r1af2h26nbnfs9i0rb3k0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg6co36cth2bs)

subject: Christie Super PAC Launches New Statewide Television & Radio Advertisements Across New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: paid for and is responsible for the content of this advertising
body:
Christie Super PAC Launches New Statewide Television & Radio Advertisements Across New Hampshire | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a0d08312508b/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13560124-bio63ogl56-13560527?e=d0a9afa930)
---
|
---
|
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
January 3, 2024
Contact: [press@tellitlikeitispac.com](mailto:press@tellitlikeitispac.com?subject=null&body=null)
**Christie Super PAC Launches New Statewide Television & Radio Advertisements Across New Hampshire** _Both Emphasize Christie’s Message & New Hampshire’s Role In The Process_
**ARLINGTON, VA —** Three weeks before Granite State voters cast their ballots in the First in The Nation Primary, Tell It Like It Is, the pro-Christie Super PAC, released new statewide television and radio ads.
Entitled “Follow Me,” the :30 second TV spot will begin airing today in New Hampshire across broadcast, cable, and digital platforms. The creative is the second in a series of a previously announced $3.5 million dollar ad buy.
The ad features footage of Governor Chris Christie at a town hall meeting in Portsmouth outlining the core message of his candidacy: offering voters a clear alternative to former president Donald Trump. “I got into this race for president because everybody in my party who was offering themselves to be President of the United States were acting like it was going to fix itself. Don’t mention his name, don’t criticize him, don’t do anything,” says Christie.
The radio ad, entitled “Send A Message,” includes audio of Christie reminding Granite Staters of their pivotal role in the nominating process. “We can’t beat Joe Biden with a convicted felon, we can’t beat Joe Biden with someone who talks that way about immigrants to this country, and we can’t beat Joe Biden with someone who is in bed with Vladimir Putin.”
**“Follow Me”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=cad0b2d3cc&e=d0a9afa930)
**“Send A Message”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=6da988d7eb&e=d0a9afa930)
**TRANSCRIPT FOR “FOLLOW ME” (TV:30)**
**Chris Christie:** I got into this race for president because everybody in my party who was offering themselves to be President of the United States were acting like it was going to fix itself.
Don’t mention his name, don’t criticize him, don’t do anything.
I can't stand by and silently acquiesce to that.
Leadership is about looking at you and saying this is the problem. I know it; follow me, we'll fix it together.
Tell It Like It Is PAC is responsible for the content of this advertisement.
**TRANSCRIPT FOR “SEND A MESSAGE” (RADIO:60)**
**VO:** Governor Chris Christie on New Hampshire’s important role in selecting our next president:
**Chris Christie:** I think the people of New Hampshire are going to say no, enough.And I think they are going to send a real message to Donald Trump on January 23rd.
And they can’t do it by voting for Trump sycophants like Ron DeSantis, Nikki Haley, and Vivek Ramaswamy.
At the first debate, all three of those people raised their hand and said even if he was a convicted felon, they would support him.
I’m the only one left in this race who did not, and the fact is, that is the most important issue in this race because we can’t beat Joe Biden with a convicted felon, we can’t beat Joe Biden with someone who talks that way about immigrants to this country, and we can’t beat Joe Biden with someone who is in bed with Vladimir Putin.
**VO:** New Hampshire, it’s up to you.
Chris Christie.
The courage to tell the truth, the experience to get it done.
Tell It Like It Is PAC paid for and is responsible for the content of this advertising.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
TellItLikeItIsPAC.com

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Corruption News Network
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
BREAKING: CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!

|
**BREAKING:** CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!

**Censorship, cherry-picking polls, and legal threats are just the mainstream media’s latest tactics to prop up their favorite pick-of-the-month puppet.**

They have disgracefully, cherry-picked arbitrary poll parameters to favor requirements. Morning Consult recently had me polling ahead of Nikki Haley in one of the largest-conducted Iowa polls. The latest American Research Group Inc. also has me polling at #2 amongst “probable” GOP primary voters in New Hampshire:

Trump - 33%
**Ramaswamy --18%**
DeSantis--14%
Christie--9%
Haley--8%
Undecided--16%
| [** STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689066%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y0hryZSJR%2f1Eqa7A1etuJw&sysid=1)
---

This is of course, after they cut my Iowa town hall short after I pointed out uncomfortable truths about January 6 and related topics, which CNN instantly and desperately covered up as "conspiracy theories.”

[**You know it and I know it, the TRUTH is: CNN is afraid of open dialogue on the issues and allowing a perspective they disagree with.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689067%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m4sFnx2%2b9WG3jr1VoTrACg&sysid=1) Their floating head talk show hosts have never missed an opportunity to to slander me saying, I’m “infecting the public with conspiracy,” “one step away from Nazi propaganda,” and “selling sinister lies.”

[** SHUT DOWN THE CORRUPTION **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689068%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r%2bujrr93Jseu%2fK0tkU29tw&sysid=1)
---

Open your eyes and see what CNN and other mainstream media outlets are trying to do: implement a plot to prop up the establishment-approved GOP puppet. Don’t let them get away with it. This is an insult to GOP caucusgoers in Iowa and the American people.

While the mainstream media desperately tries to count me out, we’re bypassing them and _**going straight to you, the people,**_ to expose a new layer of media corruption. On Wednesday, January 10, at 8 PM EST/7 PM CT, podcast host Tim Pool will host a live-studio audience town hall with me.

I hope you’ll tune in for the TRUTH.
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689069%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ltvkGa8cPo9Fgtbmpq%2fSeA&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689066%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y0hryZSJR%2f1Eqa7A1etuJw&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689060%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wgy4kYmMgHy32iW0YKDQbA&sysid=1)

---

---|---|---

| |

| | | *****EMERGENCY NEW YORK SPECIAL ELECTION UPDATE*****
_A major Left Wing Group has just lined up a jaw-dropping $5.9 MILLION ad buy to flip NY-03 blue and crush our GOP nominee Mazi Pilip in this MUST-WIN Special Election._
---
| [](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8f3aaed04daf4c37af2272fa25f78ab9&_e=5YzwGezdLiqz_EHGrVYSmbXk0Gh0ALx7oaoDeNFaletCZJ8_tr2ORxvnZs6DKoXExpW9oIlY0qw_bKJ32QrWBBZuNlEAea0czJyVXG7p_sK-h0iowCBAv7V3x_Ki7F85v2vdPBJD8i1DE6PbR9jEDvJtNhWKKRkt9DFOd_7cS2LGef2fphxf8WH8_4FIh4JpyMl6HFXfST2gLK8_m1LDz41jHmzjENIiIDt6e5P_7x28Zs4vXyxgwehfTktRax1m82zY9-bqEMBFFspkkjZJHiCG4cGQip0VPqt6Ou0HdptdzD5tOby3xGOTaNcGKP3boDsTweRv7-aWn7etwn3-m8q5SHdzE-jdKtz9QpptAEqYf264g4DL2_2p1Gbeu8EMm2zXC83nDldEo6gK254DZMrxEC9QTw9RzQbfmN-aoCw%3D)

It's like we've been hit by a ton of bricks - and what happens now will decide everything...

Our hopes of winning this race and protecting our House Majority rely on the immediate responses we get to this email.

**So please, please, help before it 's too late.**

This is the first & biggest race of 2024. We cannot lose this race or it will give Democrats all the momentum they need to crush GOP candidates across the country and end our House Majority.

With how much Democrats and their big-money donors are spending, we could just throw in the towel now...

body:

Blackrock warns "Prepare for a recession unlike any other." Central banks igniting a global recession with their fight to stop inflation.

# Dave Ramsey Is Dangerously Wrong

---
Asked whether we're on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:

"Am I worried about this? Absolutely not."

Frankly, I've never seen someone so confident in being wrong...

Because what's happening to the US Dollar is not something you should "keep an eye on"...

But instead, is an imminent threat you should get ahead of right NOW.

See, China, Brazil, India, and Russia have finally teamed up to create 1 common currency...

And they're now joined by the oil-producing giants of the Middle East, and dozens of other countries.

This means it will be the greenback against 1 single currency for the rest of the world.

And let me tell you, that's a showdown we might not win.

After all, the combined wealth of these countries is bigger than the US.

Even Trump has gone on to declare:

["Our currency is crashing and will soon no longer be the world standard which will be our greatest defeat frankly in 200 years."](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be81a913780245038ae262ccf495d490&_e=q1N9tqD4B7fQcEQ0WqwJBOkFhP5S7CpKjB0smwBhMyqxFupePr7jrJoCJe3APJdWTWxHvfD0YH6C3FvuiR9m_wdjYalAL1rpk0936_YQQyiSGnh-9vi4ZnFkweH-vCMOwnGYNVZc5Y_ojh2OT958cz3prhtP9qNTm3u_JVu_WXni3xNHkLtpyNiBehiFypqDz6YEhY-pX67m-u-VSTeVNTq1R9VgUEVM7nsVIPTZsmM_7mahJ_meE11ctHSBLeDbZaPdpfrgPWRFN0ira_thFtN8v7sZrnaAvbJpNO0mDrO-lTyAF2dlDjkhDahYqRt8JwqDW1iS-bmdYQHDuIstqdX5TwfhFO-XxrT3HYUEewuTLvfYX0f6u-aaXioknD8LezaXxUGKiZ6jQXa203HZ5SbgiIgZpUbrhLZK-bVkB9jXJkIKIa0KZV-00GGdZIpBkMcWFgXT5xwRMeD9QnzHpHlmqIRdqAtPU-6TrYyWPLg1THkqkgM0ob2PAkzLCxrY)

name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: Unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
Hey friend — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.
The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain.
But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans.
That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future.
We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.
It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.
Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office.
Let’s prove them wrong, friend.
That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Serve America today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
Let’s do this,
David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve

name: =?utf-8?Q?April=20Newland?=
subject: Big News
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by April Newland for National Committeewoman
body:
I have an announcement to share with you. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cd87d9b8dc34/re-hey-9338921?e=d30db4cde8)
---
| |
---
| | My fellow Republican,

**I wanted to share some big news with you: I’m running for national committeewoman in the 2024 Virgin Islands caucus on February 8, 2024.**

My objective is to continue the remarkable growth over the past two years under the leadership of Chairman Gordon Ackley.

I’ve worked closely with Chairman Ackley as part of his leadership team, first as finance committee chairman and, more recently, as party vice chairman.

We have gone from having a balance of $0.00 to having a balance of more than $150,000 — the most money our party has ever raised.

I’ve also worked with Chairman Ackley to host Ron DeSantis and the presidential campaigns of Nikki Haley and Donald J. Trump as they stump in the Virgin Islands ahead of next month’s big caucus.

I’m fully committed to building the viable political alternative that our fellow Virgin Islanders deserve from a two-party system.

For the first time in a decade our party is unified across all three islands. The divides and disagreements of the past are behind us.

We can’t go back. We must go forward, together. Especially as viable candidates for senator in the Virgin Islands Legislature approach Chairman Ackley and I about running with the Republican Party’s support.

One of the first things I did as finance committee chairman was to write a check to the party. After all, how can I ask others to contribute if I won’t invest my own money in our party’s efforts?

That’s leadership. That’s commitment. I believe those two things are critically important.

I will continue with that same mindset as your next national committeewoman.

The national committeewoman’s role is to help with fundraising, sit on the Republican National Committee (effectively the party’s national board of directors), and work to promote all Republicans. I will also use the role to influence the national Republican platform and elevate the issues that face our territory, especially our need for equal federal funding, with Republican senators and congressmen in Washington, D.C.

We must be a party that continues to grow and thrive.

We must provide the leadership that our fellow Virgin Islanders so desperately need.

**For all these reasons, I ask for your vote as national committeewoman in the caucus on February 8, 2024.**

To join my team, please reply to this email or call/text me at 340-643-4347‬.

Respectfully,

April Newland
---
| | **_Paid for and authorized by April Newland for National Committeewoman._**
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=18c9e6cfd9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=18c9e6cfd9).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&afl=1)

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Central Bank: “Final stage” beginning now
body:
The end is near...

| **Central Bank: “Final stage” beginning now** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvogi018f25t2n9qsh7h5tt275hpmo9v21f1vmi0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs) The end is near... Our financial system is about to be transformed in a way that would’ve been unthinkable just a few years ago. And almost nobody is prepared for the chaos that follows. According to Bank of America, this overhaul is imminent – And Dr. Nomi Prins says the final stage begins in the months ahead, with the rollout of the FedNow system. To show you everything you need to know about the FedNow system – and to help you prepare – Dr. Prins has recorded a free presentation with all the details. It’s controversial, but Nomi’s interview is a must-watch for anyone with more than $2,500 in an American bank or retirement fund. **[Click here to find out what you need to do to prepare for this historic transformation.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn7scu3hqo78nt9juu5v5it9urn94iu7o80hb8fo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs)**

name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: The Babylon Bee’s Man of the Year
body:
That’s right, ladies and gentleman

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgkvge6kggtvuk0reg5k299648u6d7k7ur7gr810_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs)
---
|
---
Friend, Naming Rachel Levine as The Babylon Bee’s inaugural _Man of the Year_ was powerful enough to get us kicked off Twitter... ... but this year’s Man of the Year was powerful enough to utterly destroy the reputation of big-name consumer brands, including the one-time top-selling beer — Bud Light. **That’s right, ladies and gentleman (I can say that because I know there are only two genders), this year’s Babylon Bee _Man of the Year_ is none other than _Dylan Mulvaney_.** **[To celebrate the man, the myth — the legend — that is Dylan Mulvaney, we’re offering 25% off a Premium Subscription to The Babylon Bee with discount code: MANOFTHEYEAR.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4bb483vn42u9hgb7nc8e3un6lro9qjbb2m1su60_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs)**
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z50safm1o8da1ko6oduuuli6ovc0u2voj94a2n00_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs)
---
[25% off The Babylon Bee with code: MANOFTHEYEAR](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1nauc72hb89jd8b5f59ps9e3pka1g60bti7hlog_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs)
---
While some may scoff at Mulvaney’s stubborn refusal to live life as the man he was created to be, his true courage comes from living in a land of rainbows, butterflies, and unicorns. Dylan’s imagination must be a magical place, and one that he stays in with a stubborn determination. This was quite a year for Dylan Mulvaney — from a proven force on the Chinese spy app TikTok to talks show interviews to appearance in designer gowns at the MetGala — he’s gone places few **men** would ever dare go. His courage is that of a masculine hero, which is why we’re awarding Mulvaney _Man of the Year_. **[The good news for The Babylon Bee is that we won’t get kicked off Twitter for naming a biological man a MAN this year, and the GOOD NEWS for YOU is that you’ll save 25% on a Premium Subscription to The Babylon Bee with code MANOFTHEYEAR.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z71kiounrevprnug9ossarbgsue59r5tuth5u490_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs)**
---
[Get Your Premium Subscription to The Babylon Bee](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4r08rbgi0nvd07ru3k8og3l0q02otramn7uf37g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs)
---
I can assure you becoming a member of the Bee will bring you more joy than a Bud Light ever would. Your incredible benefits will include:
* Ad-free browsing on BabylonBee.com
* A 20% discount on our online store
* Premium articles and full-length podcasts
* Access to hilarious comments and exclusive forums
* The thrill of supporting original content Big Tech attempts to suppress, the Left seeks to cancel, and — every now and then — is even funny

**[You won’t be forced to live in a fantasy world, dress in a ballgown, destroy a major consumer brand, or even download TikTok to enjoy The Babylon Bee. If you agree those are all wins — subscribe to the Bee today with code MANOFTHEYEAR.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7fk420cm083efnhvun62cr094o6iha2ls6vrdeg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs)**
---
[Save 25% on the BEE with code MANOFTHEYEAR ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi4hqie03r3v46fpb7epdgj4mtu82gpmc2tfrelo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs)
---
And, join me in telling Dylan — you’re the MAN! Thanks for supporting free speech and subscribing today.
---
Cheers! Seth Dillon
CEO | The Babylon Bee Pronouns: Bee and Beeself
---

name: Byron Donalds [Chairman]
subject: RE: Republican Ballot Harvesting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr9omvh2kn5slc7l0sn1m7llm9ofhvjnqonr1l30_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zief9ea57r2sjlfvmhpnbs6krdvh6g1a51rkroh0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_
---
| | | [PITCH IN TEN BUCKS](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvjsj1ad9ud4qjll8idsuvnto6j3rlfpbvhe8n9g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs "PITCH IN TEN BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7d7kfd63ti0k8n13b225g5knad577i1mlp07vsg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs "PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zamq8cl723jfire185jrvd3g7v7dm7724pnbsa8o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs "PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd0452ut837vd9q69qu3sfsrccpil7t8m4gl1hio_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs "PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT")
---
This is a non-negotiable if we want to win.

Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register.

**If we don 't do it too, we will lose.**

But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election.

Will you do your part?

I look forward to seeing your name.

Thank you,

Byron Donalds
Co-Chairman of "Bank Your Vote"

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeogbnlrdukcdrierds0n1rtjh6aakp9aan0ts9o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs "Byron Donalds")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs87ufvlpg03i78armaou5rq06rrorlgg2ejs158_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhkcao45kn0flts8al5n8o7h6ntm1mgaumd8ba2o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | [START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zclg2d1b3qg0ciggb7ir0kvjenc5181gsavse4t8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpg61ob1cph2bs "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. I’m the Democratic nominee in NY-03 to replace the expelled George Santos, and we have a special election coming up on February 13. Peter, the implications of this election in just a few weeks are huge. There’s so much at stake for Nassau, Queens, and the whole country. Everyone is watching to see if we can finally break through the partisan gridlock in Congress to get things done and solve the critical problems our country faces. With George Santos gone, we have a chance to do just that. **In short, Peter, we have to win. This special election will set the tone for all of 2024–including the general election in November.** [**So,**** **Peter** ,****I’m asking if you’ll split a contribution between Blue Amp Action and I so we can win NY-03, finally get to solving the problems our country faces, and start off 2024 with a big win?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd3487b6-caa1-44b8-b3ae-a4e8f318d80e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
Who REALLY Killed JFK? For 60 years people have asked: WHO REALLY KILLED JFK? Movies, books, blogs and government reports have all tried to answer t
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4922998.1657.1.1d116cc79b2ec9f17d44846aae038da1) |
---
## Who REALLY Killed JFK?
---
For 60 years people have asked: **WHO REALLY KILLED JFK?** _Movies_ , _books_ , _blogs_ and _government reports_ have all tried to answer the daunting question. One person who has put forth more evidence than anyone I know in answering this question is **Roger Stone** who has written a **New York Times Bestseller** answering who really killed JFK. **Roger Stone** is coming to Tulsa, OK for a _SPECIAL 2 Hour Event_ to lay out the evidence of who he believes killed JFK. There will also be a **LIVE Q &A session with Mr. Stone**. **When** : Thursday, February 1 | 6:30 pm **Where** : [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4922998.1658.1.7461019b8f23958d52ebf35645bb51ef) | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK 74145 **MUST RSVP** : [www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4922998.1659.1.3e1592bd6d63f2695aeb0c2c4fb7da96)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4922998.1660.1.2af7984f84f422c665d61df53ef76da2) Roger J. Stone
---
**Roger Stone** is a seasoned political operative, speaker, pundit, and New York Times Bestselling Author featured in the **Netflix documentary Get Me Roger Stone**.
**Richard Nixon** , **Ronald Reagan** , and **Donald Trump** —all of these Presidents relied on **Roger Stone** to secure their seat in the Oval Office. In a 45-year career in American politics, Stone has worked on over 700 campaigns for public office.
| | [ Click Here For Tickets To The Roger Stone Event ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4922998.1661.1.1d5c7d98a29b737f4957ea2c4bd55d6f)
---
---
## What To Do To Be Ready For 2024
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4922998.1662.1.d1921735f860fe4721344378ea90beea)
---
I am _not a prophet neither the son of the prophet_ but I am willing to bet the farm that 2024 will be **WILD**! The **Deep State Globalists** will pull out all the stops in this upcoming election year just like in 2020. The question then becomes: **what should we do to be ready for 2024?** I preached about this subject on Sunday at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4922998.1663.1.9eda8115eba36f01ac2e7058a8b7cc47) and I encourage you to check it out because it will help prepare you for what is coming. Watch the [sermon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4922998.1664.1.e715b3bb9c7c701b2f2b9d1b7778a240) here: [https://youtube.com/live/YG782xgZ_y8?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4922998.1665.1.bf3b06b2ba2f62aa7b6824d0d35e3be4) If you are looking for a church in 2024 know that you are invited to join me at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4922998.1666.1.82aa2d29c7a1066b48e714d7f44a3b50) Tulsa & OKC **Sundays @10am | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK** **Sundays @6pm | 3100 N Meridian OKC, OK** Let's start 2024 _STRONG_! You can also partner with [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4922998.1667.1.a2de08fe005a695413a7ee0207e07efc) by making a donation at [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=4922998.1668.1.f17495716baaba96c42705b528013ef5) Thank you,

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Why our fundraising goals matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f860bf47f0537b974f1fb4640e430dca5210e34554d8917d01064600d26117eaa99d4cecec261fc9c0d28c4f16dcc7b1d646a96570f11e32e7720a76a2a7fdc36948efc575f7cb5d7893fb966f976cc0

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1194e982c4b9b7b318096802b870f2fe2e0574565e1987384ca6dd37d7a7c31e3837d1541988039a1b4cd665f084fa9cb9df191edc08ba60205ddda5a9c50e82

Friend,

Since the launch of our campaign, our fundraising team has stayed true to our commitment to treating you differently than other campaigns.

When we reach out asking for help, it's because we're honest with you about needing support in critical moments.

Right now, we're facing THE most critical moment this campaign has faced yet. The Iowa Caucuses are on January 15th, and we're asking for your help today.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1194e982c4b9b7b3509c4f3bcb0b0c3617fb95242f70f81ddd300619ae038b3e7468554afa4c91b1fedd56d89f124ecff502b49dbd127473f013c75f30c85041
Chip in $25 or more before midnight to help us hit our critical fundraising goal!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1194e982c4b9b7b3509c4f3bcb0b0c3617fb95242f70f81ddd300619ae038b3e7468554afa4c91b1fedd56d89f124ecff502b49dbd127473f013c75f30c85041
DONATE $25

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1194e982c4b9b7b31467d6d8578e40f1ab7b15fba38de6422c18656c9d1cafb399cf3b78d97491f51d672f585b131fa2c76e6787daf37a67a962db3229a92236
DONATE $47

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1194e982c4b9b7b37a31966942860416b24f4503ab8efe36274c0c06fdb55c78a01d26edf21ca9c1a1e89218952fbb6be1b8428ed9a1c32939a6147de4c305b2
DONATE $100

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1194e982c4b9b7b318096802b870f2fe2e0574565e1987384ca6dd37d7a7c31e3837d1541988039a1b4cd665f084fa9cb9df191edc08ba60205ddda5a9c50e82
DONATE ANY AMOUNT

If you've seen any of our messages this week, you know that we have a grassroots fundraising goal of raising $37,000 every day until the Iowa Caucuses. This is what we need to close the gap, friend. This is where we NEED you to step in.

If every grassroots donor on our team pitched in $20, we would finish this race with every resource we need to WIN in January at the Iowa Caucus, win at the New Hampshire primary, and go on to win for this country next November.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1194e982c4b9b7b34abe4e5e8c8dd4faa65206b15d5b9d9e948cbde0a50b54c6cc526df3691ba140fb3b3f8db16576ab958715693492b7237beb6eb6bc64fc90
Make a Difference. Chip in $20

We have until January 15th. We cannot allow our support to dwindle when there is this much on the line.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1194e982c4b9b7b318096802b870f2fe2e0574565e1987384ca6dd37d7a7c31e3837d1541988039a1b4cd665f084fa9cb9df191edc08ba60205ddda5a9c50e82

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1194e982c4b9b7b3bc8a56f69189b4d7155613ae5664b04dbe0b141df6ca2528a3cb9c4aa0c42a6f19aaaefbedbeb5fae18912fc9e2ea7a8ab2e5f4805580ad9
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1194e982c4b9b7b3c4024f6b74f5c38c6bf98e5b488bbeb9e9617af2ebbed3b4a945d59c4edfc0a52548c5c406566bad7bb5499cf817ae466eebc5b914fda031
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1194e982c4b9b7b318096802b870f2fe2e0574565e1987384ca6dd37d7a7c31e3837d1541988039a1b4cd665f084fa9cb9df191edc08ba60205ddda5a9c50e82

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1194e982c4b9b7b318096802b870f2fe2e0574565e1987384ca6dd37d7a7c31e3837d1541988039a1b4cd665f084fa9cb9df191edc08ba60205ddda5a9c50e82

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.
