subject: Should we abolish the Electoral College?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
Peter, five presidents in history, including Donald Trump, captured enough Electoral College votes to win the election, but actually lost in the popular vote. In fact, in 2016, Hillary Clinton walked away with nearly 3 million more votes than Trump.
This system should trouble us all! The fate of our nation's leadership should not be left to chance or complicated electoral calculations.
Prominent elected officials, like Representative Jamie Raskin, have voiced their support for dismantling the Electoral College:
https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240103_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917 [https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240103_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
Please take 30 seconds right now to tell us before midnight: [https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240103_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
Should we abolish the Electoral College?
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240103_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240103_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
The Electoral College allows minority rule, bypassing basic democratic principles. It favors white and rural areas, reducing the value of more diverse populations and minorities.
Above all, the Electoral College ensures that only a handful of swing states receive any attention during the presidential race.
One person should equal one vote.
To gauge the pulse of our community, we need 294 more responses from PA. Let your voice be heard: Should we abolish the Electoral College? [https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240103_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
Thank you for your participation,
Defeat Republicans

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: $25 so we never have to go back to how you felt when Trump was elected
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Remember that feeling you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016? | | |
---
Peter -- We want you to remember something. Really remember as we begin this election year. Remember that feeling you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016. Remember walking around in disbelief and fear of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. Now remember how you felt after Joe Biden was elected president in 2020. Remember that relief you felt that we didn’t have to deal with Trump in office any longer, and the hope you felt that we could get America back on track. We can’t go back. We can’t go back to the way we all felt when Trump was elected. Whether it’s him or any other Republican...we can’t go back. It may be wild to think, but you have a role in making sure we win. The work we need to do is quite literally funded by people like you making the decision that we can’t go back...we can only go forward. Now we don’t expect you to donate every day, but with President Biden facing millions in attack ads, he needs you to make today the day you donate. So, please: [**Can President Biden count on you to contribute $5, $10, or whatever you can afford to give us an extra push at the beginnning of this election year? clean_body: Remember that feeling you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016? | | | Peter -- We want you to remember something. Really remember as we begin this election year. Remember that feeling you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016. Remember walking around in disbelief and fear of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. Now remember how you felt after Joe Biden was elected president in 2020. Remember that relief you felt that we didn’t have to deal with Trump in office any longer, and the hope you felt that we could get America back on track. We can’t go back. We can’t go back to the way we all felt when Trump was elected. Whether it’s him or any other Republican...we can’t go back. It may be wild to think, but you have a role in making sure we win. The work we need to do is quite literally funded by people like you making the decision that we can’t go back...we can only go forward. Now we don’t expect you to donate every day, but with President Biden facing millions in attack ads, he needs you to make today the day you donate. So, please: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you. You are securing the future of our country with your support. That’s the truth. Team Joe

name: Democrats Win Seats
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC
body:
| Peter – you did it!

We put out a call to step up and help defend Democrats in our most competitive seats ahead of our FEC filing deadline — and you answered the call.

Thank you!

To win this year, we’ve got to keep working hard to ensure more Democrats win seats in Congress. Just a few more votes in key states could turn the House Blue.

As you get started with your New Year’s resolutions, consider becoming a founding election 2024 donor on our team and stay in the loop on our work for a more equal, just and free America. Hey Friend! I wanted to personally reach out and **express my sincere gratitude for your support during our last fundraising deadline of 2023, and also to wish you a happy New Year** \- one filled with joy, good health, and _most importantly peace._
---
During this pivotal year, we have the opportunity to push our shared vision for Oklahoma forward. This isn’t just about winning an election, it’s about **taking this seat back and restoring authentic leadership** that we both know Oklahomans are craving and deserve - but only with your help. I believe in a brighter future for our state, the place we all love and call home. I believe in what is possible for our country when we work together. I hope you continue to share this belief with me. 2023’s Congress was the most ineffective in modern history. It’s time for a shift in who runs this country. Not more politicians who serve their own interests and party, but leaders who have served others their entire lives. Our whole state, even the whole country, knows this, it’s in the air. Can’t you feel it? Together Friend, we can seize this moment. Not next year, not “next time around”, but right now, in 2024, we have an opportunity - no, an obligation - to seize this moment so we restore hope, in the American Dream. Your belief in our shared vision remains the foundation of our campaign. If you haven't had the chance to contribute to our vision yet, it's not too late. Every bit of support brings us closer to our goal. name: Mark Warner
subject: Kick off the new year by sending Democrat Tina Younger to the General Assembly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
that’s right, Derek, we can still expand our majority in the Virginia Senate

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76391808/447396650/-1201387570?refcode=mw_em_240103_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGEzNDZmMi00Y2FhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abpBLTUGm5Kk3RPx1XMpa48sQUDIeAssUDZuk0dao7E=) Derek, Far too often, folks write off the rural areas of Virginia, claiming that Democrats can’t possibly win there. But I know that competing _everywhere_ and investing _everything_ we can in these rural races is key to improving the lives of all Virginians. **That’s why I’m proud to support Tina Younger, who is running for Virginia’s 9th District Senate seat in a special election on Tuesday, January 9.** There’s a few reasons why **__[I’m asking you to support Tina’s campaign today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76391818/447396658/-1201387570?refcode=mw_em_240103_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGEzNDZmMi00Y2FhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abpBLTUGm5Kk3RPx1XMpa48sQUDIeAssUDZuk0dao7E=)__** ... First, while Virginia Democrats successfully held onto our Senate majority last November, our majority will be smaller than it was last year. Winning this race would get us back to 22 seats. One more seat under Democratic control means one more Democratic vote in the General Assembly for commonsense policies. Secondly, winning this race shows the GOP that Democrats aren’t scared to make inroads in Republican districts. Sure, it might not be easy, but it is possible. And flipping a seat in Southside Virginia will help our Democrats open the 2024 legislative session with even more momentum. And the third reason **__[I’m asking you to donate towards Tina’s campaign ahead of the special election next Tuesday](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76391825/447396660/-1201387570?refcode=mw_em_240103_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGEzNDZmMi00Y2FhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abpBLTUGm5Kk3RPx1XMpa48sQUDIeAssUDZuk0dao7E=)__** is because I wholeheartedly believe she is exactly what the 9th district and our state needs. From a very early age, Tina realized that too many of our leaders weren’t putting people before politics and as a result, lives weren’t being changed. Since then, she’s spent her entire life stepping up to rectify that. And now she’s stepping up in rural Virginia, running to safeguard women’s health, protect and expand voting rights, and prioritize education for the next generation. **__[Help change lives and pitch in to elect Tina Younger and expand our majority in the Virginia Senate>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76391831/447396665/-1201387570?refcode=mw_em_240103_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGEzNDZmMi00Y2FhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abpBLTUGm5Kk3RPx1XMpa48sQUDIeAssUDZuk0dao7E=)__** Thank you, Mark Warner ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76391843/447396672/-1201387570?refcode=mw_em_240103_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGEzNDZmMi00Y2FhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abpBLTUGm5Kk3RPx1XMpa48sQUDIeAssUDZuk0dao7E=)********

body:
| | | It's Sen. Schumer.

I'm between meetings, so I'll make this quick: Your name is on our list of inactive Democratic memberships for January, and I need to make sure you activate your membership before the midnight deadline.

If we want to save the Senate and stop Mitch McConnell** _again_** , we need to begin laying the groundwork immediately. Voting rights, reproductive justice, President Biden's judicial nominees, and our ultra-slim Democratic majority are all on the line. We can't afford for anyone to sit on the sidelines!

**Your membership has never been more critical. Please, use this custom link to activate right now:**

name: Blake Dellinger
subject: Laura needs your help!
body:
Friends,

In just over one month, ballots will start arriving in voters' mailboxes. This is a HUGE make-or-break month for us, so I'm reaching out to see if you can help Laura win the CA-30 race.

We're asking everyone who signed up to volunteer on our campaign to pick at least one (of course the more the better) day to either make calls or canvass for Laura!

[**Use this form to****sign up**](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScbj5Ky3M-QbSqh9W1Z-C_F0-PGp7AGdKKkU4KlMmfMXi5vow/viewform) for specific days or to schedule your own activities.

If you want to share with your friends, you can have them sign up anytime at **[www.LauraForCongress.org/Volunteer](http://www.lauraforcongress.org/Volunteer)**.

If you have any questions, please feel free to email us anytime. We look forward to seeing you on the phones and in the field!

Thank you,
Blake Dellinger
Laura Friedman for Congress

name: Team Dean
subject: Thank you for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
**** Thank you to the many of you who stepped up to support Mad before the year-end FEC deadline. You know how important these moments are in building a foundation for this critical election year — we’re excited to tell you we hit our goal together.

Grassroots power will be critical as we prepare for whatever this election has coming. And after the rollercoaster of 2023, we know we’ve got to be ready to activate at any moment.

**That’s why we’re _doing everything we can right now_ to secure the support to take back the gavel from the GOP in November, and you’re a big part of that effort.**

With the petition period just around the corner, we’re gearing up now to get Mad on the ballot and defend her seat, and we want to make sure you stay up with the latest from our team on how you can be a part of it.

Keep up with everything we’ve got going on at Team Dean by following Mad on **[X (Twitter)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76395508/447405415/-398328110?refcode=01032024_md_midmonthty_fr_1&refcode2=ecca8121-51aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2NhODEyMS01MWFhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YtEbjmY5kX__-STvLfAMcTsDBZI6QR90B9GmNDezFVU=&emci=7156369b-99a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ecca8121-51aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=36373569),** **[Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76395516/447405422/-956499575?refcode=01032024_md_midmonthty_fr_1&refcode2=ecca8121-51aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2NhODEyMS01MWFhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YtEbjmY5kX__-STvLfAMcTsDBZI6QR90B9GmNDezFVU=&emci=7156369b-99a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ecca8121-51aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=36373569),** or **[Facebook.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76395522/447405432/-75716163?refcode=01032024_md_midmonthty_fr_1&refcode2=ecca8121-51aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2NhODEyMS01MWFhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YtEbjmY5kX__-STvLfAMcTsDBZI6QR90B9GmNDezFVU=&emci=7156369b-99a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ecca8121-51aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=36373569)**

Thank you and Happy 2024,

Team Dean

P.S. As we mentioned, the time to collect signatures to get Mad on the ballot is coming up! **[Sign up to learn more about how you can help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76395527/447405438/-892106437?usp=sf_link&refcode=01032024_md_midmonthty_fr_1&refcode2=ecca8121-51aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2NhODEyMS01MWFhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YtEbjmY5kX__-STvLfAMcTsDBZI6QR90B9GmNDezFVU=&emci=7156369b-99a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ecca8121-51aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=36373569)**
* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_ _We are excited to have you on Team Dean! clean_body: ** Thank you to the many of you who stepped up to support Mad before the year-end FEC deadline. You know how important these moments are in building a foundation for this critical election year — we’re excited to tell you we hit our goal together. Grassroots power will be critical as we prepare for whatever this election has coming. And after the rollercoaster of 2023, we know we’ve got to be ready to activate at any moment. That’s why we’re doing everything we can right now to secure the support to take back the gavel from the GOP in November, and you’re a big part of that effort. With the petition period just around the corner, we’re gearing up now to get Mad on the ballot and defend her seat, and we want to make sure you stay up with the latest from our team on how you can be a part of it. Keep up with everything we’ve got going on at Team Dean by following Mad on , , or Thank you and Happy 2024, Team Dean P.S. As we mentioned, the time to collect signatures to get Mad on the ballot is coming up! Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress. We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. Peter, this is only the beginning. Republicans know they can't win this year unless they suppress the will of the people, and that's _exactly_ what they're trying to do.
We must fight back against these voter suppression attempts – and to do that as effectively as possible, we need to know how top Democrats like _you_ prefer to vote.

subject: January 6th wasn’t the first time we saw Josh Hawley run away from his duty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
[1]Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate

Peter,

After his actions on January 6th, Josh Hawley became the most unpopular
Republican U.S. Senator up for re-election in 2024. But that’s hardly the
first time we’ve seen Hawley run away from his duty.

So before I ask you to [ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42167?refcode=em20240103-4523&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=4523%2E614464%2EZ18qZm ]join our grassroots movement to
replace him by adding a donation of any amount today, please let me
explain:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42167?refcode=em20240103-4523&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=4523%2E614464%2EZ18qZm ]Approval Ratings | U.S. Senate — Public Polling By Morning Consult of
2024 GOP Senate Incumbents — Ted Cruz (TX): 48%, March 2022 | 48%, July
2023 | 48%, October 2023 — Rick Scott (FL): 49%, March 2022 | 47%, July
2023 | 46%, October 2023 — Josh Hawley (MO): 46%, March 2022 | 44%, July
2023, 43%, October 2023

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42167?refcode=em20240103-4523&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=4523%2E614464%2EZ18qZm ]CHIP IN TO BEAT HAWLEY →

With the freedom to control our own lives and bodies under attack, Josh
Hawley has turned his Senate office into a family business dedicated to
corrupting our courts and criminalizing abortion nationwide.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42167?refcode=em20240103-4523&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=4523%2E614464%2EZ18qZm ]Excerpt from LifeSite: 'I would support any restriction on abortion...
And I would vigorously defend such laws in court, all the way to the
Supreme Court, if necessary.' - Josh Hawley. Vanity Fair headline: Erin
Morrow Hawley is leading the charge to ban abortion medication. She's also
Josh Hawley's wife. Federal judge overseeing the lawsuit made a past
donation to Josh Hawley's campaign. Fox News headline: Missouri
Republicans propose legislation to allow women who receive abortions to be
charged with murder.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42167?refcode=em20240103-4523&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=4523%2E614464%2EZ18qZm ]CHIP IN TO BEAT HAWLEY →

When veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits were counting on
Hawley to vote for the healthcare we’ve earned, he played politics.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42167?refcode=em20240103-4523&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=4523%2E614464%2EZ18qZm ]Yahoo News headline: Blunt, Hawley vote to stall bill expanding health
care for veterans exposed to burn pits. Fox News op-ed written by Lucas
Kunce: I was exposed to toxic burn pits in Iraq; Republicans turned their
backs on veterans like me.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42167?refcode=em20240103-4523&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1007&akid=4523%2E614464%2EZ18qZm ]CHIP IN TO BEAT HAWLEY →

And when Missouri’s working families and everyday communities were getting
gutted by outsourcing and corporate consolidation, Josh helped Wall Street
and Corporate America cut overtime pay for hundreds of thousands of
Missouri workers.

Now, Missourians are taking notice. They don’t like what they’ve seen from
Hawley. Even Donald Trump knows Josh is in trouble.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42167?refcode=em20240103-4523&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1008&akid=4523%2E614464%2EZ18qZm ]Newsweek headline: Trump warns... Hawley may be in trouble. Excerpt
from Spectrum News article: A recent Morning Consult poll found Hawley was
the least popular Republican senator up for reelection... Former Missouri
secretary of state Jason Kander argued in a Kansas City Star op-ed this
week: 'Hawley is vulnerable, and he knows it.'

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42167?refcode=em20240103-4523&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1009&akid=4523%2E614464%2EZ18qZm ]CHIP IN TO BEAT HAWLEY →

Our state deserves a U.S. Senator who we can trust will stand up and fight
for working people, not for himself. That’s why I’m running against Hawley
this year — and it’s why our record-breaking, worker-led, and
people-powered movement has already made this a margin-of-error race in
multiple public polls.

I want to be a warrior for working people in the U.S. Senate, but I need
your help to make it happen,
Peter: [ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42167?refcode=em20240103-4523&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1010&akid=4523%2E614464%2EZ18qZm ]will you chip in $10
or whatever you can toward my grassroots campaign today so we can defeat
Josh Hawley in November and take this Senate seat back for everyday
Missourians?

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your
contribution instantly:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42168?refcode=em20240103-4523&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1011&akid=4523%2E614464%2EZ18qZm ]Contribute $10

I didn’t learn the meaning of sacrifice and commitment from working late
nights in the boardrooms of a corporate law firm like Josh Hawley did. I
joined the Marine Corps to honor and serve the community that took care of
my family after we were bankrupted by my littlest sister’s medical bills.

We’ve both taken an oath. But unlike Josh, I haven’t broken mine.

Over the last year, we’ve built a record-breaking, worker-led,
people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley and take this Senate seat
back for Missouri’s working families.

We’ve united organized labor behind our campaign. We’ve held events with
hundreds of supporters at a time across rural, urban, and suburban
Missouri. And we’ve raised more in the first year of a U.S. Senate race
than any other challenger has in Missouri history, with donations coming
from every single Missouri county — and without a cent from corporate
PACs.

name: Team Cori
subject: Ceasefire in the new year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Add your name to the ceasefire now resolution | |

Peter, ******** While many of us got to spend the end of the year re-energizing, relaxing, and celebrating with loved ones, Palestinians in Gaza continued to suffer at the hands of the Israeli military. **Over the last two months, more than 22,000 Palestinians have been killed in Gaza** , 70% of whom are women and children. That is a devastating loss of human life. In this new year, we must recommit ourselves towards the call for a ceasefire and an end to this horrific violence. We cannot bomb our way to peace—**we must keep pushing for diplomatic solutions. We need a permanent ceasefire NOW.** [Add your name to our petition demanding a ceasefire now so that we can continue to save lives and de-escalate](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm0MvZGkJ0TeUlEPpD-vUxfVVXdd7aWN63EN23ffHhPgI_oGsDcfdqMXqfb4_khRd6bmqq6DdunkysRCsFwguDw4Nf94B9LZdM0nCBUGON_9qh3mBNiW9cWjji-8h4gItTb_j6fRmD2t9tqXTZ_SLp_X39sxZ91r75mmlRalSWPD0TKiXD-L1yPcLf2fDHoA5Hc1qta8k04aa3ANE_bKSRAQtjAEztjzoY4KKNn5x269wd0qquWP1Jvo38uLfONlvNl5uJIqUOkyuJ_KUzLSq_I/42o/x6JGwQaZTB2ViHJyKE7AZQ/h0/DM9GpbUzaW6m2I9llHSsvPzNU1Lp_TaYbhr6o4Mvxv8) **[ADD YOUR NAME TO THE CEASEFIRE RESOLUTION >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm0MvZGkJ0TeUlEPpD-vUxfVVXdd7aWN63EN23ffHhPgI_oGsDcfdqMXqfb4_khRd6qYKjRyW9W8PF2Dqacua6L-gJOO2I474YteIiKmYAqMvDPalDAUeC8w79Pt98DxUp6shcrfUQjDsZ8DNxYmCNuSPBRHv9pKlfobhYEtu96Ay4_k-NAcofXMUPtZqT1aAv2SPNorfplmlV2bUH20R2N2GbGYD5sUmcLF2BY48QYhD2wy9Hi1mPu1ELRjqvcui6gQdNc1yukWV5Y1QDZQhb1/42o/x6JGwQaZTB2ViHJyKE7AZQ/h1/y0xcItqUBgG40kzfSJdgKzir1gNBJYcOqHnR63f0WE8) **

body:

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Thank you, team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=992%2E135344%2E8jw_X6)

Friends,
First of all, I'd like to wish you and yours a Happy New Year. I hope you get some time to relax and reflect, spend time with family and friends, and enjoy some well-deserved time off after a long year.
I'd also like to say THANK YOU.
You are an essential part of this team. Your involvement means a lot not only to me personally, but also to the success of our campaign.
I know we sent a lot of fundraising requests before our important FEC deadline. And that is because it is contributions from people like you that make this campaign possible. I don’t take corporate PAC money – so it really will come down to people like you funding this campaign.
Soon we will file our official FEC report where every campaign has to announce how much money we've raised as well as how many contributions our campaign has received.
I hope the numbers we report will make you proud to be a part of this grassroots team. Because there is only one way we are going to have the resources to defend this Senate seat, and that is from lots of people contributing what they can.
This FEC fundraising deadline was a very big moment for our campaign. As you know, the Michigan Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive in the entire country. There are four credible candidates running on the Republican side, and we need to be ready to face any one of them in November. And once our fundraising numbers become public, both our allies and our opponents are going to look at them to determine whether we are building the kind of campaign that can hold onto this Senate seat for Democrats.
I am very heartened by the level of support this campaign has received so far. What we are doing is showing that when we come together around a vision for passionate, pragmatic leadership in Washington, we can achieve incredible things.
Once again, I am extremely thankful that you are a part of this team.
I'm excited to start a new chapter in 2024, and even more excited that we get to do it together.
Happy New Year,
Elissa Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=992%2E135344%2E8jw_X6).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=992%2E135344%2E8jw_X6)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Antisemitism Alerts via RJC
subject: Some Dems still can’t condemn Hamas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican Jewish Coalition
body:
Antisemitism has reached a new high within the Democratic Party

| |
---
| | | Friend, this must be addressed.

**Antisemitism has reached a new high within the Democratic Party thanks to enabling from extreme hard-left progressives, who would rather side with a terrorist organization than the only democracy in the Middle East.**

---

name: Blue Florida 2024
subject: just the tip of the iceberg
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
this is what Rick Scott doesn't want you to know
| | |
---
Look, Rick Scott is a fraud.
He proudly wears his Navy baseball cap at every opportunity: photo ops, interviews, and even in his new attack ad. **But the truth is that Rick Scott made a FORTUNE while his company defrauded the health insurance provider for _millions_ of active duty service members, veterans, and their families.**
Rick Scott resigned from his role, pled the Fifth, walked away with zero consequences, and used the massive fortune he made to jumpstart his political career.
And that's just the tip of the iceberg. Rick Scott has made a political career out of lying to voters while getting richer and richer behind the scenes.
He _claims_ to support working families, but he wrote the plan to end Medicare and Social Security. He _claims_ to be a proud American, but he's undermined our democracy by pushing Donald Trump's Big Lie about the 2020 election. **He _claims_ to be a public servant, but he's shown us time and time again that, in reality, he only serves himself. **
**This year, we have the chance to defeat him: Democrat Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is fighting to flip this seat blue****and polling shows****that this race is already a tie![But Rick Scott is ready to shell out millions to retake the lead, so Debbie needs grassroots donors like you to stand with her during this critical fundraising moment. clean_body: this is what Rick Scott doesn't want you to know | | | Look, Rick Scott is a fraud. He proudly wears his Navy baseball cap at every opportunity: photo ops, interviews, and even in his new attack ad. But the truth is that Rick Scott made a FORTUNE while his company defrauded the health insurance provider for millions of active duty service members, veterans, and their families. Rick Scott resigned from his role, pled the Fifth, walked away with zero consequences, and used the massive fortune he made to jumpstart his political career. And that's just the tip of the iceberg. Rick Scott has made a political career out of lying to voters while getting richer and richer behind the scenes. He claims to support working families, but he wrote the plan to end Medicare and Social Security. He claims to be a proud American, but he's undermined our democracy by pushing Donald Trump's Big Lie about the 2020 election. He claims to be a public servant, but he's shown us time and time again that, in reality, he only serves himself. name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: 🚨 Breaking News: NH Senate GOP release 2024 Legislative Priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Hampshire Senate Republicans PAC
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMzg0MjY4Nzk4MjcxMTY2MjgyJmM9ZzdhMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0xMjY0OTYyMjUxJmQ9ZDdwMW02ZA==.Gz6FzizE_j2R45LumYoC8Lg5Rjyn8uU2rXy8StUJCxA)

| |

| Friend, ICYMI, this morning at a press conference in the Legislative Office Building in Concord, the NH Senate Republicans released their 2024 Legislative Priority Agenda. Read it below or [here](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMzg0MjY4Nzk4MjcxMTY2MjgyJmM9ZzdhMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0xMjY0OTYyMjU0JmQ9dDJ5MXUybA==.AnTezmN1He3lJY4FPf0oWD-X3H1JoPXhqhSlV11J6co):
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **2024 NH Senate Republican Priorities**
---
---
| |
---
| **Keeping Our Communities Safe** We will fight to keep New Hampshire the safest place to live in the nation, avoiding the chaos hitting so many other states. Keeping every Granite Stater safe is a huge priority, and that is why we will be focusing on the following: · Instituting bail reform to ensure violent and repeat offenders are seen by a judge before being released · Blocking sanctuary cities in New Hampshire · Protecting the Norther Border Alliance’s ability to stop drug smuggling and human trafficking into New Hampshire through trespassing reform · Prohibiting the People’s Republic of China from purchasing land near military facilities · Passing mandatory minimum sentences for trafficking and distributing large quantities of Fentanyl · Strengthening penalties for DWI · Considering bonding for a new Men’s Prison **Empowering Parents** · Continuing to improve and protect Education Freedom Accounts and school choice · Fighting for a Parental Bill of Rights to ensure parents know everything their children are doing in school · Continuing to keep parents informed and involved in decisions regarding their children’s health care and mental health treatment **Investing in our Students** · Providing communities with property tax relief by sending state aid to local school districts through the Student-Centered Education Funding Formula, which increased by $169 million over the biennium and 31% increase over the next 10 years · Fighting against judicial overreach that ignores our Student-Centered Education Funding Formula and mandates the spending of over half a billion dollars · Continuing to invest in New Hampshire students and schools by providing funds to school building aid and the public-school infrastructure fund **Protecting Our Wallets** · No Sales Tax, no Income Tax, no Capital Gains Tax, and no higher taxes · Blocking policies that will hurt workers and drive-up costs for small businesses · Protecting business tax cuts that have grown the economy resulting in budget surpluses · Blocking efforts to re-establish an Interest and Dividends tax · Ensuring any changes to the New Hampshire Retirement System are sustainable, affordable, and do not impact property taxpayers · Protecting Republican policies that have resulted in New Hampshire having \- 3rd lowest unemployment in the country \- Lowest poverty rate in the country \- Revenue surplus of over $500 million \- Ranked #1 for Economic Freedom by the Fraser Institute \- Ranked the Freest State in America by the Cato Institute **Delivering Property Tax Relief** Senate Republicans will continue to protect local property taxpayers, building on the state aid provided in last year’s budget. · Increasing state aid to local schools by $169 million over the biennium, $100 million for Building Aid, and $20 million for CTE renovations · Increasing Rooms and Meals revenue to cities and towns by more than $100 million, a 90% increase since FY2020-21. · Increasing state aid for: \- Water and wastewater infrastructure \- Affordable housing \- Local police and firefighters \- Municipal highway and bridge grants **Supporting our Main Street Businesses** · Continuing to streamline the licensing process · Establishing an Office of Regulatory Efficiency and Oversight to review regulations and reduce bureaucracy · Streamlining disaster relief programs to get aid to communities faster · Protect the gains we achieved on lowering business taxes and workers compensation costs **Health Care** · Protecting the hugely successful Granite Advantage program, which helped lower health insurance premiums, and is widely supported by the business community, the social services community, and by families across the state who benefit from it · Improving incentives to attract and retain trained health care professionals to help the health care field combat the workforce shortage crisis · Increasing transparency of Pharmacy Benefit Managers · Renewing and revamping the Medicaid drug rebate program to benefit consumers · Protecting consumers by ensuring that third party contributions count towards their insurance deductibles · Expanding screening for cytomegalovirus in newborns **Mental Health** · Increasing the number of available mental health beds · Continuing the implementation of the secure therapeutic youth development center in Hampstead to serve the needs of juveniles with behavioral problems while ensuring public safety and appropriate commitment to payments in lieu of taxes to the host community · Continuing to support building the new $40 million forensic psychiatric hospital **Energy and the Environment** · Providing assistance to farmers who have experienced major crop loss in 2023 · Remediating damage to recreational vehicle trails in the North Country · Continuing to improve and expand net metering · Continuing to improve water quality in New Hampshire and support clean water initiatives including efforts to reduce PFOAS and cyanobacteria contamination · Lowering the cost of fees for Granite Stater’s to visit our State Parks · Encouraging new energy resources in New Hampshire **The New Hampshire Primary and Election Integrity** · Passing a state constitutional amendment to ensure that New Hampshire remains the First in the Nation Primary State · Updating state law to authorize the use of improved voting machines · Create and fund an election information portal to maximize transparency in local elections **Promoting Affordable Housing** · Doubling dedicated funding for the Affordable Housing Fund through the Real Estate Transfer Tax · Implementing the InvestNH program to develop affordable workforce housing · Addressing bureaucratic hurdles that stifle housing development **Always Maintain the New Hampshire Advantage** · Opposing an income tax, a sales tax, or a capital gains tax in our Live Free or Die state CHIP IN BELOW TO HELP PROTECT THE NH REPUBLICAN SENATE MAJORITY IN 2024:
---
---
| |
---
| | [Donate $10](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMzg0MjY4Nzk4MjcxMTY2MjgyJmM9ZzdhMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0xMjY0OTYyMjYwJmQ9cjBuNmgzYg==.TnLHtV_CUx1DyFk5OrlvXJxNiSVcJ_KdZ6a0iXR39_8)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: This is what environmental racism looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

The proposed Rio Grande LNG (“liquid” natural gas) terminal in Brownsville is a clear case of environmental racism with disastrous consequences for community health, Indigenous rights, endangered species, and our shared climate. Yet major insurers like Chubb, Liberty Mutual, and Sompo have continued to insure the pipeline and other methane production.

Sign the petition: Stop insuring Rio Grande LNG. [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/sign-and-send-this-urgent-petition-stop-insuring-rio-grande-lng-now-2?source=2023RGLNG_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fran-rio-grande-lng-petition-swap]

Sign the Petition [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/sign-and-send-this-urgent-petition-stop-insuring-rio-grande-lng-now-2?source=2023RGLNG_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fran-rio-grande-lng-petition-swap]

Methane gas has more than 80 times the warming power of carbon dioxide over the first 20 years after it reaches the atmosphere. Because it is highly volatile, methane gas pipelines pose especially dangerous explosion risks.

Meanwhile, the region’s indigenous Carrizo/Comecrudo Tribe of Texas has not provided their Free Prior and Informed Consent (FPIC) for Rio Grande LNG. Building the Brownsville terminal violates their right to self-governance and perpetuates the displacement, pollution, and physical harm of impacted communities.

We can’t allow fossil fuel profits to take priority over a livable planet. Nor can we force some of our nation’s most vulnerable communities to bear the brunt of the environmental damage these projects create.

Tell insurers: Listen to impacted communities and publicly drop Rio Grande LNG before the insurance renewal. [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/sign-and-send-this-urgent-petition-stop-insuring-rio-grande-lng-now-2?source=2023RGLNG_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fran-rio-grande-lng-petition-swap]

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20240103-rio-grande-lng]

https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]

Ro for Congress
P.O Box 3513
Santa Clara, CA 95051
United States

body:

| | | Friend,

It's a new year, but I unfortunately have some bad news.

I truly hate to come to you with this on today of all days.

_**Laying**_**EVERYTHING** _**on the line right here and now:**_

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu9ao5417vgrvejh39rm5hk0go6o3eh9qstgtago_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj4cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” **
Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg3a7vtlo3ncmpd603gremla4d7prr40ikuabk60_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj4cjh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcca1oluplsvr91988a08ckg43g8pdj5s19mchv0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj4cjh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Pro Life Update
---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Read this before you end your day
body:
With less than two weeks until the first votes take place, I want to share a personal note with you.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze5ng5irbmrkp12iakdpsujev3834m00dboh4aq8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs)
---

Friend,

With less than two weeks until the first votes take place, I want to share a personal note with you.

**[After you finish reading, please consider sending a donation to help fuel my campaign before the first votes take place in just two weeks.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9t23bl6c35fe1pcgq86k21iv1s463govc413lso_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs "After you finish reading, please consider sending a donation to help fuel my campaign before the first votes take place in just two weeks. ")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for president, I've been blessed with a team of supporters like you who've been there every step of the way.

Running for president isn't easy. There's little sleep, lots of travel, and the higher you rise in the polls, the more attacks there are to fend off.

**I 'm running for president because we have a country to save**, and I've been reminded of how important that is every step of the way.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbe0equc3gtk2c7c7s5o6hmkbsmjg45urp8m0q4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs)
---

A few months after I launched my campaign, I dropped my husband, Michael, who is a combat veteran, off at 4 am for another year-long deployment. I watched him and 230 soldiers pick up their two duffle bags of belongings to go to a country they have never been to, all in the name of protecting America. **If they are willing to protect us from there, we should be willing to fight for America here.**

I'm running because I want my husband and his military brothers and sisters to know that their sacrifice means something - _that we do love this country._

I'm also running for president because I want my kids and our future generations to experience everything the American Dream has to offer.

I'm blessed to have amazing kids. My daughter, Rena, has been there at every debate, cheering me on.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztsgpn3mrf793jn1kaocaoiuiinklkhk57cs9h50_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs)
---

My son, Nalin, makes time over his college breaks to join me on the campaign trail - in fact, he was with me in Iowa this past weekend.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp6munu1vuo3hn0ga3kf8fjrinuvbilngf4918go_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs)
---

But I also know that times are tough, and America can be doing so much better. Earlier this year, I watched my daughter, Rena, marry her high school sweetheart. It was a joyous occasion. But, I also watched how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6ggbsl1f07q20dg0bpj6dvapt9npqa3mjope5vo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs)
---

Last year, I dropped my son, Nalin, off at college for his senior year at Villanova. I know that he shouldn't have to write papers he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zihh1nlrnb8uvak5g3ia7gnp1ndvf4i0eoc77st8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs)
---

**We 've got a country to save. Together, we can save her. It's why I'm running for president.**

_**And it 's why I haven't stopped fighting for a single moment.**_

I've held **over 180 campaign events** where I shake every hand, meet every voter, and answer every question.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8didi98pi6unfoj5s8h1jpskvlaki2kacs5covg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs)
---

I've **won four debates** and we still have more to come.

I've surged to **second in the polls** and I am within **striking distance of winning New Hampshire.**

We have a scrappy but amazing campaign team, we're spending our money wisely, and we're pouring our all into each and every day.

**But, I also have to give credit to people like you who have supported my campaign every step of the way._Grassroots supporters are the reason we are closer than ever to VICTORY. _**

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0l06fv95shfkvdei8hvmp0hio87jd34iuc6brm0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs)
---

Now, we have less than two weeks until the first votes take place in Iowa. And then, 8 days later, New Hampshire will go to the polls.

We can't waste a single moment. Not when the future of our country is on the line.

**[So will you please step up with a generous donation to help fuel this critical stretch of my campaign and amplify our get out the vote efforts ahead of the first-in-the-nation caucuses in just two weeks?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi63tsqdlj448cim1973glv97775mghkjggha9rg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs "So will you please step up with a generous donation to help fuel this critical stretch of my campaign and amplify our get out the vote efforts ahead of the first-in-the-nation caucuses in just two weeks?")**

_**Whether it 's $5 or $100, your donation will go a long way in helping us win the fight to save our future.**_

Thank you for everything.

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z340bf82rf8a1ia91eu3rpi88n9ufqndpsm3m2oo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley

---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8m6pdv6o5ssdps9kb7v3e0q8n5tikeps73sr2a0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0dhm7l9ttona4o79r7m3gghro15ud8ph1iu3eeo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg8u1b2043ijqga48tbkd827k6esnhi9td29aek0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlkt19bknphoqnr9lao3faavjh0pvnu9finvuc48_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk0bh63d7gg308mo8g46c8b98q44prnqf87ugcao_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs "DONATE")
---
| | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc.

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6vis0har6b26s5dnbfiqimhvejqbf483kjgd0t8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs)
---

**By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. [Terms and conditions](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi9cjfcqtdgv8o8bfetfkjuki3t2j6gd9b8eb8jg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs) and [Privacy Policy](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9ha4ajq7bagsgs1t2qqg9s3om5akcb7pbec9tj8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs).apply. You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. [Privacy Policy](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9uf4l4tf0knbfq47n8ke75r629fms6u7ospsbi0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs). [Terms and conditions](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8dbgvshl0rj4l954ldaqmvr35dekkdc9v828d1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cpi69oj2chh2bs).

Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals.

Daniel Island, SC 29492

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Made special just for YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
A gift for my FIRST supporters of the 2024 election year!
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU-PmzAQxT-NuYHssbHJgUNTK4fNtlXVQ_9cImMPyaywQWAWbT99RZT0-ntPo_fTuDgN1H-0zBwZwI3CwgCY_MQAzur466s-_zzbMr7-5qXVtdr2FD4zgPwx4f_q40qF0dGwU2OL0IJvwPsCW2G4klwcjC5urRFaQtc04DxK4XltuqYGNL3oDq7XvKAWOCguuBRGgIKqrmsjlAKFHQePPVN8o1SFMbkhvOV5jVPlx1gM7S3nablPOjE4LejXGauN0oxhb-zMvWPpIs7kXfk2Usplv6YwO1ooXUs_xkg5IzI4JT90TdN10B2MbzQ0vWDytOZ4iRhojUzah6_e4TKus0cmraeLezDv4uTompi0T6dnMqaMKTNpBTdmp5c0UGDSfvnzLtcfOhy_3-H9JdK-vM6C7LeXv8XchmmjYaBFG6b4dZ-wy_0LAAD__9yyjL8)
---
Friend,
**We are in the first few days of the 2024 election year, and consequently, the moment when I see who my FIRST supporters of 2024 will be. **

name: GIFFORDS
subject: [SIGN ON] Endorse the GIFFORDS mission
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
As we enter 2024, we’re reaching out to ask you to renew your commitment to the fight to end gun violence.
#

Hi team, happy New Year!
We first want to thank you so much for your incredible outpouring of support ahead of our end of year fundraising deadline. Because of the support of this community, we were able to reach our 2023 fundraising goals.
Thank you. We are so grateful to have you with us in this movement.
As we enter 2024, we’re reaching out to ask you to endorse our mission to end gun violence. It’s going to be a busy year ahead as we work to maintain our slim gun safety Senate majority, take back the House, and re-elect a gun safety president in this year’s elections.
**We need your help to show our gun lobby adversaries that we’re never backing down in the fight to save lives.**
[**If you’re with us in this fight, will you add your name today to endorse our mission to save lives from gun violence? It’s a simple act, but when everyone adds their name, it shows that our movement has the strength to take on the gun lobby and elect gun safety champions in 2024.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_endorse_jan2024/?source=em240103-1-30&refcode2=7141.3935704.PDh6th&akid=7141%2E3935704%2EPDh6th)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_endorse_jan2024/?source=em240103-1-30&refcode2=7141.3935704.PDh6th&akid=7141%2E3935704%2EPDh6th)**
We could not do our work without your support. Thanks so much for standing with us in the fight to end gun violence.
Onward,
The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=7141%2E3935704%2EPDh6th) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

It’s been over a year since Kari Lake lost but pretended to win the governorship. Since then, she’s **spread Trump-like election lies, spent millions of dollars on nonsense lawsuits, and practically moved into Mar-A-Lago to suck up even more to Trump**. (Really, she had her own room!)

So in 2024, we must:
1. Rally behind Ruben Gallego
2. Replace Sinema
3. Keep Lake as FAR from office as possible

body:

friend,

When was the last time you shopped DeSantis for President merch?

Our shop has some all-new items AND some all-time classics from our earliest days. There's no better time to shop!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d20d914c0e9fb6b5a46c77b1aac6035ba398ee4a910ee9c169096aa80c7d70726f0e34eda2dc8d3880b8990653d5598f54e3e79258c7f43fb26e402c30a8fea4

SHOP NOW

The ground game is what counts the most now... our support will be put to the test at the Iowa Caucus on January 15th and again at the first-in-the-nation New Hampshire primary on January 23rd. We're counting on our team to show out and to show out BIG. The best way to do that is by supporting our efforts by ordering merchandise... and then getting out the vote in your community by wearing it around!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d20d914c0e9fb6b5a46c77b1aac6035ba398ee4a910ee9c169096aa80c7d70726f0e34eda2dc8d3880b8990653d5598f54e3e79258c7f43fb26e402c30a8fea4
View our official shop here . 🛍️

Anything you order—from a yard sign to a tumbler—will help us spread the word that Ron DeSantis is READY TO WIN all year long. Go find your favorites today!

- DeSantis Merch Team

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d20d914c0e9fb6b5a46c77b1aac6035ba398ee4a910ee9c169096aa80c7d70726f0e34eda2dc8d3880b8990653d5598f54e3e79258c7f43fb26e402c30a8fea4

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d20d914c0e9fb6b51544040fdad7e0fc064b01a54964289fb6654b70055827cbeeaff442680db321c8ff0d5ba6087bd14c27a0506d549bfedff616948ddba601
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d20d914c0e9fb6b5a46c77b1aac6035ba398ee4a910ee9c169096aa80c7d70726f0e34eda2dc8d3880b8990653d5598f54e3e79258c7f43fb26e402c30a8fea4

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d20d914c0e9fb6b5a46c77b1aac6035ba398ee4a910ee9c169096aa80c7d70726f0e34eda2dc8d3880b8990653d5598f54e3e79258c7f43fb26e402c30a8fea4

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

[**You know it and I know it, the TRUTH is: CNN is afraid of open dialogue on the issues and allowing a perspective they disagree with.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7d4e9c9cbb0d46c798b4bc1ab3215569&_e=BCJgTGq4ZtR9v4sVSCXlssTB4pqYqfHpXWnwfG0fTbMb9rFCqDGFmcC-DnZ1Dqe1u25Fc5X7ubEEXsIWMM7r4i82HePDS_HXzg0xg648rh-eQZyLvbFG17IaestOMSU3pVXmuWoi3g5HA-k0PnrSF1Npsxs2jeaBlork0esjZ0UxfImn2hsKHRDLq2E7j_B4hFwWFuPGwebIJCPb45rudnOf226Ebk4YwEAch-lm9C8X-Mm3hmTJ6mDu99rag0sKitQeiYEBfs6SENLmndfxrR7fFgpNA2Iovyfvhp_AMcqhQXd4md7j_CHIJXYsw5Ng-oG-_HRf7G5CrTjkX31nkwxK0SjbU1RYf855SqD_-UwUSM90DgPnP6oA_Mj8rxThKNUnqVijxJz2gMKAQoIuAg%3D%3D) Their floating head talk show hosts have never missed an opportunity to to slander me saying, I’m “infecting the public with conspiracy,” “one step away from Nazi propaganda,” and “selling sinister lies.”

[** SHUT DOWN THE CORRUPTION **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7d4e9c9cbb0d46c798b4bc1ab3215569&_e=BCJgTGq4ZtR9v4sVSCXlssTB4pqYqfHpXWnwfG0fTbMb9rFCqDGFmcC-DnZ1Dqe1u25Fc5X7ubEEXsIWMM7r4i82HePDS_HXzg0xg648rh-eQZyLvbFG17IaestOMSU3pVXmuWoi3g5HA-k0PnrSF1Npsxs2jeaBlork0esjZ0UxfImn2hsKHRDLq2E7j_B4hFwWFuPGwebIJCPb45rudnOf226Ebk4YwEAch-lm9C_wtPNgXqiRwOPqioXinLlXVji3Sw7On5VAA9FG1GK3U7V9tQLwVXTF3PyBK26wqgMzAx9AKWZjT4mj_5FekBonYf_agmIlC_Po99bW2pVl1kyLZS-5OGPyRkz_5mU0lIFOqmFZc_uypt5rx4LfB1jZtqyjaCD1f-P8FfIhBFUQ8g%3D%3D)

Open your eyes and see what CNN and other mainstream media outlets are trying to do: implement a plot to prop up the establishment-approved GOP puppet. Don’t let them get away with it. This is an insult to GOP caucusgoers in Iowa and the American people.

While the mainstream media desperately tries to count me out, we’re bypassing them and _**going straight to you, the people,**_ to expose a new layer of media corruption. On Wednesday, January 10, at 8 PM EST/7 PM CT, podcast host Tim Pool will host a live-studio audience town hall with me.

I hope you’ll tune in for the TRUTH.
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7d4e9c9cbb0d46c798b4bc1ab3215569&_e=BCJgTGq4ZtR9v4sVSCXlssTB4pqYqfHpXWnwfG0fTbMb9rFCqDGFmcC-DnZ1Dqe1u25Fc5X7ubEEXsIWMM7r4i82HePDS_HXzg0xg648rh-eQZyLvbFG17IaestOMSU3pVXmuWoi3g5HA-k0PnrSF1Npsxs2jeaBlork0esjZ0UxfImn2hsKHRDLq2E7j_B4hFwWFuPGwebIJCPb45rudnOf226Ebk4YwEAch-lm9C8KrjFiSZbQb1XqNDf4KwZN6__fAJU14wMSyumfBJ0X6UgFBk5drIpldgXIcweNP-3ebVzKF9Xl3S3cOypgoOmEmU6rVgWOiKTadZRUoxD-FoAkXpt844L_UD7kdETA28VyCP_zwB5H70C2nTt_LA5_bbt8Vi94HHZadBdxd5CEBw%3D%3D)

[** STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7d4e9c9cbb0d46c798b4bc1ab3215569&_e=BCJgTGq4ZtR9v4sVSCXlssTB4pqYqfHpXWnwfG0fTbMb9rFCqDGFmcC-DnZ1Dqe1u25Fc5X7ubEEXsIWMM7r4i82HePDS_HXzg0xg648rh-eQZyLvbFG17IaestOMSU3pVXmuWoi3g5HA-k0PnrSF1Npsxs2jeaBlork0esjZ0UxfImn2hsKHRDLq2E7j_B4hFwWFuPGwebIJCPb45rudnOf226Ebk4YwEAch-lm9C9avcpb11if0lb2NO2-sbbdRjPoWC30a-MH43rMc6Xu33S6CkCgxLOl76L35gYjHf0qdLx4_MuJwcYBmXake-tlUxXo-P5KfzHPbscdEezuaPGDhixp4sWWd74gZEFLgRhjlsbvPYHkuPGbDAuNZpD2DJ5ucH1lsnk4KOC14vWSrQ%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7d4e9c9cbb0d46c798b4bc1ab3215569&_e=BCJgTGq4ZtR9v4sVSCXlssTB4pqYqfHpXWnwfG0fTbMb9rFCqDGFmcC-DnZ1Dqe1u25Fc5X7ubEEXsIWMM7r4i82HePDS_HXzg0xg648rh-eQZyLvbFG17IaestOMSU3pVXmuWoi3g5HA-k0PnrSF1Npsxs2jeaBlork0esjZ0UxfImn2hsKHRDLq2E7j_B4hFwWFuPGwebIJCPb45rudnOf226Ebk4YwEAch-lm9C-GqIgQ3Ly6vOgh1xVAleeXGoD7IcxW2k716cTgzQbSXz3NuDC3zC2J90i_feeKT3v5pVGYl3mRCbFY6KKqHkHHOS1dG2af5nlHWKEQ1V7-PSSgnMpxgPwjB6SKy83Z1hS8DUXg-2tZObDiMOofyfyqJmTB4TsQ3mI2VhzbMZcdTg%3D%3D)

body:
BREAKING: CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!

|
**BREAKING:** CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!

**Censorship, cherry-picking polls, and legal threats are just the mainstream media 's latest tactics to prop up their favorite pick-of-the-month puppet.**

They have disgracefully, cherry-picked arbitrary poll parameters to favor requirements. Morning Consult recently had me polling ahead of Nikki Haley in one of the largest-conducted Iowa polls. The latest American Research Group Inc. also has me polling at #2 amongst "probable" GOP primary voters in New Hampshire:

Trump - 33%
**Ramaswamy --18%**
DeSantis--14%
Christie--9%
Haley--8%
Undecided--16%
| [** STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8efd546e3284387b1027b799aa739f4&_e=QzJ0RUberHiCOQWoulnaDvv9wRF8eBJdzkzbZnfMzPCmsq825kdorBLRWV0hnpLoJeIK3XzVX1f_p-5DLbNqMHw0WDDuPe79z9JLN_tlcEmXh43O5EGhSqgnRIJLQLiaP5Kf4kDGjmyJiJAZSfBnm9LMqo6kydRJBZsd80zODB2FoN1vlVWUr7hxyE4dh3zHNM6BcX5gBJ2djfmdo1zB5BPO4QZ71geypoFPeBLiNqpM0AJCAiPTW0qboHIJXP6LEVBSuJ6uL9RsNjZeJUB1OF_xbLSB1RIlkqy1t79v-jWxEuzGIn-eTjKXKZ4SaUYjXyfHdjnFMVfoFkQgbkst_aAwVSUrOFRW9Dq_zlcxicNmqZU79stUtYxb4m_iwo_Uf98KtIPX6DHhOS0a_FNNdg%3D%3D)
---

This is of course, after they cut my Iowa town hall short after I pointed out uncomfortable truths about January 6 and related topics, which CNN instantly and desperately covered up as "conspiracy theories."

[**You know it and I know it, the TRUTH is: CNN is afraid of open dialogue on the issues and allowing a perspective they disagree with.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8efd546e3284387b1027b799aa739f4&_e=QzJ0RUberHiCOQWoulnaDvv9wRF8eBJdzkzbZnfMzPCmsq825kdorBLRWV0hnpLoJeIK3XzVX1f_p-5DLbNqMHw0WDDuPe79z9JLN_tlcEmXh43O5EGhSqgnRIJLQLiaP5Kf4kDGjmyJiJAZSfBnm9LMqo6kydRJBZsd80zODB2FoN1vlVWUr7hxyE4dh3zHNM6BcX5gBJ2djfmdo1zB5BPO4QZ71geypoFPeBLiNqpM0AJCAiPTW0qboHIJXP6L9t33GCiS1O-4U-bYChlCn6KJTFTx9b585fQNwTtvxLz4aiOCYOTRkKmfDWTGftqy5Y_va1J6bIw9ng4QYWP0T4ZlExhKyyPGeB2dhXBvm5gnhrd0bdju7rSPbV5Rwr25coTLskFSOk7otaIPSC1fPg%3D%3D) Their floating head talk show hosts have never missed an opportunity to to slander me saying, I'm "infecting the public with conspiracy," "one step away from Nazi propaganda," and "selling sinister lies."

[** SHUT DOWN THE CORRUPTION **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8efd546e3284387b1027b799aa739f4&_e=QzJ0RUberHiCOQWoulnaDvv9wRF8eBJdzkzbZnfMzPCmsq825kdorBLRWV0hnpLoJeIK3XzVX1f_p-5DLbNqMHw0WDDuPe79z9JLN_tlcEmXh43O5EGhSqgnRIJLQLiaP5Kf4kDGjmyJiJAZSfBnm9LMqo6kydRJBZsd80zODB2FoN1vlVWUr7hxyE4dh3zHNM6BcX5gBJ2djfmdo1zB5BPO4QZ71geypoFPeBLiNqpM0AJCAiPTW0qboHIJXP6Lnv-o3C5AhwIsDCdYnZpQuKhMzJ3eE97GUMwoqGIwwEZZKZNPnKcrQ-Z_kE2cdgAk5hwXJ2wI_YDUJKhdGd2vtKgfDvb3QZM6qe4t4Rtv8a7q_wJJ6zdHxW04FYPk_IyWadxcZIjUNdDRvWDVYP8nNw%3D%3D)
---

Open your eyes and see what CNN and other mainstream media outlets are trying to do: implement a plot to prop up the establishment-approved GOP puppet. Don't let them get away with it. This is an insult to GOP caucusgoers in Iowa and the American people.

While the mainstream media desperately tries to count me out, we're bypassing them and _**going straight to you, the people,**_ to expose a new layer of media corruption. On Wednesday, January 10, at 8 PM EST/7 PM CT, podcast host Tim Pool will host a live-studio audience town hall with me.

I hope you'll tune in for the TRUTH.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Peter, I want to extend a huge, sincere **thank you** to everyone who chipped in ahead of our final FEC fundraising deadline of 2023. Halfway through my first term, we needed a big show of strength heading into the election year. And thanks to you, we know we have the grassroots energy to hold IL-17. Your support couldn't have come at a better time. We’ve just finished a year where the Republican-led House chose the most hateful Speaker in history who has pledged to make me a top target this cycle. In fact, while most of us were celebrating with loved ones over the holiday, the NRCC was busy tweeting out baseless “insults” about me. For our part, we’re tuning out the noise and staying focused on delivering for this community, and I’m humbled to know that grassroots supporters have consistently come through for us when we needed it most. Thanks for standing with us during this trailblazing first year in Congress. I look forward to our next two years in Congress and beyond. More soon,
\- Eric
---

subject: Sign: Protect Maine Secretary of State Shenna Bellows from MAGA extremists
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign your name: Demand protection for Maine Secretary of State Shenna Bellows >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T422e4992-169a-44b3-93c3-02bd39202b3c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec973f55-79b3-4a8f-9eeb-216dadcd6f81/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Maine Secretary of State Shenna Bellows has removed Donald Trump from the state's 2024 ballot, citing the 14th Amendment's "insurrectionist ban." Bellows followed the law, and was right to remove Trump from the ballot, but her courage has been met with a torrent of hate, threats, and vitriol from MAGA extremists. Her home address has been posted on social media and she and her family have been on the receiving end of threats, as well as a swatting attempt in which a fake emergency call was made with the goal of a large police presence and a SWAT team showing up at her home. Shenna Bellows and her family should be protected from these violent MAGA extremists, and authorities need to act as soon as possible. She should not be put in danger because of her courageous act to protect our democracy. [**Sign your name: Demand protection for Maine Secretary of State Shenna Bellows >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6a20f630-be26-4169-8560-79e152e35f32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
