name: Powered By People
subject: Another blow for life-saving abortion care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
**Access to lifesaving abortion care just suffered another devastating blow in Texas.** A federal appeals court ruled that Texas emergency rooms do not have to perform emergency abortions to save the lives of patients who will die without one.
**[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240103-a.fWgYDM&refcode=ema20240103-237340&t=1&akid=237340%2E444211%2EId92vO)**
**This ruling will kill people. It’s clear that we can’t rely on the courts to protect the lives of Texas women — so it’s on us to do so by electing leaders who will.**
[**Please chip in $3 or whatever you can today to help us reach, register, and mobilize the voters we need to elect pro-choice leaders who will stand up for Texas women.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240103-a.fWgYDM&refcode=ema20240103-237340&t=2&akid=237340%2E444211%2EId92vO)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240103-a.fWgYDM&refcode=ema20240103-237340&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=237340%2E444211%2EId92vO)**
This couldn’t be more urgent — there’s no other way to stop this madness, save lives, and protect every woman’s freedom to make her own decisions about her own body, her own health care, and her own future.
Thank you for being in this fight.
Powered by People

Friend,
I wanted to take a moment to tell you how much I appreciate having you with me as we start this whirlwind election year—and how absolutely essential you are to this critical mission of national importance: **defeating Jim Jordan**.
I am SO thankful, so moved, and just ecstatic knowing that people like you and thousands of others across the country are invested in helping me get to Congress.
This campaign is about so much more than Jim Jordan. **It is about the message we send when he is removed from office by harnessing the power of democracy and the work I am excited to do when I get to Congress. I have a list of Bills to submit that will help a lot of people.**
Now more than ever, our country needs examples of how strong we can be when we come together, fight the good fight, **_and win_**.
I am humbled by the prospect of leading this movement to such an incredible victory, and feel confident about what we will achieve together in this new year.

We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=Thd0qKm%2F%2Bn2BGAP1z7BMSNdu%2Fyw1n9Z%2F7Im4X2%2B371dm5%2FI4aTSMlNV02xGSoD2PTnvOtWfE9Jaqxe28pb5ZPYez6wNf0wO17Ovp6np52EKK6EVniMndGZH%2F8E4jazTBVEg4jGPHk4FEpg8GTw9Mm0SJ3jXk4GG9pYbr91YNNxXtt7PX5JjeyyrBzTHo1Ori3PjJYr1XE%2Bi7kXPlST1LZ5XJsE4eP8Nt7L0VsLr5x7MnhsAMVwA03iLLc3STlxArAKjVWGJ%2B3fVa9ek%2B8Xc1c0ucMEVtJLEQieIZIoE9eDbuYFjkb4XbpneZOnJfGgyYCnMQ%2F5RZGQrVuGY%2B%2FIKxuzt4DX7aAkjE7jFEpMQhsVQ5oTMAPmvFvDaSNQhPiKG0HOI1%2F%2BWKXELGeS4A2SjrFyVLJ2b4gpsndTUpae6oeJj9DqvCBQ2hr2l50kQxtjVu .

Peter, I started this campaign after 21 members of the Uvalde community — a community I represent in the state Senate — lost their lives in a tragic mass shooting.
I just couldn’t sit around and watch as Republican extremists did nothing in the wake of such a horrific event right here in our state.
That’s why I was pleased to join local leaders at the White House to advocate for gun violence prevention — and why I’m grateful for leaders like President Biden who take this issue seriously:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/106842/images/rolandWH.png]
[CHIP IN TO ELECT ROLAND >>] [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
As Texas’ next Senator, stopping the gun violence epidemic will be at the top of my agenda.
Because here’s the bottom line, Peter: Texas can’t afford another six years of Senator Ted Cruz.
The hard truth is that if Ted Cruz wasn’t persuaded to support gun control after 21 of his own constituents — 19 of them children — lost their lives in Uvalde, there’s simply no convincing him.
And since 2023 was another record-breaking year for mass shootings in this country, the time for action is now.
That’s why I’m running. And that’s why I’m counting on you to stand with me.
If you believe the time is now for gun control in Texas and across the country, then will you join me in the fight to defeat Ted Cruz? Anything you can spare would go such a long way. >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

—Roland

body:
The end is near...

| **Central Bank: "Final stage" beginning now** [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf159f4649474274b93c3cb228d64df5&_e=JCYhEoMm4yaPHhG6KRjCTGv_Vbkik64cZW45OJOiGQvIQaYPuZpN7kzOUD1D8rxncSq434AHQLzsgKBMuQ36tFvshsndt8PJMNS3AN4lL9NEgipl8cf6fsMnVMdu-RNHEqfxFMD1_Cot2sXrztlyW2B8LM0YVvQdBEGGdXKSrDGp3SKNo13uRzZdZwblwKoqdrRdcOFZq0NKZhiMI3L4Dc_gmZB9KKBey_Lox4DmSiiLozbxADjIcyd4sFM73BgWCodMWVRqrIfODifJKPuRUjZpAje3vZ9TaVZwRu32Yvc%3D) The end is near... Our financial system is about to be transformed in a way that would've been unthinkable just a few years ago. And almost nobody is prepared for the chaos that follows. According to Bank of America, this overhaul is imminent - And Dr. Nomi Prins says the final stage begins in the months ahead, with the rollout of the FedNow system. To show you everything you need to know about the FedNow system - and to help you prepare - Dr. Prins has recorded a free presentation with all the details. name: VoteVets HQ
subject: We need your help to stop Donald Trump for good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Polls show the GOP at large are more aligned with Trump’s election denial and his attacks on our democracy than with reality and the principles enshrined in our Constitution.
#
Derek,
Whatever the media horse-race coverage shows, Trump is the far-and-away favorite to win the GOP presidential primary.
Polls show the GOP at large are more aligned with Trump’s election denial and his attacks on our democracy than with reality and the principles enshrined in our Constitution.
Trump and his lackeys have made a huge effort to normalize what happened on January 6th, 2021 to the Republican Party. Right now, it looks like they’ve succeeded.

name: Full Mag News
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf1904ab4dab4193ab6746014c16f4bf&_e=osg_gsLvjX4tqmjkczUilw06MKniHUtdCwJqDNC9bEgHc6JxSnU7ovj6ZBK7VU6lF_e7yksG7c9rOHGQBjPfrXg0NSyGVgPSlddr1BZHAn1mFSxENKZphbVuZIIGFztWkadOMYTDmBq2VCw6Vhqa3drhld3dU4HJWSobwLCifOY1l-wQci4SeIvCpp5vcidM_cCFNr0jJFq-A8cYSZ2g1zPowVQiZnBK6dqG4o9xwUy-QyLooeOg4KZriPwSGqfhvvKLBQFSc_pjjppjG_EGEzVlqs265_dsiN7zBXqpmwf1GF4lVjUivWRyGIkkTbJrPKJACZEAevD8IrTqZuE2bCzlDdppM8v-hwdtaTOd_kk-UcVUrUOjhf8hB-2QV5UqmQj7eLgKvdXStrRbpVS-LA%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf1904ab4dab4193ab6746014c16f4bf&_e=osg_gsLvjX4tqmjkczUilw06MKniHUtdCwJqDNC9bEgHc6JxSnU7ovj6ZBK7VU6lF_e7yksG7c9rOHGQBjPfrXg0NSyGVgPSlddr1BZHAn1mFSxENKZphbVuZIIGFztWkadOMYTDmBq2VCw6Vhqa3drhld3dU4HJWSobwLCifOY1l-wQci4SeIvCpp5vcidM_cCFNr0jJFq-A8cYSZ2g1zPowVQiZnBK6dqG4o9xwUy-QyLooeOg4KZriPwSGqfhbhZ4wKugD5eSx2YUnwwUb0Ab7VPn9cjUeKWsdbf6a2L00J903NuKv3-RWIBNCA_5D0QflrwB_3l6xRKVpLPJBWHI5BBCxd7m0W9Br6Ncn7Ubr-k8klNSukHxS5LF5OQJ7V5NMfWbtokGw7Kkq6TRNA%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf1904ab4dab4193ab6746014c16f4bf&_e=osg_gsLvjX4tqmjkczUilw06MKniHUtdCwJqDNC9bEgHc6JxSnU7ovj6ZBK7VU6lF_e7yksG7c9rOHGQBjPfrXg0NSyGVgPSlddr1BZHAn1mFSxENKZphbVuZIIGFztWkadOMYTDmBq2VCw6Vhqa3drhld3dU4HJWSobwLCifOY1l-wQci4SeIvCpp5vcidM_cCFNr0jJFq-A8cYSZ2g1zPowVQiZnBK6dqG4o9xwUy-QyLooeOg4KZriPwSGqfhzmWfMv60vplcwNp44d95WnQdT30phiWRPvRObvdYH3ZXQPN6xGj0FT7s51c2EW4_9iGtlSCyxSVGxSz6HETpACch9FBpVOrAVfKkL0DL7OD-8QePZNDlKCyxXwigWuksKgRFOxreDfr9ua7Esgey_g%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf1904ab4dab4193ab6746014c16f4bf&_e=osg_gsLvjX4tqmjkczUilw06MKniHUtdCwJqDNC9bEgHc6JxSnU7ovj6ZBK7VU6lF_e7yksG7c9rOHGQBjPfrXg0NSyGVgPSlddr1BZHAn1mFSxENKZphbVuZIIGFztWkadOMYTDmBq2VCw6Vhqa3drhld3dU4HJWSobwLCifOY1l-wQci4SeIvCpp5vcidM_cCFNr0jJFq-A8cYSZ2g1zPowVQiZnBK6dqG4o9xwUy-QyLooeOg4KZriPwSGqfh66BAkBfKqTN1x-NW4kF49AItm42vv2ga_o-TdvPTP1DqhG2d7NDYXo0nQOxejqS02S9ZgFUEqQuB9nTYg_IDP4no4403ZRL3o9d9aIuT1XBe9YfP_dRw_R70AIGSsm1uqgZBGerP8wcH1qQgDJMK3A%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf1904ab4dab4193ab6746014c16f4bf&_e=osg_gsLvjX4tqmjkczUilw06MKniHUtdCwJqDNC9bEgHc6JxSnU7ovj6ZBK7VU6lF_e7yksG7c9rOHGQBjPfrXg0NSyGVgPSlddr1BZHAn1mFSxENKZphbVuZIIGFztWkadOMYTDmBq2VCw6Vhqa3drhld3dU4HJWSobwLCifOY1l-wQci4SeIvCpp5vcidM_cCFNr0jJFq-A8cYSZ2g1zPowVQiZnBK6dqG4o9xwUy-QyLooeOg4KZriPwSGqfhXfXcBVkDUJYqB2hHiz9qRvfEbaewOap80mqyt0vkoSqDdLfeR6JYVeZ3Qyq3mECiSkU9d2HWi1vcHgOhQITsSYs9q3g0tuADaMHo6FXwUdkoLgrxAkT4w2WuJmLhQw7Pg-c3NlwdN-GUwIfT8N1k8Q%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

clean_body: Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. | | | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution. But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats." What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court." Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty. Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Kim Nguyen-Penaloza
subject: charging ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76411106/447440819/1978139865?amount=25&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_30DO_240103_1_1&refcode2=f86738cc-66aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjg2NzM4Y2MtNjZhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=huQ6i_1-3pn4bTjXEOw0U1AnilGyA64SGcmkCpAG4Qc=) | | THANK YOU!

With your support, we reached our FEC fundraising goal and now we’re charging ahead to the Primary Election in March.

Next week, my husband David and I will welcome our _bebecita_ into the world. After that, I’ll be right back on the campaign trail, talking to voters about how MAGA Michelle Steel has failed our communities and why we need a grassroots leader who will put our families first.

I’m proud to have endorsements from the California Democratic Party, Congressional leaders like Katie Porter and Lou Correa, labor organizations like SEIU and the Orange County Labor Federation, as well as 50+ local leaders.

**Now we just need to spread our message across CA-45 and reach voters in every corner of the district – and I’m going to need your help more than ever.**

[Join us as we begin our volunteer and canvas kickoff this weekend on January 6th and 7th.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76411107/447440820/1381177440?refcode=KBN_EM_FR_30DO_240103_1_1&refcode2=f86738cc-66aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjg2NzM4Y2MtNjZhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=huQ6i_1-3pn4bTjXEOw0U1AnilGyA64SGcmkCpAG4Qc=&emci=0ca9a656-c1a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f86738cc-66aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9674971)

Three years ago on January 6th, we almost lost our Democracy, which Michelle Steel failed to defend. On that anniversary, we will begin the effort to take back our Democracy through the power of our grassroots movement.

Every door knocked, every sign put up, and every dollar donated makes a difference.

Thank you again for all your support!

– Kim

---
|
* * *
---
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76411108/447440821/1978139865?amount=25&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_30DO_240103_1_1&refcode2=f86738cc-66aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjg2NzM4Y2MtNjZhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=huQ6i_1-3pn4bTjXEOw0U1AnilGyA64SGcmkCpAG4Qc=)
---
| **Democrat Kim Nguyen-Penaloza is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy.

Kim Nguyen for Congress

Santa Ana, CA 92704

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76412213/447441935/-46109959?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTc1NjdkNS02N2FhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2f6v0_jlUuP9aU_qMHIi6OcXGbYsTT-X2UoYxw66VY8=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76412214/447441936/-46109959?refcode=em-1.3.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTc1NjdkNS02N2FhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2f6v0_jlUuP9aU_qMHIi6OcXGbYsTT-X2UoYxw66VY8=)

Happy New Year, Peter!

**Thanks to your support over the past few weeks, I’m proud to share that we met our end-of-year fundraising goal and our campaign is headed into the new year in a position of strength.**

This is exactly the momentum we needed and can build upon. Now that we’re in an election year, and with the March Primary closing in, we’ll be hitting the ground running to spread the word about our campaign.

This is a true toss-up race, and with every new supporter that joins the team, our ability to reach undecided voters grows. That’s a critical piece of our winning strategy – and thanks to your support, we are in a position to succeed.

It’s clear our opponent Mike Garcia doesn’t represent our values here in the Antelope, San Fernando, and Santa Clarita Valleys. This campaign is giving him a serious run for this money, which is why political experts rank CA-27 as one of the “most competitive” races in the country.

As urgent as it is that we flip this seat, what’s even more important is giving our CA-27 community the representation we deserve. Your help – spreading the word, attending events, and chipping in on emails like this one – gets us one step closer to that goal.

Thank you for standing with me.

George

clean_body: | = = Happy New Year, Peter! Thanks to your support over the past few weeks, I’m proud to share that we met our end-of-year fundraising goal and our campaign is headed into the new year in a position of strength. This is exactly the momentum we needed and can build upon. Now that we’re in an election year, and with the March Primary closing in, we’ll be hitting the ground running to spread the word about our campaign. This is a true toss-up race, and with every new supporter that joins the team, our ability to reach undecided voters grows. That’s a critical piece of our winning strategy – and thanks to your support, we are in a position to succeed. It’s clear our opponent Mike Garcia doesn’t represent our values here in the Antelope, San Fernando, and Santa Clarita Valleys. This campaign is giving him a serious run for this money, which is why political experts rank CA-27 as one of the “most competitive” races in the country. As urgent as it is that we flip this seat, what’s even more important is giving our CA-27 community the representation we deserve. Your help – spreading the word, attending events, and chipping in on emails like this one – gets us one step closer to that goal. Thank you for standing with me. George | **=** | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Central Bank: “Final stage” beginning now
body:
The end is near...

| **Central Bank: "Final stage" beginning now** [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a9197f06882340daa2a11800c158878e&_e=fQt-1EVhvPbBCCgGBbBzE88w6xVwjm0j73tuitJXqd8T47hO77EBgXZTCETujYDcCSpIWZe4zo1dLZmiZmBL1Mh1iQBhM4hzluv5xJPILPmalTz2EAMChe2wfU689lEXaGjW0Y00rsW0FLOVTsoe-mdTY7BMQfzlxMffL7TCpu3u9grHxpwAYjKzbBqm3r0d8RyGTVL8Y3Xhggxy8XAiT4oBVTCmFuHfnqTUQs1fHSJLN07rmyplxrX0Fz7V0bQOsM11Gcgob4M3NMHubHK5RSnVPn_qBhxh0hWygQbGb8s%3D) The end is near... Our financial system is about to be transformed in a way that would've been unthinkable just a few years ago. And almost nobody is prepared for the chaos that follows. According to Bank of America, this overhaul is imminent - And Dr. Nomi Prins says the final stage begins in the months ahead, with the rollout of the FedNow system. To show you everything you need to know about the FedNow system - and to help you prepare - Dr. Prins has recorded a free presentation with all the details. It's controversial, but Nomi's interview is a must-watch for anyone with more than $2,500 in an American bank or retirement fund. **[Click here to find out what you need to do to prepare for this historic transformation.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a9197f06882340daa2a11800c158878e&_e=fQt-1EVhvPbBCCgGBbBzE88w6xVwjm0j73tuitJXqd8T47hO77EBgXZTCETujYDcCSpIWZe4zo1dLZmiZmBL1Mh1iQBhM4hzluv5xJPILPmalTz2EAMChe2wfU689lEXaGjW0Y00rsW0FLOVTsoe-vz6jEGXN_UvsYk0rvowykdlBhACb5oPg7vWOFYfDlsJP51nGj6USuPcrxmiiHjZJgxSXogfpF_lyvDjwtYODTD81pffaU-uF8J8YvX5PYKH-QXVrBnEYUFrreC0TIb5lGnxee-gPqXlWulzB_d1oqo%3D)**

It's Kari Lake, and I'm currently in the fight of my life trying to **save the soul of America in Arizona.**

No matter what happens, I'm never going to give up. I'm in this fight for ALL OF US. I will NEVER SURRENDER.

If I lose, Arizona is lost.

If Arizona is lost, the country is lost.

We must preserve what we have left and FIGHT to save this state and our conservative values.

name: Byron Donalds -- Chairman
subject: RE: Republican Ballot Harvesting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:
%recipient.md5_hash%
| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vCQWp318pbb6FgEP7nNo3w~~/AARclAA~/RgRneFo-~ "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vCQWp318pbb6FgEP7nNo3w~~/AARclAA~/RgRneFo-~ "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_
---
| | | [PITCH IN TEN BUCKS](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vCQWp318pbb6FgEP7nNo3w~~/AARclAA~/RgRneFo-~ "PITCH IN TEN BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vCQWp318pbb6FgEP7nNo3w~~/AARclAA~/RgRneFo-~ "PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vCQWp318pbb6FgEP7nNo3w~~/AARclAA~/RgRneFo-~ "PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vCQWp318pbb6FgEP7nNo3w~~/AARclAA~/RgRneFo-~ "PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT")
---
This is a non-negotiable if we want to win.

Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register.

**If we don 't do it too, we will lose.**

But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election.

Will you do your part?

I look forward to seeing your name.

Thank you,

Byron Donalds
Co-Chairman of "Bank Your Vote"

---

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yCVpbWHqkq6NNcszCMic4A~~/AARclAA~/RgRneFo-~~ "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | ~~ "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY >>" | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. ~~ Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

subject: Your 2024 Founding Donor status

body:
The floodgates are about to open.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1582%2E552475%2E4FeOXQ)
Peter, I just checked with my team and we already have 1,721 2024 founding donations in the door. **[Will you help us get to 10,000 donations by the end of the week by pitching in any amount now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240103-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240103-1&refcode2=1582_552475_4FeOXQ&akid=1582%2E552475%2E4FeOXQ)**
Let me explain why this goal matters.
Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one Senate seat in addition to West Virginia to take the Senate majority. With CNN saying Pennsylvania is one of the most competitive races on the map, we have no time to waste in our fight to defend this seat.
The floodgates are about to open for massive GOP spending across the Commonwealth — and the only way to fight back is to build a team of supporters strong enough to take them on and win.
I need your support, Peter.
**[Will you become a 2024 Founding Donor by pitching in any amount now; even $3 will help.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240103-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240103-1&refcode2=1582_552475_4FeOXQ&akid=1582%2E552475%2E4FeOXQ)**

Bob Casey

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4363bbd53eb846a8b251cdce8b4dfac5&_e=NSfpfzGMRbA5tcSEfjqGABihZwBNp2uSxJHC0qLUZFJw0bjDD-HapmF2W1PqtGzj1O-MoNZZpofwNoPQAjt0NB1yq57RB2zsKLClSPVP9SH-sThDjtGzt7IhsOC4YKVOQcbTwdrQ2ntR4-9Lp4vbvv45NIQsguOpFpIym3R8RW9FZpvHZL7EWSYf395rPzOH1Ko5dTIk0pT2rHJQqRRqn1WAbI3kH2kzSbp0Hhv9MwRndD2daZAiQ3-uQRauRjTCv3gcHJJKLpjv8q9lhIUz3ALg_rLe-KARy5L5aWSY01OPlKQaHh4T01ZM9RRMmrwbOUkP8mxJc0lXJ48Yh3JW9T3YPS9bfV9i375M_dAPAAL8VbI_PKmh58vKHWlVnnFUEYAyIIn_kCf9g5JAXpyRaDssJVCS-9pQoWXMkoOtjYtluFT2eJnmlHat2-Y5_-so)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4363bbd53eb846a8b251cdce8b4dfac5&_e=NSfpfzGMRbA5tcSEfjqGABihZwBNp2uSxJHC0qLUZFJw0bjDD-HapmF2W1PqtGzj1O-MoNZZpofwNoPQAjt0NB1yq57RB2zsKLClSPVP9SH-sThDjtGzt7IhsOC4YKVOQcbTwdrQ2ntR4-9Lp4vbvv45NIQsguOpFpIym3R8RW9FZpvHZL7EWSYf395rPzOH1Ko5dTIk0pT2rHJQqRRqn1WAbI3kH2kzSbp0Hhv9MwRndD2daZAiQ3-uQRauRjTCv3gcHJJKLpjv8q9lhIUz3ALg_rLe-KARy5L5aWSY01O75R_DzVKqw5dsCdtLKuHow67vUv-5PAG3Jcqxa1EMvQuYKajBfOw78iz4A6zMq3O0NN9n2D9qgDrmIGWa36pvT2xq2nv_yDgGsuAsyialxVKueU6MpR_uScGIaqkpOShF2Tg53L296D-st1sUO3yC)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---
| This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President
PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315
---

https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=837916360dd480c6cd9b2ece04ceb8462f4d12c1f957600a6939b03bc492ef1e9767c0fd777291aa5f5c335f4824d591fd5a35104f4c96ef8db5b769e1d8381847cc965eea0476f80a3ceaa451ee919f

Hey friend,

This entire year is about you, your choice, and your future. There is nothing that matters more to Ron DeSantis than hearing back from you.

Did you see the email he sent over? He's looking for your response as soon as possible as we dive into election year.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e4a3cd4df5f9a760a9bec847d276ea145d17216b8c02a4e5606735264bb03fd46637d30a110075b4b8adf3c22914edea3329cc8087ad18267ed3261608e541b4
Submit your survey today.

--------Forwarded Message--------

From:
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e4a3cd4df5f9a760a9bec847d276ea145d17216b8c02a4e5606735264bb03fd46637d30a110075b4b8adf3c22914edea3329cc8087ad18267ed3261608e541b4
Ron DeSantis

Subject: I want to make sure we're on the same page for election year

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e4a3cd4df5f9a760a9bec847d276ea145d17216b8c02a4e5606735264bb03fd46637d30a110075b4b8adf3c22914edea3329cc8087ad18267ed3261608e541b4

Friend,

I campaign the same way I govern: with honesty and integrity. When it comes to my team, I want to make sure we're always on the same page about how you're doing and what you'd like to see from our campaign.

Will you take a moment to respond to our quarterly check in so I can be sure we're going into the Iowa caucuses on the same page?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e4a3cd4df5f9a760a9bec847d276ea145d17216b8c02a4e5606735264bb03fd46637d30a110075b4b8adf3c22914edea3329cc8087ad18267ed3261608e541b4
RESPOND TO THE SURVEY

I believe you're the most impacful part of my team, and it's why we rely on you during every critical moment. You are the foundation of this team, and I'd really like to know how you're doing. If you have a few moments to spare, I look forward to seeing your response!

Happy New Year from my family to yours,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e4a3cd4df5f9a760a9bec847d276ea145d17216b8c02a4e5606735264bb03fd46637d30a110075b4b8adf3c22914edea3329cc8087ad18267ed3261608e541b4

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e4a3cd4df5f9a760a9bec847d276ea145d17216b8c02a4e5606735264bb03fd46637d30a110075b4b8adf3c22914edea3329cc8087ad18267ed3261608e541b4

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e4a3cd4df5f9a7608485d251a05d331aec0564121df21f009e97a7c1586487497edcfac22d0cf6c19731dc5ff150ce421665cbcd096c65b564ef3274b7c1305b
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e4a3cd4df5f9a760a9bec847d276ea145d17216b8c02a4e5606735264bb03fd46637d30a110075b4b8adf3c22914edea3329cc8087ad18267ed3261608e541b4

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e4a3cd4df5f9a760a9bec847d276ea145d17216b8c02a4e5606735264bb03fd46637d30a110075b4b8adf3c22914edea3329cc8087ad18267ed3261608e541b4

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

name: Andy Kim
subject: What we accomplished in 2023

body:
I was humbled to be closing out my fifth year serving New Jersey in Congress.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76414214/447444416/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmYyYWY0YS02YWFhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RL-qOMYTcWlrdFMUEJNy_YVxVW3EhN7XGN-8-d-m0rc=&emci=523dc86a-50aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=92f2af4a-6aaa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=26261389)
---

| | I was humbled to be closing out my fifth year serving New Jersey in Congress. It's hard to believe how much has happened in these few years. Every year, I like to compile all the great work we've been able to accomplish and show you the results that we're delivering. Here's our 2023 by the numbers: Introducing and passing bills to help New Jersey families:
* 20 Bills Authored
* 320 Bills Cosponsored
* 75 Cosponsored and Bipartisan Bills
* 10 Cosponsored Bills that Passed through the House (all bipartisan)
* 13 Letters Led

Being accessible and accountable to my constituents:
* 12 Town Halls Hosted
* 84,771 Constituent Messages Resolved
* 437 Meetings Held
* 65 Letters of Support for Federal Grants

Finally, one of my favorite numbers to share is this: $15,001,644. That number is the money returned in 2023 to neighbors in Burlington, Mercer, and Monmouth counties. **I've always said that it doesn't matter if you voted for me or not, I work for you.** I work for the working parents trying to deal with rising costs so they can put food on the table. I work for the seniors trying to afford their prescription drugs. I work for the men and women in uniform who bravely serve our country. We've made a lot of progress for all of our neighbors in the last year, and I hope you see in that someone who is working for you and your family, not just the well-off and well-connected. There was a lot to be proud of in 2023, but our work is far from over. Thank you for the honor and responsibility of serving you. I look forward to all we can accomplish in 2024. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: I was humbled to be closing out my fifth year serving New Jersey in Congress. | | | | I was humbled to be closing out my fifth year serving New Jersey in Congress. It's hard to believe how much has happened in these few years. Every year, I like to compile all the great work we've been able to accomplish and show you the results that we're delivering. Here's our 2023 by the numbers: Introducing and passing bills to help New Jersey families: 20 Bills Authored 320 Bills Cosponsored 75 Cosponsored and Bipartisan Bills 10 Cosponsored Bills that Passed through the House (all bipartisan) 13 Letters Led Being accessible and accountable to my constituents: 12 Town Halls Hosted 84,771 Constituent Messages Resolved 437 Meetings Held 65 Letters of Support for Federal Grants Finally, one of my favorite numbers to share is this: $15,001,644. That number is the money returned in 2023 to neighbors in Burlington, Mercer, and Monmouth counties. I've always said that it doesn't matter if you voted for me or not, I work for you. I work for the working parents trying to deal with rising costs so they can put food on the table. I work for the seniors trying to afford their prescription drugs. I work for the men and women in uniform who bravely serve our country. We've made a lot of progress for all of our neighbors in the last year, and I hope you see in that someone who is working for you and your family, not just the well-off and well-connected. There was a lot to be proud of in 2023, but our work is far from over. Thank you for the honor and responsibility of serving you. I look forward to all we can accomplish in 2024. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by .** Andy Kim for New Jersey P.O. Democrats secured over 30 special election victories last year, defending our Pennsylvania House majority in five special elections and chipping away at the GOP’s narrow majority in the New Hampshire House. Each of these victories marked a major loss for Republicans – and they’re scrambling to gain back lost ground. That means we need to be prepared to give every special election our all. **_And we already have five on the books just this month:_** | **Date** | **State** | **Seat**

name: Nancy Dahlstrom
subject: It's a crime
body:
| | | | |
---
| Letting crime continue to rise is a crime in itself. Right? From day one, I've dedicated my public service to protecting Alaskans from government overreach, high taxes, unsecure elections, and unsafe streets. Throughout my tenure in the state legislature, my service within the Department of Corrections, my role as your lieutenant governor, and my current pursuit of a seat in Congress, championing the cause against crime and backing our dedicated law enforcement officers has always been a priority. From violent sex offenders to property crimes, Mike Dunleavy and I have built a solid record of laying down the law – and it's working! As your voice in Congress, I will redouble my commitment to lowering crime and streamlining our criminal justice system. But first I need your help getting hired for the job. My campaign's early initiatives include informing voters of Mary Peltola's horrible voting record, introducing myself as a candidate for Congress, and grassroots organizing. _And it's not cheap!_ [Help me protect Alaskans and Americans by joining my team and donating $5 toward our growing campaign now.](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=RaMrku6Jmgp9Enkqgs8Am4bs-2Ffv68-2Fa0XPb99uXknk7GgMeRoXbabyFbhAWeUcqD1FkKel3ooyUu2U0GOCa-2FzIc0rsruK0j-2BIT2FBlXGoOja3sLwLxRcLo57WPIj9nk1yGndSiUrZPAEYJTuOXFWTH3vRaUaYwtQ-2BB-2BVM5xiMpkSX4o2yxJffR0z4mC4fe3Xknwjw-2BpfNwzEZfQgdodZMnM-2FatMjGTxHb9YayYtgbTw-3DvJ_-_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhkjYEocgrRJjVsunJqmEU6NPHIceipo5tjqbShhFr-2FzhSF57CfejO3N29iQEfXjBYw0TeCYERvCKiRlq0I4daIMDnXRj2nDgkmPSFATpwXW1bAYV6FEoBhX9jc32NQ6DAsU3VdFfWIY9YS-2FZPakrP8QfWdNAQucWpvciDeTXdvdk-2B5yhnh1EuJ3yEAOeeYdPe1x-2BPwtTt2Er4D8xhOSXhyoBClqqQOvF5Sh9kLOpusZ8TraGWNkUU9QyXy4AjzOdtcQVliRW3IfIiG92oVZ-2FeJGjAJXbZ7MpKLaDnoH7OHLGweXuNPaNdxQC3BC1ah4ftLqaMK24afUcBWH2jym2WnmmNR4pNqkiSq5APYlqwHxQFXEM2lhVNW7zbSKd7dNjUu3tEt2Hpt-2BFl4629Td9ryneHtCJX4ZE8VKatVKEKTQA-3D-3D) I promise your contributions will be rushed into the field. Together, we can tackle crime and make America a safer place to raise a family. Warm regards, **Nancy Dahlstrom
** _Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large
_**

clean_body: | | | | | | Letting crime continue to rise is a crime in itself. Right? From day one, I've dedicated my public service to protecting Alaskans from government overreach, high taxes, unsecure elections, and unsafe streets. Throughout my tenure in the state legislature, my service within the Department of Corrections, my role as your lieutenant governor, and my current pursuit of a seat in Congress, championing the cause against crime and backing our dedicated law enforcement officers has always been a priority. From violent sex offenders to property crimes, Mike Dunleavy and I have built a solid record of laying down the law – and it's working! As your voice in Congress, I will redouble my commitment to lowering crime and streamlining our criminal justice system. But first I need your help getting hired for the job. My campaign's early initiatives include informing voters of Mary Peltola's horrible voting record, introducing myself as a candidate for Congress, and grassroots organizing. And it's not cheap! I promise your contributions will be rushed into the field. Together, we can tackle crime and make America a safer place to raise a family. Warm regards, Nancy Dahlstrom Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | No longer want to receive these emails? .

Palestinian Relocation

being “irresponsible” in suggesting that Palestinians could be
relocated outside of the Gaza Strip. Israeli National Security
Minister Itamar Ben Gvir and Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich
suggested Monday that Palestinians could embark on a “voluntary
emigration” out of Gaza, as Israel plans to maintain a temporary
security presence in the region once

Peter,

Last year, a Trump-appointed federal judge ordered the FDA to reverse its approval of mifepristone, a safe and essential abortion medication. Though the initial lawsuit was filed by an anti-choice extremist group in Texas, it threatened abortion access in _all 50 states_.

A couple weeks later, the Supreme Court issued a stay that has preserved access to mifepristone until it reaches a formal decision. **Now, the conservative-packed Court is scheduled to hear oral arguments soon and issue a decision on mifepristone's FDA status in the summer of 2024 — exactly two years after they issued their decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade._**

This is _exactly_ what Republicans were hoping would happen when they packed the Supreme Court with justices who would further a dangerous anti-choice agenda. Millions of Americans' fundamental rights depend on the whims of a Court they did not elect and do not trust.

****We're running a live poll to find out what this community thinks about the Court, and we want to hear from you, Peter. Make your voice heard by taking our short survey now:****
****Do you support access to medication abortion (mifepristone)?****

clean_body: Do you support access to medication abortion? | Do you support access to medication abortion (mifepristone)? | | ---|--- Peter, Last year, a Trump-appointed federal judge ordered the FDA to reverse its approval of mifepristone, a safe and essential abortion medication. Though the initial lawsuit was filed by an anti-choice extremist group in Texas, it threatened abortion access in all 50 states. A couple weeks later, the Supreme Court issued a stay that has preserved access to mifepristone until it reaches a formal decision. Now, the conservative-packed Court is scheduled to hear oral arguments soon and issue a decision on mifepristone's FDA status in the summer of 2024 — exactly two years after they issued their decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. This is exactly what Republicans were hoping would happen when they packed the Supreme Court with justices who would further a dangerous anti-choice agenda. Millions of Americans' fundamental rights depend on the whims of a Court they did not elect and do not trust. **We're running a live poll to find out what this community thinks about the Court, and we want to hear from you, Peter. Make your voice heard by taking our short survey now: Do you support access to medication abortion (mifepristone)? | ---|--- Thank you, the EMILYs List team ** EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. body:
BREAKING: CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=8f4cc2e22cb44b5780f002de105fe9e6&_t=RwpEU6TN6I-mctSJPWUK1wJ6H9EfC21CIWgyzDy3ACy8ywrz2DkjSGVt4n2HKw5AqK61oKAXOCADHpPDvFy_rEYzOSZISPsDNs_0raoPWzU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=8f4cc2e22cb44b5780f002de105fe9e6&_t=RwpEU6TN6I-mctSJPWUK1wJ6H9EfC21CIWgyzDy3ACy8ywrz2DkjSGVt4n2HKw5AqK61oKAXOCADHpPDvFy_rEYzOSZISPsDNs_0raoPWzU%3D)

|
**BREAKING:** CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!

**Censorship, cherry-picking polls, and legal threats are just the mainstream media’s latest tactics to prop up their favorite pick-of-the-month puppet.**

They have disgracefully, cherry-picked arbitrary poll parameters to favor requirements. Morning Consult recently had me polling ahead of Nikki Haley in one of the largest-conducted Iowa polls. The latest American Research Group Inc. also has me polling at #2 amongst “probable” GOP primary voters in New Hampshire:

Trump – 33%
**Ramaswamy—18%**
DeSantis—14%
Christie—9%
Haley—8%
Undecided—16%
| [** STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8f4cc2e22cb44b5780f002de105fe9e6&_e=u6jTlszY_GPv8UxNp_QlCkRMgce78cPtJS7LcMj6BMOZ7bYl9gQ0hzdhp22pANl50mjg16vMQFkEEB8gwZO7NBiCvU0pGGO-pgpD0wq5AAn_MW-4wDNlyO-iYQ5oi1JHon8mZ21MSyQnyJXLETHdN1Xs7EAbGt30P9NpEOsn2CTAEoUjqXvKljEWhED5wRPrHzSIA3zi_1TihKLXO-7AJHCD52IW6K_4LyMSN-fz7_Qit1q7Za9_rfCnkWGISBx388BSg18pRBJnO6WNxgRLuxIDnnYOZ0QzMVIOt9Cq3ReXzW-zo61zFNAOEf4No5is1gDdodJ8e_zDzDrr1R6jtuMQoTAa7p66H7f7NY5z1DYHTxWZ54WhHG-aNrvk6M38vVADcydrjRfQsHUaiahgsw%3D%3D)
---

This is of course, after they cut my Iowa town hall short after I pointed out uncomfortable truths about January 6 and related topics, which CNN instantly and desperately covered up as "conspiracy theories.”

[**You know it and I know it, the TRUTH is: CNN is afraid of open dialogue on the issues and allowing a perspective they disagree with.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8f4cc2e22cb44b5780f002de105fe9e6&_e=u6jTlszY_GPv8UxNp_QlCkRMgce78cPtJS7LcMj6BMOZ7bYl9gQ0hzdhp22pANl50mjg16vMQFkEEB8gwZO7NBiCvU0pGGO-pgpD0wq5AAn_MW-4wDNlyO-iYQ5oi1JHon8mZ21MSyQnyJXLETHdN1Xs7EAbGt30P9NpEOsn2CTAEoUjqXvKljEWhED5wRPrHzSIA3zi_1TihKLXO-7AJHCD52IW6K_4LyMSN-fz7_TBx_7P2N5q3sVAEHLXDH44_jNUINawUoE6AcbH_lg3QbwOXzz0Zk2FRMHCZM3HhAZw7o9qcrg2lwT73AHCGKu9I4vXwX6lK-6CQqkgQDdY7kb6YU5bQbAiycJjJbWw_tkhWPa7Q7q78sgEtkOLDg46E1d5q1F3ZNF26LZPa5L5Bg%3D%3D) Their floating head talk show hosts have never missed an opportunity to to slander me saying, I’m “infecting the public with conspiracy,” “one step away from Nazi propaganda,” and “selling sinister lies.”

[** SHUT DOWN THE CORRUPTION **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8f4cc2e22cb44b5780f002de105fe9e6&_e=u6jTlszY_GPv8UxNp_QlCkRMgce78cPtJS7LcMj6BMOZ7bYl9gQ0hzdhp22pANl50mjg16vMQFkEEB8gwZO7NBiCvU0pGGO-pgpD0wq5AAn_MW-4wDNlyO-iYQ5oi1JHon8mZ21MSyQnyJXLETHdN1Xs7EAbGt30P9NpEOsn2CTAEoUjqXvKljEWhED5wRPrHzSIA3zi_1TihKLXO-7AJHCD52IW6K_4LyMSN-fz7_QFeNeI3uCmERnZnsLyLNwV-r3rHkceoGExmI019qciIQKXWj7HccJ8JyitHp7ByVrpCTp02k4viitpKiKo2iwk_HexuwcpjBq6exEtMF7g0sMw3JgDhMd0jzzqaFyzbb2u7BBmBV6qmLnhGoXQmqD8xT0lZwsE1aM3fUyTwwP82w%3D%3D)

Open your eyes and see what CNN and other mainstream media outlets are trying to do: implement a plot to prop up the establishment-approved GOP puppet. Don’t let them get away with it. This is an insult to GOP caucusgoers in Iowa and the American people.

While the mainstream media desperately tries to count me out, we’re bypassing them and _**going straight to you, the people,**_ to expose a new layer of media corruption. On Wednesday, January 10, at 8 PM EST/7 PM CT, podcast host Tim Pool will host a live-studio audience town hall with me.

I hope you’ll tune in for the TRUTH.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Conservatives Give
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=da8c1b55b64a43adb5ee6a5769932a89&_e=B8N7LSA1vIwh5COo5nUm1sWNrPKp-V4cHBQo4fzjA51ubq0dRHGsXL-pp3F3D3hyJe_WgbHWe7hdsmF9d0_fu7NsNphK6_7E_36LhNv9YijVmBJs8urxs3e8Gae7599uyrxygNJjIsL_6DHg0pHZzHolAF5ealAuxdyKk3FCwwrB0EK7A-KUUPUTxQ_KJ6YwnpgOOnezHitwZitqWd8EHa8Tsnfsioj5NH1D4SeQSYF8MFa4YFRJ5Dorz5wxtqULAl7VdjQr0t34rsWvEgfbwdzcSTr16BJUz4BaPZL_lMLpEdB6AmCn3UtVGQsGG8-koPSbeoY9GfPOwH3sszb5vl46OxBDRn5y7GxgR7H4xYCgjclXmXZRTio3kXxFBpX-eMS6rE7YyLvipubnGbO5ag%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=da8c1b55b64a43adb5ee6a5769932a89&_e=B8N7LSA1vIwh5COo5nUm1sWNrPKp-V4cHBQo4fzjA51ubq0dRHGsXL-pp3F3D3hyJe_WgbHWe7hdsmF9d0_fu7NsNphK6_7E_36LhNv9YijVmBJs8urxs3e8Gae7599uyrxygNJjIsL_6DHg0pHZzHolAF5ealAuxdyKk3FCwwrB0EK7A-KUUPUTxQ_KJ6YwnpgOOnezHitwZitqWd8EHa8Tsnfsioj5NH1D4SeQSYF8MFa4YFRJ5Dorz5wxtqULAZltNEBILgoMJbvSJv5GIX6JGMulmJwvjhdBFCVtO4NhgZj52QSeboWFxplokPNJpzUnpY3w_MRWM_0uO9YCvYgieh9bmqv3cV9PhhCEAmYeNhCEgzQNLulHaYydvn5sZqVNYtBATjJVCVXoItK9oQ%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=da8c1b55b64a43adb5ee6a5769932a89&_e=B8N7LSA1vIwh5COo5nUm1sWNrPKp-V4cHBQo4fzjA51ubq0dRHGsXL-pp3F3D3hyJe_WgbHWe7hdsmF9d0_fu7NsNphK6_7E_36LhNv9YijVmBJs8urxs3e8Gae7599uyrxygNJjIsL_6DHg0pHZzHolAF5ealAuxdyKk3FCwwrB0EK7A-KUUPUTxQ_KJ6YwnpgOOnezHitwZitqWd8EHa8Tsnfsioj5NH1D4SeQSYF8MFa4YFRJ5Dorz5wxtqULxbdR1F1yy3We-nU-BhZj5tgJbZhAEG4xhVr0BLy_ZYOofVA-ZqMLp7TmB9U3ESHPJPIjAH_EgKP2JbQRVbQGUraK_WVPZyazAAxw2tabnsD6MO2eEu30aUWxNFSBfBIO0T4b0WR_MwD8iAsKA1dTJw%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=da8c1b55b64a43adb5ee6a5769932a89&_e=B8N7LSA1vIwh5COo5nUm1sWNrPKp-V4cHBQo4fzjA51ubq0dRHGsXL-pp3F3D3hyJe_WgbHWe7hdsmF9d0_fu7NsNphK6_7E_36LhNv9YijVmBJs8urxs3e8Gae7599uyrxygNJjIsL_6DHg0pHZzHolAF5ealAuxdyKk3FCwwrB0EK7A-KUUPUTxQ_KJ6YwnpgOOnezHitwZitqWd8EHa8Tsnfsioj5NH1D4SeQSYF8MFa4YFRJ5Dorz5wxtqULyPRMxW4GlY6pmLSls_FXuTJLDsJJRANT4rurrnJRqWCyfw-s7PpNW83TKOb59LGTZG151dsFbECKCWWDciwDZbgs168MMwS9BohbO0zMgdTG4ydKxC_FAter1AUeroyv6-Znijp-Ol2Nv566dy8yPg%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=da8c1b55b64a43adb5ee6a5769932a89&_e=B8N7LSA1vIwh5COo5nUm1sWNrPKp-V4cHBQo4fzjA51ubq0dRHGsXL-pp3F3D3hyJe_WgbHWe7hdsmF9d0_fu7NsNphK6_7E_36LhNv9YijVmBJs8urxs3e8Gae7599uyrxygNJjIsL_6DHg0pHZzHolAF5ealAuxdyKk3FCwwrB0EK7A-KUUPUTxQ_KJ6YwnpgOOnezHitwZitqWd8EHa8Tsnfsioj5NH1D4SeQSYF8MFa4YFRJ5Dorz5wxtqULRACBZdMEIZFwpdavw6fqji8_exZEvRBw7fUfaALLW9bLDHyeAVDoFgxV5cezmcdX1zMfVxgjmtQY_r8D54SGno_Z2lugD7rsAhGyNZU45sQFsBVoHvf9-bryudZPeWRiZqS6sT8GM0im8qlQvOwk0Q%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats." What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court." Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty. Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. subject: Nearly Half of Illegal Immigrants Arrested in U.S. in 2023 Had Multiple Criminal Charges, Convictions
body:
As a result of the Biden administration’s reckless open border
policies the federal agency charged with enforcing immigration laws
inside the United States is getting slammed and discloses in its
latest annual report that enforcement arrests nearly doubled in a
year in which thousands of criminals were apprehended including dozens
of known or suspected terrorists.

[alt_text]

[*****]
January 03, 2024

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66410&L=31007&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWxsZWdhbC1pbW1pZ3JhbnQtY3JpbWluYWwtY2hhcmdlcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=01dfc4626d416181eac9454b604b862b42b48d995770bd7dda29142a7af72d4a]

As a result of the Biden administration’s reckless open border
policies the federal agency charged with enforcing immigration laws
inside the United States is getting slammed and discloses in its
latest annual report that enforcement arrests nearly doubled in a
year in which thousands of criminals were apprehended including dozens
of known or suspected terrorists. In fiscal year 2023, which ended in
September, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) arrested 170,590
illegal immigrants inside the country, almost half of them with
criminal records.

name: Tina Smith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I’m ready to lace up my sneakers and get to work — and it means so much to me that you believe in our efforts. |
#
Folks — Happy New Year! I wanted to take a moment to say _thank you_ for stepping up during our big end-of-quarter fundraising push. December is a busy month, and I can’t tell you how much I appreciate you taking some time to read these emails, sign our petitions, and make a contribution to support my work to defend the Democratic Senate Majority. Now that we’re officially in the election year, we have to remain focused on turning out voters and sharing Democrats’ message across Minnesota and the entire country. I’m ready to lace up my sneakers and get to work — and it means so much to me that you believe in our efforts. Your contributions make an impact on this critical work to elect Democrats, build a better country for us all, and defend our democracy from people like Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies. Once again, thank you. Wishing you and your loved ones a happy new year, and I’m looking forward to working with you this year! — Tina | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76417011/447451452/-937453351?refcode=AU_TSM_CL_GEN_TYE_AC60_20240103_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjY1N2I1OS02ZmFhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DPG6fdEOod5YY0Ff3NKsrjAiyK1YTwxTZaokcqL06w=)

name: Scott Parkinson
subject: Help Me Get on the Ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parkinson for Senate
body:
| | | Hey New Year, It's Scott Parkinson, Republican candidate for US Senate in Virginia. With 2024 among us, we are now entering the next phase of our campaign. Over the next few months, our campaign will be gathering signatures across the commonwealth so that my name will be on the ballot in June for the Primary Election. I'm reaching out today to ask for your help in collecting signatures. If you're able to join us on a Saturday or even walk your own neighborhood and collect signatures, click the button below and tell us where in Virginia you can help us collect signatures!
---
[Help Us Gather Petition Signatures!](mailto:info@scottparkinson.com?subject=I%20will%20help%20gather%20petition%20signatures%21&body=)
---
I am so grateful for your support and help. 2024 will be the year that we finally restore freedom and accountability to our government when we retire Tim Kaine once and for all! We hope you'll join us! Sincerely,Scott
---
Scott Parkinson
Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA)Scott@ScottParkinson.com
---
| | Paid for by Parkinson for Senate
---
| |
---

name: Tom Suozzi
subject: the NY-03 special is key
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
this is our first step to retaking the House [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Hi there, it's Tom Suozzi. I’m the Democratic nominee in NY-03 to replace the expelled George Santos, and we have a special election coming up on February 13. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Team, the implications of this election in just a few weeks are huge. There’s so much at stake for Nassau, Queens, and the whole country. Everyone is watching to see if we can finally break through the partisan gridlock in Congress to get things done and solve the critical problems our country faces. With George Santos gone, we have a chance to do just that.
In short, team, we have to win. This special election will set the tone for all of 2024–including the general election in November.
So team, I’m asking if you’ll split a contribution between Kirsten Gillibrand and I so we can win NY-03, finally get to solving the problems our country faces, and start off 2024 with a big win? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_4_suozzi?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5]

clean_body: this is our first step to retaking the House [] Hi there, it's Tom Suozzi. I’m the Democratic nominee in NY-03 to replace the expelled George Santos, and we have a special election coming up on February 13. [] Team, the implications of this election in just a few weeks are huge. There’s so much at stake for Nassau, Queens, and the whole country. Everyone is watching to see if we can finally break through the partisan gridlock in Congress to get things done and solve the critical problems our country faces. With George Santos gone, we have a chance to do just that. In short, team, we have to win. This special election will set the tone for all of 2024–including the general election in November. So team, I’m asking if you’ll split a contribution between Kirsten Gillibrand and I so we can win NY-03, finally get to solving the problems our country faces, and start off 2024 with a big win? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Tom Suozzi and Kirsten Gillibrand: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you, Tom Suozzi [] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
