name: Justice Democrats
subject: Biden bypassed Congress to send Israel $150 million in weapons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We may have entered a new year, but the slaughter and starvation of
Palestinians in Gaza did not end in 2023, and according to Israeli Prime
Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, it will go on “for many more months.”

This comes at the very same time that President Biden simultaneously said
he wants Israel to “scale down” its military attacks on Gaza, while his
administration bypassed Congress for a second time to send Israel nearly
$150 million more in bombs and weapons to continue waging violence against
a civilian population.

The hypocrisy is astounding. The President of the United States is not
making genuine calls for peace and human rights when his administration is
paying for the weapons Israel is using to target refugee camps, hospitals,
residential buildings, and places of worship. In the words of Ilhan Omar,
it is morally indefensible.

What’s even worse is that this week, Israeli officials are hitting back at
Biden’s comments and making it clear that their intent is to clear Gaza of
its Palestinian inhabitants so that Israelis may live there — that’s
ethnic cleansing, plain and simple.

Progressive leaders like Ilhan, Cori Bush, Rashida Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman,
and Summer Lee were the very first members of Congress to call for a
ceasefire, and they’re continuing to hold our government’s feet to the
fire as long as the Biden Administration funds the atrocities we’re
witnessing.

It’s just one of many reasons we can’t afford to lose their seats in the
U.S. House this year, and why we need your help right now:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240103.fbMtei&refcode=em20240103-32649&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=32649%2E1203867%2E1w5MGL ]Will you pitch in $3 or whatever you can afford to fuel
Justice Democrats’ work to re-elect our Squad incumbents and keep up the
fight for human rights for Palestinians?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240103.fbMtei&refcode=em20240103-32649&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1020&akid=32649%2E1203867%2E1w5MGL ]Contribute $3

We cannot give up on the Palestinian people. It’s up to us to ensure we
protect those in Congress with the moral clarity and courage to keep up
this critical fight.

— Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1021&akid=32649%2E1203867%2E1w5MGL ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1022&akid=32649%2E1203867%2E1w5MGL ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240103-32649-footer&t=1023&refcode2=32649_1203867_1w5MGL&akid=32649%2E1203867%2E1w5MGL

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=32649%2E1203867%2E1w5MGL

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
We can't wait to fight back or it might be too late.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76417446/447453575/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230523-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTIyOWU5YWEtNzJhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3k8a8PdcRE1tzda30cPPCgfiw8K0SKsAXyBZnphFm_w=)

| Hi Peter,

I know people often wait to donate to a campaign later in the election cycle - I get it. **But I just want to be frank and honest with you - the most important time to be a part of this campaign to beat my MAGA GOP opponent, David Schweikert, is right now.** I truly wish running for Congress didn't involve so much money but, unfortunately, it does.

_**[Will you consider making a recurring contribution today to support our campaign? Monthly contributions allow us to invest in the critical resources we’ll need to run a comprehensive campaign so I’d really appreciate your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76417463/447453604/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230523-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTIyOWU5YWEtNzJhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3k8a8PdcRE1tzda30cPPCgfiw8K0SKsAXyBZnphFm_w=) If not, could you make a one-time donation?**_
---
| [CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76417467/447453637/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230523-1-EM&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTIyOWU5YWEtNzJhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3k8a8PdcRE1tzda30cPPCgfiw8K0SKsAXyBZnphFm_w=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TODAY ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76417472/447453656/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230523-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTIyOWU5YWEtNzJhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3k8a8PdcRE1tzda30cPPCgfiw8K0SKsAXyBZnphFm_w=)
---
Though it may seem like the election is far away, my team and I have a lot of work to do as we get ready for the next few months. **We’re already running in one of THE most critical toss-up districts and there’s no doubt that Republicans will spend heavily to attack us, protect David Schweikert, and hold onto their slim House majority.** So, the best thing we can do right now is build a strong foundation to ensure we’re prepared for anything that comes our way.

_**[Peter, will you become a recurring donor today? # In the first Sean Spicer Show of 2024...
I’m joined by my friends Larry O’Connor and Sara Gonzales and we’re making predictions on all things 2024, if the government will shut down AGAIN and catching up on everything that has happened in the past couple weeks.
Get caught up on politics here:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0906d70c39&e=f6564bbe3b)

body:
After 21 years in Washington, what do you think of her?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76418313/447456770/-849459103?refcode=ea.5504da09-75aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.5504da09-75aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTA0ZGEwOS03NWFhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=askySkMf8UqkbzaHdLMl_Didi7jKAj757Dshg0EN67c=&emci=9f1e916c-56aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=5504da09-75aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76418314/447456771/916270194?refcode=ea.5504da09-75aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.5504da09-75aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTA0ZGEwOS03NWFhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=askySkMf8UqkbzaHdLMl_Didi7jKAj757Dshg0EN67c=&emci=9f1e916c-56aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=5504da09-75aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483) Senator Marsha Blackburn has spent 21 years in Washington “serving” Tennessee. In that time, she’s FAILED to make any substantive progress on the issues our state faces. She’s leading the assault against women’s reproductive freedoms in the Senate. She voted for Donald Trump’s tax cuts for corporations and the wealthy — at the expense of the middle class. And she helped block the Expanded Child Tax Credit, legislation that kept kids from going hungry. **She’s clearly not working for us.** _So, who does she serve? clean_body: After 21 years in Washington, what do you think of her? | Senator Marsha Blackburn has spent 21 years in Washington “serving” Tennessee. In that time, she’s FAILED to make any substantive progress on the issues our state faces. She’s leading the assault against women’s reproductive freedoms in the Senate. She voted for Donald Trump’s tax cuts for corporations and the wealthy — at the expense of the middle class. And she helped block the Expanded Child Tax Credit, legislation that kept kids from going hungry. She’s clearly not working for us. So, who does she serve? Corporations and special interests like the gun lobby. We think Marsha’s just plain wrong for our state, but we want to hear from you. Can you take two seconds to grade Marsha’s job performance in Washington? | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks for your input, Team Gloria | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. | The United States Senate is the last place Donald Trump and other MAGA extremists want Adam to be.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4954%2E5257348%2EF6Ey4_)
Derek — We’re officially three days into the new year and our team is already feeling the pressure of the U.S. Senate race.
Here are 3 reasons why Adam is counting on your support for his campaign today:
1. Early voting is a little over a month away, and we need to reach as many voters as possible before Californians begin to cast their ballots.
2. Steve Garvey, a MAGA celebrity candidate running against Adam, is surging in the polls — meaning he could make it in the top two on Super Tuesday and advance to the General Election. Adam is the best candidate to beat him.
3. Your support helps counter the numerous attacks and attempts by the GOP to stifle Adam. The United States Senate is the last place Donald Trump and other MAGA extremists want Adam to be. **They’re going to ramp up their attacks, but with your help, we will send Adam to the Senate.**

**[With these 3 reasons in mind, can we count on you to chip in $3, on the third day of the new year? Your contribution helps our campaign reach more voters and build this movement to reach the U.S. Senate.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=jan2024_abs_em.aTJaK-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240103_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4954%2E5257348%2EF6Ey4_)**

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Taylor Swift
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
My granddaughter is a 'Swiftie'. You don't have to look too deep to understand the star's recent domination of pop-music fame.
What can American foreign policy learn from Taylor Swift?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
I want to be a Congressman who embodies values and principles that an entire nation can look up to, but I need your help getting elected to extend that promise as a member of the US House.
If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express,
your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
Authenticity, credibility and honesty. Humility, loyalty, and accountability. I found an article that sums up some lessons we could all take from Ms. Swift as it relates to politics and foreign policy.
'Be real, be honest. Don't pretend to be perfect. Work hard and use the rules to your advantage.'
Promises made should be promises kept.
I may not be able to sing or entertain, but I want to be part of solutions by embracing inspiration, authenticity, accountability, humility, loyalty, and hard work. The United States can shape a foreign policy that represents its citizens and values on the global stage.
A recent Chicago Tribune article, ' For a better foreign policy in 2024, let's be more like Taylor Swift [https://www.chicagotribune.com/opinion/commentary/ct-column-american-foreign-policy-taylor-swift-shackelford-20231231-we6kf2thhfbfpmkwht2zubmeea-story.html] ' by Elizabeth Shackelford sums it up well.
Like me, Shackelford was a diplomat in the US State Department until December 2017, when she resigned in protest of changes in America's foreign policy direction.
As a family physician, social worker, educator, and former diplomat, strive to set a positive example and promote values such as democracy, human rights, and equality. I fundamentally believe that the United States can inspire others to strive for a better world. I want to be part of the change.
Getting to Congress is no small feat. It requires a lot of resources. Our finances are a little tighter than Taylor's empire, so I depend on the generosity of grassroots supporters like you to make it happen.
I appreciate your support. Every dollar extends our effort to shake off the haters and help hardworking Americans achieve their wildest dreams.
Grateful,
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
shop.votedrbob.com [shop.votedrbob.com]
Or, send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"

clean_body: [] My granddaughter is a 'Swiftie'. You don't have to look too deep to understand the star's recent domination of pop-music fame. What can American foreign policy learn from Taylor Swift? [] I want to be a Congressman who embodies values and principles that an entire nation can look up to, but I need your help getting elected to extend that promise as a member of the US House. If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: CONTRIBUTE [] Friend, Authenticity, credibility and honesty. Humility, loyalty, and accountability. I found an article that sums up some lessons we could all take from Ms. Swift as it relates to politics and foreign policy. 'Be real, be honest. Don't pretend to be perfect. Work hard and use the rules to your advantage.' Promises made should be promises kept. I may not be able to sing or entertain, but I want to be part of solutions by embracing inspiration, authenticity, accountability, humility, loyalty, and hard work. The United States can shape a foreign policy that represents its citizens and values on the global stage. A recent Chicago Tribune article, ' For a better foreign policy in 2024, let's be more like Taylor Swift [] ' by Elizabeth Shackelford sums it up well. Like me, Shackelford was a diplomat in the US State Department until December 2017, when she resigned in protest of changes in America's foreign policy direction. As a family physician, social worker, educator, and former diplomat, strive to set a positive example and promote values such as democracy, human rights, and equality. I fundamentally believe that the United States can inspire others to strive for a better world. I want to be part of the change. Getting to Congress is no small feat. It requires a lot of resources. Our finances are a little tighter than Taylor's empire, so I depend on the generosity of grassroots supporters like you to make it happen. I appreciate your support. Every dollar extends our effort to shake off the haters and help hardworking Americans achieve their wildest dreams. Grateful, -Dr. Bob Bob Lorinser Candidate for US Congress Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula Democrat, MI01 CONTRIBUTE [] shop.votedrbob.com [shop.votedrbob.com] Or, send a check to: "Friends of Dr. Bob" PO Box 936 Marquette, MI 49855

Dear Peter,

I wanted to reach out personally and thank you for your incredible support this past year. Thanks to you, we surpassed our end-of-year fundraising goal, and continue to build incredible momentum in our effort to keep the 47th blue.

**Your belief in this campaign never ceases to amaze me, and I am so grateful for you, Peter.**

Now that we have entered a new year – an election year at that! – I am reflecting on everything we have built and what is yet to come.

We have created an incredible team here in Orange County. Our grassroots supporters want a better future for this community, and I am determined to make that happen.

As a lifelong member of this community myself, I want to see us all succeed, for everyone to have a fair shot, for a government that puts families first instead of corporate and special interests.

It is up to all of us to ensure we keep up this momentum to Election Day. Remember: our must-win March primary is right around the corner, and these next few weeks will determine whether we have the resources to win.

In unity,

Joanna

If you didn’t get the chance to contribute toward our end-of-year deadline, **[please help us kick off 2024 on strong footing by chipping in $3 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76419048/447459268/1033648996?refcode=em-1.3.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWUxM2UwOGUtNzhhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7hYOjiN4hfHMirMlvntfs9IjZU6na_XdmWdrtD5yoIM=)**

body:
|

Hi there,

I'd like to extend my heartfelt gratitude for your support ahead of our end-of-year fundraising deadline. **Thanks to you, we surpassed our goal and are headed into the 2024 election year strong and with great momentum.**

With you on our team, we’re one step closer to our ultimate goal of unseating David Schweikert and giving AZ-01 the community-centered leadership it deserves.

Now that we are in our election year (happy 2024!), the stakes are only increasing as we move closer to Election Day. My team and I are hard at work boosting our on-the-ground programs to connect with undecided voters about our message of change and courageous, honest leadership.

Your efforts, whether you’ve chipped in $3 or helped spread the word about our campaign to flip AZ-01, are adding up. Thanks to you we are in a strong position to win this race.

**With 2024 in full swing, it’s only a matter of time until we face attacks from Republican super PACs doing all they can to protect Schweikert. This will be one of the most competitive races in the entire country.**

With all that’s on the horizon, I’m so grateful to have your support. Onward to 2024!

Thank you,

Marlene

clean_body: | = = Hi there, I'd like to extend my heartfelt gratitude for your support ahead of our end-of-year fundraising deadline. Thanks to you, we surpassed our goal and are headed into the 2024 election year strong and with great momentum. With you on our team, we’re one step closer to our ultimate goal of unseating David Schweikert and giving AZ-01 the community-centered leadership it deserves. Now that we are in our election year (happy 2024!), the stakes are only increasing as we move closer to Election Day. My team and I are hard at work boosting our on-the-ground programs to connect with undecided voters about our message of change and courageous, honest leadership. Your efforts, whether you’ve chipped in $3 or helped spread the word about our campaign to flip AZ-01, are adding up. Thanks to you we are in a strong position to win this race. With 2024 in full swing, it’s only a matter of time until we face attacks from Republican super PACs doing all they can to protect Schweikert. This will be one of the most competitive races in the entire country. With all that’s on the horizon, I’m so grateful to have your support. Onward to 2024! Thank you, Marlene | **=** | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Eigel?=
subject: First Day of Session - Secure Elections & Ban Foreign Owned Farmland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eigel for Missouri, Thomas Hughes, Treasurer_
body:
Another year going to war against the Jefferson City Swamp... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billeigel/email-12671411?e=c00a6982d2)
---
| |
---
| [Support Bill Eigel](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=a82c95bed0&e=c00a6982d2 "Support Bill Eigel")
---
|
---
| I hope you had a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year!

2023 was a great year for the Eigel campaign. We raised $2.5 million, put 50,000 miles on my truck, had 35,000 signups on our website, and have built a grassroots army of volunteers. We couldn't have done any of this without you, and we are excited for you to join us and **Make Missouri Great Again in 2024!**

It's that time of year again. The Missouri Legislature meets today in Jefferson City for the start of the 2024 legislative session. Despite having supermajorities of Republicans in the House, Senate, and a Republican in the Governor's Mansion, the Missouri Legislature fails the people year after year.

**The Jefferson City swamp needs drained and these feckless RINOs have got to go. As Governor, I will be that reckoning.**

Since launching my campaign for Governor of Missouri, I have met with countless like-minded conservative Republican voters who are fed up with establishment politicians campaigning like conservatives during election season only to turn around and stab their voters in the back by governing like anti-liberty, welfare expanding, tax raising Democrats.

In this report, I am bringing you up to speed on my plans with this session.
---
|
---
| | **Gov Parson and Kung Pao Kehoe**
* * *

**I, Bill Eigel, am the ONLY candidate for Governor who is fighting to stop the sale of our land to ALL foreign countries AND get back what has been taken!**

Yesterday, Governor Parson issued Executive Order 24-01.

The Parson/Kehoe order is inadequate and weak. Under this order, not only can **_Syria and countries harboring TERRORISTS_** continue buying farmland right next to our critical military bases, _**but so could Osama Bin Laden and the leaders of Hamas**_.
---
| | **My Statement on the Executive Order**
---
|
---
| | **Here is my call for a special session last May to BAN foreign ownership of ANY farmland**
---
|
---
|
---
| | **Some Legislation I Filed this Year**
1. **SB 733** : Eliminate Personal Property Tax
2. **SB 735** : Make Gold and Silver Legal Tender
3. **SB 832** : REAL Election Integrity
* **NO MACHINES**
* Hand Counted Paper Ballots
4. **SJR 52** : Ban ALL Foreign Countries from Buying Land & Dorce Divestment - returning ALL land to Missourians
5. **SJR 83:** Protect MO Constitution
* PROHIBIT foreign interference
* Guard against out-of-state special interests
* Keep Missouri PRO-LIFE
* Ensure rural voices are represented

---
| | I am the only candidate for Governor to endorse DONALD J. TRUMP for President in 2024! #MAGA!
---
| Thank you for your support! With your help, we can **_drain the corrupt swamp_ **and**_expose Missouri's RINOs_** in 2024. If you want to join us in this historic effort, click "Volunteer" below. Together, we will **Make Missouri Great Again**!
---
| | [Volunteer](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=c3186b2387&e=c00a6982d2 "Volunteer")
---
| [ ](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=c405569177&e=c00a6982d2)

You can [update your preferences](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=010dc0790a&e=c00a6982d2&c=f24466289c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=010dc0790a&e=c00a6982d2&c=f24466289c).

name: Wes Moore
subject: Before the freeze
body:
Let’s start the year off strong.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76419510/447460792/1666406465?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTVjNjAyYi03YmFhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f538orI4_YJ7yE8owrKDxmS7EoaIBLP1X3p9OXRIrD0=)
Friend, it’s Gov. Wes Moore. On January 10, the legislature will gavel in for the 446th session. While I’m looking forward to rolling up my sleeves and working on behalf of Marylanders, my team and I have only 7 days to fundraise what we’ll need through April. To set us up for success, my team is setting a goal to raise $10,000 in the next 7 days. [**With less than a week left, will you help us start the new year strong by contributing today toward our goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76419511/447460793/-1354668677?refcode=em20240103&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTVjNjAyYi03YmFhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f538orI4_YJ7yE8owrKDxmS7EoaIBLP1X3p9OXRIrD0=) | **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76419512/447460794/-1354668677?refcode=em20240103&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTVjNjAyYi03YmFhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f538orI4_YJ7yE8owrKDxmS7EoaIBLP1X3p9OXRIrD0=)**
---
Under our administration’s leadership, we’re showing the nation that Maryland is ready to lead the way. Our goals for the 2024 legislative session are to create more opportunities to build a Maryland that leaves no one behind and focus on making changes for families to thrive.
**In less than 1 week from today, we’ll have to stop accepting ALL donations — until April. This team has come through before to help us reach our goals, so** [**can I count on you to chip in $5, $25, or even more before the fundraising freeze?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76419513/447460795/-1354668677?refcode=em20240103&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTVjNjAyYi03YmFhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f538orI4_YJ7yE8owrKDxmS7EoaIBLP1X3p9OXRIrD0=)
Thank you for your support!
Elevate,
Wes
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To contribute via check, please address to:
Wes Moore for Maryland
PO Box 50123
Baltimore, MD 21211
[Receive Fewer Emails](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76419514/447460796/450621870?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTVjNjAyYi03YmFhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f538orI4_YJ7yE8owrKDxmS7EoaIBLP1X3p9OXRIrD0=&emci=c05c602b-7baa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=c15c602b-7baa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=24635485)

name: James Comer
subject: 40 FBI Informants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=814b66a62fcf448588b356b0b959a587&_t=cWWjv_FIvtw3KKBI_cuTn5nbeBCgrq1zM9fDEBFbcpKBCY0DpG3c56kT57031QHW71cZxPAcuaA7UqZLt9-hrDqVl1nvnTXO7953oqI2W7Y%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=814b66a62fcf448588b356b0b959a587&_t=cWWjv_FIvtw3KKBI_cuTn5nbeBCgrq1zM9fDEBFbcpKBCY0DpG3c56kT57031QHW71cZxPAcuaA7UqZLt9-hrDqVl1nvnTXO7953oqI2W7Y%3D)

[ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=814b66a62fcf448588b356b0b959a587&_e=zaW3CsqkdUiEl9CZRz32lnOFk2BVpQ6Hy7jw83R0q_T4h_G7STfiO2t1EHRX25D1mjb2MEBJBDFfDtAa0l7MNbcwkK4HdOTtz0yLMuws5q30ySWDSwZA7gNnvlXfCpKhu6BGPeEser6wM5hWmsdAQrOEfVi8QphBLta-bXByXMlJWYlGtzizbUiGATZBu2W9-gwHEpbE9q1f9zusE7ow7NPJjm2sT2b8WNpGR_4nJqzZSAZYSyNi4IolN7IS5PZT8Q7Otuz5aCOGGyJuke1Wi-TE4U88K8UYz4-S-enQZ-gRKs-l4uhmCrI4D5u-Cp0jbbDKGm60ML0Vcuu_2RKdXJhMRfnp5pS8hCovg66UrGDv9MJbFv6rCwhDPqNAp23f)
---
Fellow Conservative, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It’s a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden’s desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden’s to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it’s not just the FBI, it’s the Department of Justice as well. I just heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney’s offices in Brooklyn, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I’ve been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don’t have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con·spir·a·cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in “conspiracy theories” like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=814b66a62fcf448588b356b0b959a587&_e=zaW3CsqkdUiEl9CZRz32lnOFk2BVpQ6Hy7jw83R0q_T4h_G7STfiO2t1EHRX25D1mjb2MEBJBDFfDtAa0l7MNbcwkK4HdOTtz0yLMuws5q30ySWDSwZA7gNnvlXfCpKhu6BGPeEser6wM5hWmsdAQrOEfVi8QphBLta-bXByXMlJWYlGtzizbUiGATZBu2W9-gwHEpbE9q1f9zusE7ow7NPJjm2sT2b8WNpGR_4nJqzOmH6zwxSUWbq7g4mNTKJcIDOngK8Ytbi5hZnfwxn-Ha3QX5tyfK6DtkKvtFH_fufgbB2-mSorBlfECCs5mbvifFgl6ZLRO82VNjC3jIfz5-ltb5G2nW9CK6SLhhE0yyysEBi05I7eACB_5kI5kKrs)
---
It’s because they are complicit in the cover-up. I’ve said it before, and it’s more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I’ll be honest, it is brutal... but I’m a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what’s right, and who certainly doesn’t back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=814b66a62fcf448588b356b0b959a587&_e=zaW3CsqkdUiEl9CZRz32lnOFk2BVpQ6Hy7jw83R0q_T4h_G7STfiO2t1EHRX25D1mjb2MEBJBDFfDtAa0l7MNbcwkK4HdOTtz0yLMuws5q30ySWDSwZA7gNnvlXfCpKhu6BGPeEser6wM5hWmsdAQrOEfVi8QphBLta-bXByXMlJWYlGtzizbUiGATZBu2W9-gwHEpbE9q1f9zusE7ow7NPJjm2sT2b8WNpGR_4nJqyycIp9UGJOcayiLyynW9dF9HowI0CGppabegLdOdn3uH-o9YMrkoVa5B8Zss49Y5ZiXOZwqEhlVZ4wp1xoZArBArV3HzhwbooECc0MX_xos13K3qZXxbzoiLz7Ag4ltX4DLAryqKWxK7ZKQ4-kaY6f)
---
I’ve only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I’m once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said “Nothing worth having is easy” and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it’s the promise of America to all of her citizens.**
[**If you’re with me, I’d be honored to have your support.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=814b66a62fcf448588b356b0b959a587&_e=zaW3CsqkdUiEl9CZRz32lnOFk2BVpQ6Hy7jw83R0q_T4h_G7STfiO2t1EHRX25D1mjb2MEBJBDFfDtAa0l7MNbcwkK4HdOTtz0yLMuws5q30ySWDSwZA7gNnvlXfCpKhu6BGPeEser6wM5hWmsdAQrOEfVi8QphBLta-bXByXMlJWYlGtzizbUiGATZBu2W9-gwHEpbE9q1f9zusE7ow7NPJjm2sT2b8WNpGR_4nJqwKLm4-T-wLncHtswZBF2loCd3WUPwTECd6M7-VNIJvsT8GdVxgV7PhlKnJIS5clzg41btGt-R0529irNRmN8PoNqmXuyKWJ33aYAZiu0POSvtA_33pjp9dtlu2C-hxe_6GYn6bwF--vh6RUJjGSWjY)
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=814b66a62fcf448588b356b0b959a587&_e=zaW3CsqkdUiEl9CZRz32lnOFk2BVpQ6Hy7jw83R0q_T4h_G7STfiO2t1EHRX25D1mjb2MEBJBDFfDtAa0l7MNbcwkK4HdOTtz0yLMuws5q30ySWDSwZA7gNnvlXfCpKhu6BGPeEser6wM5hWmsdAQrOEfVi8QphBLta-bXByXMlJWYlGtzizbUiGATZBu2W9-gwHEpbE9q1f9zusE7ow7NPJjm2sT2b8WNpGR_4nJqwAvn0GYGk_VxTcAhueVSWWJwPRpH708gN9uliCZ3arYg0kq1RgxUMt0nqypxjk2UWjcA4obm-lcNPW2p84jYFiT488eMpr7b6ESgMW5-pucSSmYd2aMIcPcPrMzj5GmMKOCvfKTbd_Wje8cmH_ry5g)

_With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

Your support means everything to me | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dToCMeUp6c5xuV7LiPjhIqpYleImB8liTWhnsSkno2G4wNPI-hShvCke_4SB349rCNYqu3ElROXvjqzGlKxqb198hMN8DseIvWu14PlY1xfInnFieV582Ng15ptyDQ9ZWdvXGckwjopuEnmsqayRTC6ICSj1iLCWl54EJ_SKjeL0/42o/OBz5J8LITEiSEarDNg0lYw/h0/b_LunWuBJGbN7sEG7Iq7S_GSN1YyOm0cu3Ub99DITl8)

Peter, between the holidays and End of Quarter, I know you’ve gotten a lot of emails from us. **But here’s one more so that I can personally say thank you and happy new year!** Throughout 2023, you’ve been here, reading our emails and engaging with this campaign, donating your hard-earned money to help us meet deadlines, pay our staff, reach out to voters, and so much more. Thank you for standing with us and believing in our vision for a better TX-15 — one where the American Dream is alive and well for ALL of us. You’re a crucial part of this movement and I can not thank you enough for the work that you are putting in to help defeat extremism in South Texas and flip our district blue again. **[Muchas gracias, Peter. If you haven’t had a chance to donate yet, will you chip in $7 or whatever you can afford to help continue fueling our campaign through the election year?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_YOD9pkvQkrsQwBHBQhaxwJwjFABErsfVnTdP2-WtoIxdMfibOT3pI7KKfndAnaacv8lFbZdOpVtrGPhCgF2Ec_kA83zAl0tGxb8qymkfaYUsrtA0bEv19vWxQK54DK5BwV_Zus3NY2uEbXGXjgs4EfrGlkI4J0TNP0qr7BZcxFnbEMXr-hduEw2GeEOamig_z9YXgW_boKxBB7OwYx0VeuJQiC96Xi934S8xlOzspoTE-gypDx8LFv3HhPlLYbKHQz4EEoBovoFGWL96AwYzN34vXhpZ3K5jv_v2xZCBB7KB4R2YHCIp0nxez2v1Qt3fwKqKZiOhoq17HGstB3dtdA/42o/OBz5J8LITEiSEarDNg0lYw/h1/CoCJYzGLY-z6kw38AW85mYJDcD90mIOzdZ6T8zugfGI)** In solidarity, Michelle Vallejo

clean_body: Your support means everything to me | | | Peter, between the holidays and End of Quarter, I know you’ve gotten a lot of emails from us. But here’s one more so that I can personally say thank you and happy new year! Throughout 2023, you’ve been here, reading our emails and engaging with this campaign, donating your hard-earned money to help us meet deadlines, pay our staff, reach out to voters, and so much more. Thank you for standing with us and believing in our vision for a better TX-15 — one where the American Dream is alive and well for ALL of us. You’re a crucial part of this movement and I can not thank you enough for the work that you are putting in to help defeat extremism in South Texas and flip our district blue again. In solidarity, Michelle Vallejo | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

name: Vicente Gonzalez
subject: She lied about cooking her own gorditas de masa?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Vicente Gonzalez for Congress Committee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20240103_em_fr_b1_VG_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20240103_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
Friend, there's really no other way to say this...
For years, my opponent has been posting pictures of Mexican cooking on her social media accounts. Today, some internet sleuths found out that (1) she stole the photos from elsewhere on the internet, taking credit for other chefs' work, and (2) she didn't even know the right name for some of the dishes.
C'mon! Friend, if my opponent will lie about even the little things, there's no chance she'd represent South Texas honestly in Congress. Can you donate to our campaign today to make sure she doesn't win in November? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20240103_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
DEFEAT FLORES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20240103_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20240103_em_fr_b1_VG_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20240103_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
(⬆️ The photo was really from a tourism site in Guyana)
Friend, this isn't just about lying on social media.
As an experienced litigator who took on insurance companies that scammed vulnerable South Texas families, I can't tell you how many flat-out lies people were told along the way. That's the LAST thing we need from our Member of Congress.
In The Texas Tribune , she was called "The George Santos of [The Rio Grande Valley]," and our district deserves the better.
Friend, as a litigator and as a congressman, I've always tried my best to give it to you straight. If someone is lying about the small things, why should we trust them to advocate for us when it matters most? Can you donate today and help ensure The George Santos of the RGV doesn't win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20240103_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20240103_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
Sincerely,
Vicente
Vicente Gonzalez, a life-long Democrat, is a candidate for Texas’ 34th U.S. Congressional District.
From humble beginnings, Vicente was raised in a military family. Through hard work and pure ganas, Vicente aimed to make something of himself. His mother stressed to him over and over again that education was the key that will open doors of opportunities. Vicente made the decision to get his life back on track by going back to school to get his GED, working and attending classes at community college, and earning his college degree alongside other military families at the Embry Riddle Aeronautical University on the Corpus Christi Naval Air Station. Vicente surpassed his and his parents' dreams when he graduated from Texas A&M School of Law, earning his Juris Doctorate degree.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20240103_em_fr_b1_VG_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20240103_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
While in law school, Vicente learned how government should work. Through his experience as a Congressional Intern in Washington, D.C., Vicente learned how government really works. After law school, Vicente didn’t stop learning, and continued his training in Negotiation at Harvard University School of Law.
Vicente started his business, the Law Offices of V. Gonzalez and Associates, in McAllen and married Lorena Saenz, a former teacher and administrator in Edinburg and McAllen schools. Vicente has focused his practice on fighting for a level playing field for working families wronged by corporations and insurance companies evading responsibility. Through several victories for our community, Vicente recovered millions in tax dollars for South Texas school districts after shady contractors misspent millions in bond money and put our children in physical danger.
Today, Vicente Gonzalez is fighting for our South Texas values in Congress as a member of the Committees on Financial Services and Foreign Affairs and the Select Committee on Economic Disparity and Fairness in Growth. Vicente has stood by our promise to veterans, helping constituents cut through red tape at the VA and working across the aisle to prevent the shameful deportation of our honorably discharged veterans. He’s working to lower prescription drug prices, protect the benefits and healthcare of seniors, and ensure that jobs and opportunities are there for all with the ganas to work.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to
Vicente Gonzalez for US Congress
PO BOX 6270
Brownsville, TX 78523
JOIN TEAM VICENTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20240103_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Happy New Year, Peter.
body:
|
#
Happy new year, Peter! I am deeply grateful for your support and teamwork in 2023, and I look forward to all we will accomplish together in this new year. **I’m especially grateful for your incredible support for my re-election campaign, especially ahead of our most recent end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.** I know each of us had multiple priorities as we rounded out the year and the holiday season, and I can’t express enough how grateful I am for your support. While MAGA Republicans were dialing up right-wing megadonors and Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC was lining its pockets with corporate cash, this team was chipping in $5, $10, and $25 apiece to protect our razor-thin majority and support my fight for our working families, our planet, and our future. I was so proud to see this team step up and help us enter this critical election year on strong footing — and with all that’s at stake this year, this is exactly the approach we need to take in the coming months. Democrats have 23 Senate seats to defend this November, including mine. In battleground states across the country, Mitch McConnell is recruiting ultra-wealthy candidates who won’t hesitate to pour millions of their own money into nasty attack ads designed to stoke fear and promote their extremist agenda, which includes a nationwide abortion ban. But with a strong, grassroots team like this one on my side, _I like our chances._ We’ve overcome the odds so many times before, and with your continued support, we’ll have what it takes to fight back against whatever MAGA Republicans do to stop us. Mahalo and thank you for everything you do, Mazie | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76419888/447462328/296097457?refcode=AU_MKH_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20240103_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmRmNGEyMS03ZGFhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8f-OnyQ_vN5LleWJGNkiqEOx4BJ_6Cg6AqItUnIbM9U=)
---
Friends of Mazie Hirono
---
Friends of Mazie Hirono
335 Merchant Street
#677
Honolulu, HI 96809
United States

name: Mazi Pilip
subject: Breaking News: New York special election declared!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress
body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=28c55cdc13214edfb5288e5ac2309317&_e=qpFD3sp5Cm4jq1RCTKb3l_270u8WjrDpBpouT21fDmRyULp9MqXoZ-ca7KCfyJ4xAQhufJcS-ZHsqJJ90PdNU53Ceg3NoVRcOH4OZvMyrXoxxA450TMwXRcfoV8tVbEHsR0oJL3jxQ4-LVnNautslWfTkV5_xvApO4rHC7rFP1n-_D1gSRf1hhDba13nn8dhcrsNjFw9aSQz0Fv_7g_pMTwcpd4B_Y9wvgY-S5N6OEz-X8a_o9LzxhQSg5H0tNded-kO36MoVGTT140Q7NflW5LJ8LfTBAzeqn9GAf39xKB4QUPF8ZqBAI3D_XkRba4u57JzbMlyecjyRjQMuua1LYYaLpWouUnaolnYPPavbS5FhNZp4IeA4pnTJoCdXANecCIiz-qC4_Xi3_kCfXXbQS6XnhC4X_mejt-uvZTqINaIm_TWxPJHV_sUk0XIU_o0)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=28c55cdc13214edfb5288e5ac2309317&_e=qpFD3sp5Cm4jq1RCTKb3l_270u8WjrDpBpouT21fDmRyULp9MqXoZ-ca7KCfyJ4xAQhufJcS-ZHsqJJ90PdNU53Ceg3NoVRcOH4OZvMyrXoxxA450TMwXRcfoV8tVbEHsR0oJL3jxQ4-LVnNautslWfTkV5_xvApO4rHC7rFP1n-_D1gSRf1hhDba13nn8dhcrsNjFw9aSQz0Fv_7g_pMTwcpd4B_Y9wvgY-S5N6OEz-X8a_o9LzxhQSg5H0tNded-kO36MoVGTT140Q7NflW5LJ8LfTBAzeqn9GAf39xKBNbGzHFWGnWUr7fsqBsG-gwZ6yPYDpfv-FAwgxaIbIcctnfgztaX1i7thyF1a5SAilRX3T_XJCPb7gZQfWGZGGop-WDzVlp7XzasWwCW8WDLC9di6H-aFOgan-7JabFTZ7Ar5MptmdKmFDB7eSXAaC)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

clean_body: My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election | | | | | | Friend, I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress. My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short! I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared. If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority. I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family. Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed. They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things. And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials. They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative. And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them. The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me. | I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line. | | Early voting begins in just a few weeks. Voters are already planning to head to the polls & that makes this the most important race in the nation right now. I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority. | | And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word. All the best, Mazi Melesa Pilip GOP Nominee Special Election NY-03 | | | Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress 228 S Washington St STE 115 Alexandria, VA 22314

#
---
Friend, Thank you for your unwavering support last year. Whether you chipped in, added your name to a petition, responded to a survey, or simply read our emails to stay up to date with what we’ve been doing — every action makes a difference for our campaign. We recently learned our reelection campaign has raised over **$2 million** so far this election cycle, and I want you to know that none of this would be possible without you, so I’m incredibly grateful you're standing with us in this fight. **Now that we’ve entered the election year, we’ll need strong grassroots support to keep up the fight for families, farmers, and veterans across Central and Southern Illinois.** With multiple opponents vying to flip this seat, the path ahead won’t be easy, but together, I know we can meet this moment with the urgency it deserves because change can’t wait. The American people are waiting for us to secure the right to vote, defend reproductive freedom, lower childcare costs, and expand access to quality healthcare — **and I’m ready to deliver.** My work in Congress is just getting started, so I look forward to continuing working together to defend my seat in November. I hope your year is off to a great start! We’ll talk more soon, Nikki P.S. Peter,
Never in my wildest dreams did I expect to be the Republican Party’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks.
But if investigating Donald Trump for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, **so be it.**
If investigating and impeaching Donald Trump means Kevin McCarthy calling me a liar and kicking me off the Intelligence Committee, **so be it.**
And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me “shifty Schiff” or a “sleaze bag” for holding him to account again (and again, and again), **so be it.**
**I wear their enmity as a badge of honor. The insults and attacks show that they’re terrified of how effective I’ve been — and I’m not letting my foot off the gas when it comes to defending our democracy from MAGA extremists like Trump, Carlson, McCarthy, or anyone else.**

But if investigating Donald Trump for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, so be it. If investigating and impeaching Donald Trump means Kevin McCarthy calling me a liar and kicking me off the Intelligence Committee, so be it. And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me “shifty Schiff” or a “sleaze bag” for holding him to account again (and again, and again), so be it. I wear their enmity as a badge of honor. name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Thank you for an incredible 2023.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends -
Happy New Year! I hope you got some time to relax and reflect, spend time with family and friends, and enjoy some well-deserved time off after a long year over the last few days.
Today, I am just reaching out to say thank you.
You are an important part of this team. I want you to know how much your involvement means to the success of our movement, but also to me personally.
Knowing that folks like you continue to have my back in my newest endeavor is comforting and encouraging, to say the least. Together, we are going to continue to create real change for our country.
Thank you.
We sent a lot of fundraising requests before our important FEC deadline on the 31st, but know that it is because of contributions from people like you that make our movement possible.
Thousands of you showed up and understood how high the stakes of the 2024 election are. You gave our movement the support it needed, and with that continued support, we have no doubt that we can continue to impact critical races across the country through November.
But as we begin this challenging election year, we have no room to slow down. There is simply too much at stake.
[**So if you would like to help us start the election year off strong, please contribute $3 or whatever you can afford right now to our movement.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jan24.Ibl7yb&refcode=em240103-1-t3&t=1&akid=5124%2E196590%2E5HpAQM)
This team has shown up, time and time again. And I know that together, we will be able to elect changemaking candidates across the country that will take back the House and protect the Senate.
Thank you for being a part of this team and our movement. We have a long way to go, and I hope you will continue to stand by our side for The Long Run.
Happy New Year,
Mandela
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jan24.Ibl7yb&refcode=em240103-1-t3&t=2&akid=5124%2E196590%2E5HpAQM)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5124%2E196590%2E5HpAQM). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=5124%2E196590%2E5HpAQM)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=5124_196590_5HpAQM&akid=5124%2E196590%2E5HpAQM)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=5124%2E196590%2E5HpAQM)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Dean Team
subject: The polls keep getting worse for Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean 24
body:
https://www.dean24.com [https://www.dean24.com]
Hi Friend,
Over the past few months, we’ve seen support for President Biden collapse. It's not just the moment. Biden’s approval rating has steadily fallen since the spring.
Biden is down in Arizona, Georgia, Nevada, and Pennsylvania. Without these states, there is no path to victory. He hasn’t been on the campaign trail and his campaign and the Democratic National Committee have spent about $12 million dollars on swing state ads to boost the president’s numbers. And it’s not working.
He's got the lowest approval numbers of any president going into a presidential election in decades.
As Dean noted: “how can anyone read this and conclude that he’s positioned to defeat Donald Trump?”
https://news.gallup.com/poll/547763/biden-ends-2023-job-approval.aspx [https://news.gallup.com/poll/547763/biden-ends-2023-job-approval.aspx]
In 2018, Dean flipped his district red-to-blue, the first time since 1958. He knows how to talk to all Americans, and he knows how to win. The reason Trump is leading in the polls now is the same reason he won in 2016: Americans know the leaders of the past aren’t cutting it.
We’ve got a 50 state strategy that will not just win the primary, but the general, too. Could you donate $50 dollars to power our work in the months ahead? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=1.3.2024.Polls&amount=50]

**[Is the Mainstream Media honest?](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=cb1b33e341984c15b7cb52da6a2b6098&_e=4RUeRAnmdrsrMU4CKqZBAWKirLn-6crMSj1vF3LnluINEr7Ugb56McvQHZFpAZX_QagR_KMH54wiNR4O6VMDQp2f20PS0C3iyobhvVoFGmx2SBVoNTfEwCxKBCREHSbZBMiRXswAT4mb5n3Dr1v8oOtz53bCS4incwByKb5k7vtU1deTurvjRWYy34-VkuKaBmpYX0-9OF--pEpAT156LRXMdf1jtf2Ldb9GAP14bsrXQiHaKCK1RD7xlL-EdODk6KZmOw8a6ONmojTBQ441ir3VL3qSN8vJvIjF4qRUzGcB9POOHfVXp323u0bpqxC3SZTMnYc0n8BJZEhbjB1zAsj2S2lO0CzVbA8-vCDHWjV-ORRJ9-vS3q4H6d9gbcmpMtx8zpe5KIT3iENQz2PNhUxMWR_WeHdJR8P34mMEaH4%3D)

Fellow American, let us know what you think. We’re not afraid to stand up to the Establishment and the Left’s media machine. They know we are unafraid and that makes them afraid of us.

| [** RESPOND HERE **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=cb1b33e341984c15b7cb52da6a2b6098&_e=4RUeRAnmdrsrMU4CKqZBAWKirLn-6crMSj1vF3LnluINEr7Ugb56McvQHZFpAZX_QagR_KMH54wiNR4O6VMDQp2f20PS0C3iyobhvVoFGmx2SBVoNTfEwCxKBCREHSbZBMiRXswAT4mb5n3Dr1v8oOtz53bCS4incwByKb5k7vtU1deTurvjRWYy34-VkuKaBmpYX0-9OF--pEpAT156LRXMdf1jtf2Ldb9GAP14bsrXQiHaKCK1RD7xlL-EdODkJigbCJ9iBOBC0EqXjqrdz7k0b2ZWjc7ikVDdufLII_UkE1fAtf6mM4niZphX7YASW4f6X6caIFIlg3mhhsj0x4IZictKBgJA7ECrc6B3mibkZjYqOsezAwH0XAmgJqOgBMOhSyir7qKte3OGnvgeUduxPN4VHqMvPs24p9cblqo%3D)

First step to success for the GOP in 2024: show up. America First includes all Americans. Show up on college campuses. The inner city. Left-wing media. As candidates, we need to go where they tell us not to go. That’s the only way we revive open debate, and free speech: the ideals upon which this nation was founded.

Thank you,

Team Vivek

[** STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=cb1b33e341984c15b7cb52da6a2b6098&_e=4RUeRAnmdrsrMU4CKqZBAWKirLn-6crMSj1vF3LnluINEr7Ugb56McvQHZFpAZX_QagR_KMH54wiNR4O6VMDQp2f20PS0C3iyobhvVoFGmx2SBVoNTfEwCxKBCREHSbZBMiRXswAT4mb5n3Dr1v8oOtz53bCS4incwByKb5k7vtU1deTurvjRWYy34-VkuKaBmpYX0-9OF--pEpAT156LRXMdf1jtf2Ldb9GAP14bsrXQiHaKCK1RD7xlL-EdODkysHllTbu6Ak8CB4U4mKGEGTlPcfECbwKYcxVxIAAbNdzJB-4L-A1KhfQle0eBUFhx7LEL2ODj-q508BxRlZzo05lr1fTEzc8Puni-7H88VB6J6gxd7YyrDVuPvM8BUmuc9UoFT7T46xoVQJcC30WDmn2bX8mGLYveU5Wsx6CK-8%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Town halls are supposed to be an opportunity for candidates to connect with the voters and people of Iowa. The media had something else in mind. | | Fellow American, Town halls are supposed to be an opportunity for candidates to connect with the voters and people of Iowa. The media had something else in mind, instead choosing to drive a narrative. ◯ NO, PROPAGANDA FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT ◯ YES, I TRUST EVERYTHING I HEAR Fellow American, let us know what you think. We’re not afraid to stand up to the Establishment and the Left’s media machine. They know we are unafraid and that makes them afraid of us. | First step to success for the GOP in 2024: show up. America First includes all Americans. Show up on college campuses. The inner city. Left-wing media. As candidates, we need to go where they tell us not to go. That’s the only way we revive open debate, and free speech: the ideals upon which this nation was founded. Thank you, Team Vivek GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Binkley?=
subject: Ryan revs up for 2024
body:
| |
---
| | |
# Campaign News and Views
---
| [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=4d1090c1c4&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Happy New Year!
It's 2024 and the election is only ten months away. Ryan wants to _[shepherd](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=be4c866a6d&e=c1403f41d3)_ America into a time of union and prosperity, and you can help him achieve this by _[signing up](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=fb503ce1ec&e=c1403f41d3)_ for the Iowa Caucus on January 15th.
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=1305fd5ee8&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### CrossPolitic Studios
Ryan joins the CrossPolitic Podcast for a lively discussion on why he's running and his policy proposals for restoring our nation. _[Listen here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=701989e771&e=c1403f41d3)_
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=c4018cd21a&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Closing the Wealth Gap
Ryan wrote a guest column for the Des Moines Register. He critiques the flaws of Bidenomics and offers a different path for America. _[Read here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=4311fd0319&e=c1403f41d3)_
---
|
####
**Coming Up**

---
| |
---
### Landowner Rights Rally
Ryan will speak against the CO2 pipeline at a rally hosted by the Free Soil Coalition. The event begins at 6:00 PM tonight, at Ellsworth Community College, 1100 College Ave, Iowa Falls, IA.
---
| |
---
### Iowa Caucus Rally
Ryan will host his own rally on the eve of the Iowa Caucus. The Caucus is the first presidential primary and it plays a pivotal role in election year. The event will begin at 6:00 PM on January 14th, in the Holiday Inn on 6111 Fleur Drive, Des Moines, IA.
---
|
####
**How Can I Help?**
---
| [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=837b42b712&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Iowa Caucus Registration
The Iowa Caucus is the first presidential primary and it plays a pivotal role in election year politics. Can you join us in Iowa on January 15 to support Ryan at a local caucus meeting? [_Sign up here!_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=32181b4568&e=c1403f41d3)
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=a1db74044d&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### 90-Day Push to the Primaries
Will you help bolster our outreach to voters over the next 90 days? We're asking for dedicated volunteers to make calls to Iowa and New Hampshire voters. [_Sign up here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=2e7165d1d6&e=c1403f41d3)
---
|
---
| [Contribute Today!](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=6efe8da2a5&e=c1403f41d3 "Contribute Today!")
---
| • _**LIKE AND COMMENT**_ on all social media posts • A simple "I support Ryan Binkley for President" goes a long way!
• Ignore any argumentative comments that may follow
• Lastly, _**DONATE & SHARE**_ the link with everyone you know!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| _Coming up: Click[here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=3b32ed4026&e=c1403f41d3) to stay up to date with events._
---

---

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: Happy New Year, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
As we take this first step into 2024 I just wanted to take a moment to thank you for standing with me in this race.

[|
---](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/A74LC_ebS861lELAE5MYOg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRneF1UP0QeaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF0ZWVmYWhzaW1vbi5jb20vVwNzcGNCCmWUWtiVZccDtNtSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAR)
| | My beloved community – happy New Year. Happy Election Year! As we take this first step into 2024 I just wanted to take a moment to thank you for standing with me in this race. We have a tough fight ahead of us, but I've won tough fights before. And with your support, **we** can do it again. [**But here’s the bad news – last week, when we closed the books on our final FEC fundraising quarter of 2023, we still hadn’t met our digital goal.**](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/m70Qoul6ByGYk1Uc0MIrSg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRneF1UP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDEtMjRXA3NwY0IKZZRa2JVlxwO021IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~) We need to make up some ground (to that end, I’ll tell you about our BRAND NEW fundraising goal in just a second). Now, don’t get me wrong, I am still incredibly proud of what we raised. But the next month will be critical for this campaign and that’s because at the end of January, [our March 5th primary will truly be JUST around the corner. ](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/m70Qoul6ByGYk1Uc0MIrSg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRneF1UP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDEtMjRXA3NwY0IKZZRa2JVlxwO021IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~) That's why I'm turning to you, our supporters, to help us bridge the gap. I’ve talked to my campaign team about what we need to get done in order to make up some of the ground we lost and together we came up with a new ONE WEEK GOAL: [**$2,000**](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/m70Qoul6ByGYk1Uc0MIrSg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRneF1UP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDEtMjRXA3NwY0IKZZRa2JVlxwO021IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~) [**$2,000 in one week.**](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/m70Qoul6ByGYk1Uc0MIrSg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRneF1UP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDEtMjRXA3NwY0IKZZRa2JVlxwO021IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~) That is what it’s going to take to get us back on track and it’s a number I know this team can reach because we have done it before. But if too many folks ignore this message we’ll fall short again, and we just can’t afford that. To accomplish all that we need to do between now and Election Day we are going to need resources – resources that we fell just short of last month, and last year. [So please, be a part of the community that comes together to help us reach our one week goal. ](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/m70Qoul6ByGYk1Uc0MIrSg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRneF1UP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDEtMjRXA3NwY0IKZZRa2JVlxwO021IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~) | | [Donate](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/m70Qoul6ByGYk1Uc0MIrSg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRneF1UP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDEtMjRXA3NwY0IKZZRa2JVlxwO021IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~)
---
Your contribution will go directly into our campaign efforts, from organizing grassroots events to reaching out to voters who are ready to join this growing team.
Again, thank you for your support in this fight. I am so proud to have people like you on my team, Friend.
Onward,
Lateefah
| Paid for by Lateefah for Congress.
---

Hung Cao came to America with little besides the clothes on his back, and after his 25-year career in the Navy, he’s not done fighting for our future.
