body:
With less than two weeks until the first votes take place, I want to share a personal note with you.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3462184881f14d1e83aeada3a520c488&_e=XXDiNZ2RwIQ9GBT2vAQPjFH8TRXX_48mglkZYvj4_LAykAH3Jc7uucaxFcANWLGp76vaWLLOb-_fCRcK_fHs99sLyfJWI-AD2H4pHMImdsebBIFhPew411fuzD29H0XqtyEnBUJgpnmb8sc_x2LvpcCTm0_NvvX0pDuoelnZXpl4LW21wmkLlXw4r5O8CeuemEB89rCZ8sSLJwW1jA13HFRxu1PfZPHaI1ThH4922VfckBQZfKVM9mo_athrP11w_en1nOA9dWkobgKzcHr7nwEHh3pY_mTCUB3x_17d91ZW3dhgJU2kjbExV16GX6EvGwfBnuY2G3l5qC_r00ouBxf7SAVNzjG3i19nlZuwku76lwazb5_2TFE0AwWVFrUp3LVx5wRX54lPIbLdvsbtFPEJF3kpjDa872-4V-eeAtmK_iw4X3awyIRBVglH9PI9w-3pQuzpBHSiMkuMv97ou_D3wHEzipHwCN5jqrt_p3JwfOq1Z0A_aijqN7nfxIgI279qy-nP7pCWsNpI6xcEBXgo3dQC-z5-_nIxST20ZKeXlrRAIUXF0tj-Dpjn_H6MZsgT2KjaHUDRzB7r4NlHoUo2eOoVkgn1ktXQcMdHz-tnOwAmEgwp39XDToK7PTzlk_ls3jK8d8uHzD6PI-vdiw%3D%3D)
---

Friend,

With less than two weeks until the first votes take place, I want to share a personal note with you.

**[After you finish reading, please consider sending a donation to help fuel my campaign before the first votes take place in just two weeks.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3462184881f14d1e83aeada3a520c488&_e=XXDiNZ2RwIQ9GBT2vAQPjFH8TRXX_48mglkZYvj4_LAykAH3Jc7uucaxFcANWLGp76vaWLLOb-_fCRcK_fHs99sLyfJWI-AD2H4pHMImdsebBIFhPew411fuzD29H0XqtyEnBUJgpnmb8sc_x2LvpcCTm0_NvvX0pDuoelnZXpl4LW21wmkLlXw4r5O8CeuemEB89rCZ8sSLJwW1jA13HFRxu1PfZPHaI1ThH4922VfckBQZfKVM9mo_athrP11w_en1nOA9dWkobgKzcHr7nwEHh3pY_mTCUB3x_17d91ZW3dhgJU2kjbExV16GX6EvGwfBnuY2G3l5qC_r00ouBxf7SAVNzjG3i19nlZuwku76lwazb5_2TFE0AwWVFrUp3LVx5wRX54lPIbLdvsbtFPEJF3kpjDa872-4V-eeAtmK_iw4X3awyIRBVglH9PI9w-3pQuzpBHSiMkuMv97ou_D3wHEzipHwCN5jqrt_p3KTeVCQnZw0PftJeLbphUX6-MXxAwXzmnj9q-qJ-Cu7944D_EXC-YpGj6ERllVrjwogn7N6zisLCfnc4o_2WDQyrv05u5e1U6ur7HHqZiuSKzymUWgqT6UCAqRW97ygs6Pm2vR8Yt4o-CON9kxHX-rPPifHxOLu_1gq89lbx5irzQ%3D%3D "After you finish reading, please consider sending a donation to help fuel my campaign before the first votes take place in just two weeks. ")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for president, I've been blessed with a team of supporters like you who've been there every step of the way.

Running for president isn't easy. There's little sleep, lots of travel, and the higher you rise in the polls, the more attacks there are to fend off.

**I 'm running for president because we have a country to save**, and I've been reminded of how important that is every step of the way.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3462184881f14d1e83aeada3a520c488&_e=XXDiNZ2RwIQ9GBT2vAQPjFH8TRXX_48mglkZYvj4_LAykAH3Jc7uucaxFcANWLGp76vaWLLOb-_fCRcK_fHs99sLyfJWI-AD2H4pHMImdsebBIFhPew411fuzD29H0XqtyEnBUJgpnmb8sc_x2LvpcCTm0_NvvX0pDuoelnZXpl4LW21wmkLlXw4r5O8CeuemEB89rCZ8sSLJwW1jA13HFRxu1PfZPHaI1ThH4922VfckBQZfKVM9mo_athrP11w_en1nOA9dWkobgKzcHr7nwEHh3pY_mTCUB3x_17d91ZW3dhgJU2kjbExV16GX6EvGwfBnuY2G3l5qC_r00ouBxf7SAVNzjG3i19nlZuwku76lwazb5_2TFE0AwWVFrUp3LVx5wRX54lPIbLdvsbtFPEJF3kpjDa872-4V-eeAtmK_iw4X3awyIRBVglH9PI9w-3pQuzpBHSiMkuMv97ou_D3wHEzipHwCN5jqrt_p3KO1tr5eZ5_T3f8RucVPSPbwrbDqVOfB9qBDiqNuYeLhRLRKupQpEZ_higQXauHHl1RtJ1twM7Md-uFs40XwVtjckSQGVV6pncJWkXIADb9bjP2Mysal1EFfch3huKrmV70OXn2nIzhDnNG0YvdKBjdBYJ6g5i4379IZUdON3R3xA%3D%3D)
---

A few months after I launched my campaign, I dropped my husband, Michael, who is a combat veteran, off at 4 am for another year-long deployment. I watched him and 230 soldiers pick up their two duffle bags of belongings to go to a country they have never been to, all in the name of protecting America. **If they are willing to protect us from there, we should be willing to fight for America here.**

I'm running because I want my husband and his military brothers and sisters to know that their sacrifice means something - _that we do love this country._

I'm also running for president because I want my kids and our future generations to experience everything the American Dream has to offer.

I'm blessed to have amazing kids. My daughter, Rena, has been there at every debate, cheering me on.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3462184881f14d1e83aeada3a520c488&_e=XXDiNZ2RwIQ9GBT2vAQPjFH8TRXX_48mglkZYvj4_LAykAH3Jc7uucaxFcANWLGp76vaWLLOb-_fCRcK_fHs99sLyfJWI-AD2H4pHMImdsebBIFhPew411fuzD29H0XqtyEnBUJgpnmb8sc_x2LvpcCTm0_NvvX0pDuoelnZXpl4LW21wmkLlXw4r5O8CeuemEB89rCZ8sSLJwW1jA13HFRxu1PfZPHaI1ThH4922VfckBQZfKVM9mo_athrP11w_en1nOA9dWkobgKzcHr7nwEHh3pY_mTCUB3x_17d91ZW3dhgJU2kjbExV16GX6EvGwfBnuY2G3l5qC_r00ouBxf7SAVNzjG3i19nlZuwku76lwazb5_2TFE0AwWVFrUp3LVx5wRX54lPIbLdvsbtFPEJF3kpjDa872-4V-eeAtmK_iw4X3awyIRBVglH9PI9w-3pQuzpBHSiMkuMv97ou_D3wHEzipHwCN5jqrt_p3J92K3EPP35V_P8rbP8dPy2VebE5yb9y5i5QAbNLp9AJgGqbfYp44mz-HrZjiBkIpTTECEljlbdDl_6iL45Y0DCrB39TplaLU70DK4JZFMIC96ETIaS_JzBWQXcM4C_4RaDgIXoSXljwBMBjYsEV_oiup1y67s29oOfpCeIVgij6Q%3D%3D)
---

My son, Nalin, makes time over his college breaks to join me on the campaign trail - in fact, he was with me in Iowa this past weekend.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3462184881f14d1e83aeada3a520c488&_e=XXDiNZ2RwIQ9GBT2vAQPjFH8TRXX_48mglkZYvj4_LAykAH3Jc7uucaxFcANWLGp76vaWLLOb-_fCRcK_fHs99sLyfJWI-AD2H4pHMImdsebBIFhPew411fuzD29H0XqtyEnBUJgpnmb8sc_x2LvpcCTm0_NvvX0pDuoelnZXpl4LW21wmkLlXw4r5O8CeuemEB89rCZ8sSLJwW1jA13HFRxu1PfZPHaI1ThH4922VfckBQZfKVM9mo_athrP11w_en1nOA9dWkobgKzcHr7nwEHh3pY_mTCUB3x_17d91ZW3dhgJU2kjbExV16GX6EvGwfBnuY2G3l5qC_r00ouBxf7SAVNzjG3i19nlZuwku76lwazb5_2TFE0AwWVFrUp3LVx5wRX54lPIbLdvsbtFPEJF3kpjDa872-4V-eeAtmK_iw4X3awyIRBVglH9PI9w-3pQuzpBHSiMkuMv97ou_D3wHEzipHwCN5jqrt_p3Llpjnf_38grA4RSHPdpfhh0yK88PS-0SyPOSraFalzxsqUfjml-0-nxL79Qy7QVKnaDS-Sq8uempiwQ55AriyzbD1YN4F5jVK09qdYiroQoaPQ5wFg919cKyTrYiMDKeJ0tFNFs9cNWjvwY97J-f5_DHU4AjAHQj_KN7zJCirnHg%3D%3D)
---

But I also know that times are tough, and America can be doing so much better. Earlier this year, I watched my daughter, Rena, marry her high school sweetheart. It was a joyous occasion. But, I also watched how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3462184881f14d1e83aeada3a520c488&_e=XXDiNZ2RwIQ9GBT2vAQPjFH8TRXX_48mglkZYvj4_LAykAH3Jc7uucaxFcANWLGp76vaWLLOb-_fCRcK_fHs99sLyfJWI-AD2H4pHMImdsebBIFhPew411fuzD29H0XqtyEnBUJgpnmb8sc_x2LvpcCTm0_NvvX0pDuoelnZXpl4LW21wmkLlXw4r5O8CeuemEB89rCZ8sSLJwW1jA13HFRxu1PfZPHaI1ThH4922VfckBQZfKVM9mo_athrP11w_en1nOA9dWkobgKzcHr7nwEHh3pY_mTCUB3x_17d91ZW3dhgJU2kjbExV16GX6EvGwfBnuY2G3l5qC_r00ouBxf7SAVNzjG3i19nlZuwku76lwazb5_2TFE0AwWVFrUp3LVx5wRX54lPIbLdvsbtFPEJF3kpjDa872-4V-eeAtmK_iw4X3awyIRBVglH9PI9w-3pQuzpBHSiMkuMv97ou_D3wHEzipHwCN5jqrt_p3JzCisftgQDKaKzlBe2Ir2Pk1j5KCbuRQNdE1KneJvLHKIzuNK3CvJcwAmR8m6jAMoT2WfmJFl7fB864EFjCkMU6wBN_8Jwqci230LeLUuthSN1y5o4kO4wrfvBex2n-LV_YKyQ1KuNGgkJWpyQKltOKo5z3ckX4GDVO4KzcL3x2A%3D%3D)
---

Last year, I dropped my son, Nalin, off at college for his senior year at Villanova. I know that he shouldn't have to write papers he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3462184881f14d1e83aeada3a520c488&_e=XXDiNZ2RwIQ9GBT2vAQPjFH8TRXX_48mglkZYvj4_LAykAH3Jc7uucaxFcANWLGp76vaWLLOb-_fCRcK_fHs99sLyfJWI-AD2H4pHMImdsebBIFhPew411fuzD29H0XqtyEnBUJgpnmb8sc_x2LvpcCTm0_NvvX0pDuoelnZXpl4LW21wmkLlXw4r5O8CeuemEB89rCZ8sSLJwW1jA13HFRxu1PfZPHaI1ThH4922VfckBQZfKVM9mo_athrP11w_en1nOA9dWkobgKzcHr7nwEHh3pY_mTCUB3x_17d91ZW3dhgJU2kjbExV16GX6EvGwfBnuY2G3l5qC_r00ouBxf7SAVNzjG3i19nlZuwku76lwazb5_2TFE0AwWVFrUp3LVx5wRX54lPIbLdvsbtFPEJF3kpjDa872-4V-eeAtmK_iw4X3awyIRBVglH9PI9w-3pQuzpBHSiMkuMv97ou_D3wHEzipHwCN5jqrt_p3JpXHXeDZ_RPYoPl-znKrRIWW58Md4DLF4-bA6qQBGAi0_RgiWNdWP7VV-6aMs1GTwDfGl2mHPqsncyrBB882Cjvgcg8FJNYxwZPADencwvHk6Hi0554MfyZkdVxQyvyHIyydCkZb6cskoETvK2Q_K9j5kg_oGLX2nbSbu4Mrz9JA%3D%3D)
---

**We 've got a country to save. Together, we can save her. It's why I'm running for president.**

_**And it 's why I haven't stopped fighting for a single moment.**_

I've held **over 180 campaign events** where I shake every hand, meet every voter, and answer every question.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3462184881f14d1e83aeada3a520c488&_e=XXDiNZ2RwIQ9GBT2vAQPjFH8TRXX_48mglkZYvj4_LAykAH3Jc7uucaxFcANWLGp76vaWLLOb-_fCRcK_fHs99sLyfJWI-AD2H4pHMImdsebBIFhPew411fuzD29H0XqtyEnBUJgpnmb8sc_x2LvpcCTm0_NvvX0pDuoelnZXpl4LW21wmkLlXw4r5O8CeuemEB89rCZ8sSLJwW1jA13HFRxu1PfZPHaI1ThH4922VfckBQZfKVM9mo_athrP11w_en1nOA9dWkobgKzcHr7nwEHh3pY_mTCUB3x_17d91ZW3dhgJU2kjbExV16GX6EvGwfBnuY2G3l5qC_r00ouBxf7SAVNzjG3i19nlZuwku76lwazb5_2TFE0AwWVFrUp3LVx5wRX54lPIbLdvsbtFPEJF3kpjDa872-4V-eeAtmK_iw4X3awyIRBVglH9PI9w-3pQuzpBHSiMkuMv97ou_D3wHEzipHwCN5jqrt_p3IvTGL336vV1s7fwwgaFHFg4hA5Fed2fFzBH9y7q76ZBCqCA-UI7EaUIDNLzh34mDqvIHRuuie4lX0iAMhoyfHGIfPlhnLDnwhnEHmlZzFwNJRYpXhKC1wUQu5GbccM-CExe5Az_HJJwM3bCjRoI9KOFPymU-GRErabq8_eRQ6ayg%3D%3D)
---

I've **won four debates** and we still have more to come.

I've surged to **second in the polls** and I am within **striking distance of winning New Hampshire.**

We have a scrappy but amazing campaign team, we're spending our money wisely, and we're pouring our all into each and every day.

**But, I also have to give credit to people like you who have supported my campaign every step of the way._Grassroots supporters are the reason we are closer than ever to VICTORY. _**

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3462184881f14d1e83aeada3a520c488&_e=XXDiNZ2RwIQ9GBT2vAQPjFH8TRXX_48mglkZYvj4_LAykAH3Jc7uucaxFcANWLGp76vaWLLOb-_fCRcK_fHs99sLyfJWI-AD2H4pHMImdsebBIFhPew411fuzD29H0XqtyEnBUJgpnmb8sc_x2LvpcCTm0_NvvX0pDuoelnZXpl4LW21wmkLlXw4r5O8CeuemEB89rCZ8sSLJwW1jA13HFRxu1PfZPHaI1ThH4922VfckBQZfKVM9mo_athrP11w_en1nOA9dWkobgKzcHr7nwEHh3pY_mTCUB3x_17d91ZW3dhgJU2kjbExV16GX6EvGwfBnuY2G3l5qC_r00ouBxf7SAVNzjG3i19nlZuwku76lwazb5_2TFE0AwWVFrUp3LVx5wRX54lPIbLdvsbtFPEJF3kpjDa872-4V-eeAtmK_iw4X3awyIRBVglH9PI9w-3pQuzpBHSiMkuMv97ou_D3wHEzipHwCN5jqrt_p3KUmdIG6ymzE_1KARxzWdl9WZe3tIT_MVdauRcYdmx16QWYfP-726_iVBptISfTMiFxP_hJigh5TvaLhxyNxAR3EAkfvYB2OH1YIIrClsbNxItcR7F0qagmXjONOSrOoMdO3HTEEwrjiekcmWms1k7_EmZuwhLWMy-xggvEVDm7aQ%3D%3D)
---

Now, we have less than two weeks until the first votes take place in Iowa. And then, 8 days later, New Hampshire will go to the polls.

We can't waste a single moment. Not when the future of our country is on the line.

**[So will you please step up with a generous donation to help fuel this critical stretch of my campaign and amplify our get out the vote efforts ahead of the first-in-the-nation caucuses in just two weeks?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3462184881f14d1e83aeada3a520c488&_e=XXDiNZ2RwIQ9GBT2vAQPjFH8TRXX_48mglkZYvj4_LAykAH3Jc7uucaxFcANWLGp76vaWLLOb-_fCRcK_fHs99sLyfJWI-AD2H4pHMImdsebBIFhPew411fuzD29H0XqtyEnBUJgpnmb8sc_x2LvpcCTm0_NvvX0pDuoelnZXpl4LW21wmkLlXw4r5O8CeuemEB89rCZ8sSLJwW1jA13HFRxu1PfZPHaI1ThH4922VfckBQZfKVM9mo_athrP11w_en1nOA9dWkobgKzcHr7nwEHh3pY_mTCUB3x_17d91ZW3dhgJU2kjbExV16GX6EvGwfBnuY2G3l5qC_r00ouBxf7SAVNzjG3i19nlZuwku76lwazb5_2TFE0AwWVFrUp3LVx5wRX54lPIbLdvsbtFPEJF3kpjDa872-4V-eeAtmK_iw4X3awyIRBVglH9PI9w-3pQuzpBHSiMkuMv97ou_D3wHEzipHwCN5jqrt_p3KVev79_BCBCigYU2DqNeSdjIvBx9Tt-vKgU7PtFNOTSxA-CYtFQ8MQV59iqqotIPCtJPkRk9c8nEwssx84oKUomi1ngKKMu8OjQ8BccCrBlNosvVuoY-gB26PmAXMZ2cnPlry6WRfOvN-gPKwOrWk0c4pNm3Vm40Qde0-CphvUiQ%3D%3D "So will you please step up with a generous donation to help fuel this critical stretch of my campaign and amplify our get out the vote efforts ahead of the first-in-the-nation caucuses in just two weeks?")**

_**Whether it 's $5 or $100, your donation will go a long way in helping us win the fight to save our future.**_

Thank you for everything.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3462184881f14d1e83aeada3a520c488&_e=XXDiNZ2RwIQ9GBT2vAQPjFH8TRXX_48mglkZYvj4_LAykAH3Jc7uucaxFcANWLGp2NN_Pa7ZypeUINoCqXppCZohMz2Qdm-3vFZ5PzpfI4gvVzMD8EIPF36JL46kNnMoTlmFTtTbsL0ApHs6_lbFErFYXLcjPzsKnBMlseLng4JX9jAVLd1SI8Dcm5MxflnmQnb3Egt04hn-JqvVB5kinmRYVWGzT9oMuEovD6ZlSTQkXOyk4_B85JxtS3N4-9KnEVWXUbi3Jj3EXDjozGl4cN1pmz0Eas9c0j1y5FwK2E8WhjiJXKO2iQQHccN74x5SjbJfHS817UOkJcZqjthyrpw_qSYn9wAIvugAKK0OFGCh_Be0imij6fkkSLioYMOb-4EkZSUk6BMdGHGUEkhaX9vUQb0IynI1GyAflMUVN98UiyBjSIclo5JOGSQlC7_aJGmw5MDtxb3xEVy09aPojnAy1m6vItpTL2oA9N3ltNdo1AvCAkskNEuVbsyUeEkItVKrMHJgWe6YebS_LPYFlAakpgYMyk3YMQvs1jjl6h84xF8mg-xSs19TJwXF7e0Ed0qc_15_NVihJKIOczXwIfbuOf1dKInMeVcIiHL8rqUnh4XkdD7E6evss5-z0valMDYKWdlh2DqoW6CJ-oF_VQ%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

"After you finish reading, please consider sending a donation to help fuel my campaign before the first votes take place in just two weeks. " Ever since I launched my campaign for president, I've been blessed with a team of supporters like you who've been there every step of the way. Running for president isn't easy. There's little sleep, lots of travel, and the higher you rise in the polls, the more attacks there are to fend off. I 'm running for president because we have a country to save, and I've been reminded of how important that is every step of the way. | A few months after I launched my campaign, I dropped my husband, Michael, who is a combat veteran, off at 4 am for another year-long deployment. I watched him and 230 soldiers pick up their two duffle bags of belongings to go to a country they have never been to, all in the name of protecting America. If they are willing to protect us from there, we should be willing to fight for America here. I'm running because I want my husband and his military brothers and sisters to know that their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm also running for president because I want my kids and our future generations to experience everything the American Dream has to offer. I'm blessed to have amazing kids. My daughter, Rena, has been there at every debate, cheering me on. | My son, Nalin, makes time over his college breaks to join me on the campaign trail - in fact, he was with me in Iowa this past weekend. | But I also know that times are tough, and America can be doing so much better. Earlier this year, I watched my daughter, Rena, marry her high school sweetheart. It was a joyous occasion. But, I also watched how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. | Last year, I dropped my son, Nalin, off at college for his senior year at Villanova. I know that he shouldn't have to write papers he doesn't believe in just to get an A. | We 've got a country to save. Together, we can save her. It's why I'm running for president. And it 's why I haven't stopped fighting for a single moment. I've held over 180 campaign events where I shake every hand, meet every voter, and answer every question. | I've won four debates and we still have more to come. I've surged to second in the polls and I am within striking distance of winning New Hampshire. We have a scrappy but amazing campaign team, we're spending our money wisely, and we're pouring our all into each and every day. But, I also have to give credit to people like you who have supported my campaign every step of the way.Grassroots supporters are the reason we are closer than ever to VICTORY. | Now, we have less than two weeks until the first votes take place in Iowa. And then, 8 days later, New Hampshire will go to the polls. We can't waste a single moment. Not when the future of our country is on the line. "So will you please step up with a generous donation to help fuel this critical stretch of my campaign and amplify our get out the vote efforts ahead of the first-in-the-nation caucuses in just two weeks?" Whether it 's $5 or $100, your donation will go a long way in helping us win the fight to save our future. Thank you for everything. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: Courier HQ
subject: Is Fox News turning on Trump? If only!
body:
Many in the media have been working hard to push the narrative that Fox News has somehow “turned” on Donald Trump.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76420690/447465510/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDc5YTVlOGQtODNhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ckeQL6ZF-yoMpwUSbQbqjpsVmALX1e3oi7xZL7SLbS8=&emci=101e0e87-83aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=d79a5e8d-83aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
For a while now, many in the media have been working hard to push the narrative that Fox News has somehow “turned” on Donald Trump since last year:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76420692/447465513/-2046890113?refcode=em20240103&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDc5YTVlOGQtODNhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ckeQL6ZF-yoMpwUSbQbqjpsVmALX1e3oi7xZL7SLbS8=)
We keep a close eye on this kind of thing, and all we can say is: **If only!**
**In reality, Fox has doubled down on their support for Trump and MAGA Republicans like him:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76420694/447465517/-544721142?refcode=em20240103&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDc5YTVlOGQtODNhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ckeQL6ZF-yoMpwUSbQbqjpsVmALX1e3oi7xZL7SLbS8=)
And this is exactly why we need your help to keep up our work at Courier, Peter.
Across ten battleground states, our journalists are working hard to **provide high-quality journalism** to communities that need it, **call out misinformation** wherever it appears, and **push back** against Fox’s profit-driven coverage.
At Courier, all of our stories are free to read online — no paywalls, no subscription fees. But while it helps to keep our stories accurate, it also means we rely on supporters like you to keep the lights on.
[**So as we enter one of the most consequential election years in decades, will you pitch in $5 to help us keep providing a high-quality alternative to the profit-driven coverage on Fox News and in the mainstream media?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76420695/447465518/-544721142?refcode=em20240103&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDc5YTVlOGQtODNhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ckeQL6ZF-yoMpwUSbQbqjpsVmALX1e3oi7xZL7SLbS8=)
**[Donate Now ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76420696/447465519/-544721142?refcode=em20240103&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDc5YTVlOGQtODNhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ckeQL6ZF-yoMpwUSbQbqjpsVmALX1e3oi7xZL7SLbS8=)**
Thank you,

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Thank you so much, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS
body:
I'm moved, humbled, and deeply grateful for your support.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76421027/447466629/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240103_mk_EOY_thanks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTQ3Yzg0Ny04NGFhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M1mB8NMWpqIR_03ovqYVRE4cF0iye94mDsnI7wXmD6M=)
---
Thank you so much, friend. We recently closed the books on our final fundraising quarter of 2023. We're still crunching the numbers, but thanks to our incredible supporters, _**we're poised to file the best FEC report of our campaign so far.**_ I can't overstate how moved, humbled, and deeply grateful I am for your support. We're in an extremely tight race to defend our frontline district in November, and meeting these deadlines is exactly what we need to do to win. Together, I know we can continue delivering big victories for Northern Ohio — like lower healthcare and prescription drug costs, stronger environmental protections, and an economy that finally works for workers. I can't wait to get to work. Thank you so much, friend, and Happy New Year to you and your loved ones! — Marcy

| Marcy Kaptur is the longest-serving woman in Congress. But right now Republicans are trying everything to steal this seat from her. Winning seats like this will be key for Democrats to hold onto our slim majority in Congress.

clean_body: I'm moved, humbled, and deeply grateful for your support. | | = Thank you so much, friend. We recently closed the books on our final fundraising quarter of 2023. We're still crunching the numbers, but thanks to our incredible supporters, we're poised to file the best FEC report of our campaign so far. I can't overstate how moved, humbled, and deeply grateful I am for your support. We're in an extremely tight race to defend our frontline district in November, and meeting these deadlines is exactly what we need to do to win. Together, I know we can continue delivering big victories for Northern Ohio — like lower healthcare and prescription drug costs, stronger environmental protections, and an economy that finally works for workers. I can't wait to get to work. Thank you so much, friend, and Happy New Year to you and your loved ones! — Marcy | Marcy Kaptur is the longest-serving woman in Congress. But right now Republicans are trying everything to steal this seat from her. Winning seats like this will be key for Democrats to hold onto our slim majority in Congress. Can you donate now to help Democrat Marcy Kaptur win in one of the most competitive races in the whole country? = = PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . I've been a bit of a troublemaker in Washington for, well, decades. And I’m proud to still be at it.

Throughout my life, I have found activism the best antidote to despair. It’s why I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to break the fossil fuel industry's stranglehold on politics and elect climate champions in crucial races around the country.

And I am so grateful that you are a part of it.

That’s why today, instead of asking you for a contribution to our movement, I want to know what your issues are and what your activism looks like. **_[Take a few minutes to dive into our 2024 Priorities Survey and tell me what you think our priorities should be. Your honest opinion _matters_ >>> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76421032/447466663/-1799277772?refcode=ea.ba173569-84aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.ba173569-84aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhMTczNTY5LTg0YWEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vMa_y1JXqSHJKIzuTcNk14f6_F-ayjwaNZrCIeTW3Ps=&emci=b2173569-84aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ba173569-84aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4823105)_**
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76421033/447466664/-1799277772?refcode=ea.ba173569-84aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.ba173569-84aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhMTczNTY5LTg0YWEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vMa_y1JXqSHJKIzuTcNk14f6_F-ayjwaNZrCIeTW3Ps=&emci=b2173569-84aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ba173569-84aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4823105)
---
It's no secret that 2024 will be a make-or-break year for climate action.

**Big Oil will spend millions to keep their fossil fuel allies safe in Washington.**

**In California, Big Oil is fighting for a ballot measure that would OVERTURN a critical law banning new oil drilling next to homes, schools, and daycare centers.**

**And they’re targeting state legislature races to flip the balance of power in swing states.**

I’m ready to fight like hell to save our planet, but that's why your opinion matters more than ever. Your responses will help my team and me understand what you think our main focus should be in the new year.

**_[I promise it will be quick and easy. Click here to take our 2024 Priorities Survey today!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76421034/447466665/-1799277772?refcode=ea.ba173569-84aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.ba173569-84aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhMTczNTY5LTg0YWEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vMa_y1JXqSHJKIzuTcNk14f6_F-ayjwaNZrCIeTW3Ps=&emci=b2173569-84aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ba173569-84aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4823105)_**

Friend,
This year, we, as Americans, will be faced with the most consequential choice of our lives.
Do we drop to our knees and allow left-wing tyrants to overthrow our elections and destroy the United States of America as we know it?
Or... _do we choose to band together as patriots to cast out the corrupt ruling class, reclaim our God-given rights, and save the greatest nation in history?_
The entire world knows I’ve made my choice. I’m willing to go to jail as an innocent man if that’s the price that must be paid to save America.
Now that we are officially in 2024, I am asking you to make _your_ choice, Friend.
_Of course, if you are doing poorly due to those sinister people in Washington who will be FIRED on November 5, 2024, then please don’t even think about donating. Our movement is all about putting America First – so I will always want to make sure that you are putting your own needs and priorities first. And come January 20, 2025, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!_

clean_body: | ~ Peter, here's my takeaway from last year's elections: Young people did the damn thing. | 🗣️ In Ohio, 77% of young voters casted a ballot to enshrine the right to abortion access. 🗣️ Young voters in Ohio also voted 84% in favor of legalizing recreational marijuana use. 🗣️ Young people in deep-red Kentucky reelected Democratic Gov. Andy Beshear over his anti-choice Republican opponent. 🗣️ In Virginia, young voters DELIVERED Democrats full control of the state legislature, ending Gov. Glenn Youngkin’s hopes for passing an abortion ban. But now, Republicans are TERRIFIED and desperate to stop young people from rising up in this year's election, so I need your help. With so much on the line – like taking action on gun violence, protecting abortion access, and ensuring our democracy stays intact – young people are paying attention. And we’re seeing the results of that in real time. In Ohio, Kentucky, Virginia, and right here in Florida, young people are the driving force for change. That’s why we launched student organizing teams – to travel to college campuses across Florida and bring even more people into our youth-powered movement. But while we organize, GOP leaders are desperate to silence us. That’s why they’re targeting peaceful protests, suppressing our voting power, and even plotting to defeat me – just so they can keep us from having a seat at the table.** So to keep our youth-powered movement strong in the face of GOP attacks, I’ll need an unstoppable grassroots movement behind me. | | | ~~ | ~~ ~ Don’t sit this one out, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. He isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you become a Founding Donor of this movement today? | ~ | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .

name: John Fetterman
subject: *Super* quick email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here’s the deal.
#
Heyyyyy Derek, it's John. We're all getting back in the swing of things in the new year, so I'll keep this *super* quick.
From Day One, our campaign has been 100% grassroots-powered -- and donations to emails like this are a huuuuge part of how we'll keep up the fight for PA, especially in 2024.
**[So Derek, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can today? Every donation, big or small, has a direct impact on our work and sets us up for success in 2024.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240103-1?refcode=em20240103-1-8735&refcode2=8735_434096_r5JuaV&akid=8735%2E434096%2Er5JuaV)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240103-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240103-8735&refcode2=8735_434096_r5JuaV&akid=8735%2E434096%2Er5JuaV)**
Thank you, thank you, thank you,
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240103-8735-footer&t=1&refcode2=8735_434096_r5JuaV&akid=8735%2E434096%2Er5JuaV)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8735%2E434096%2Er5JuaV)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8735%2E434096%2Er5JuaV)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Fellow American,
---
We’re now in the 2024 election year, which means it’s **officially time to PUSH!** The clocking is counting down to the most important election of our lifetime, and I need your help. I needed a great team by my side serving America as a Green Beret, and I’ll need a great team to win this race and serve as your Congressman. A vote for Republicans this election cycle is a vote for border security, fixing inflation, safe communities, and protecting our children. _And a vote for the Left is abandoning our American ideal in favor of the revisionist woke agenda._ We cannot let America go down the path the radical Democrats have planned. I know I can trust you, and now that it matters most, I’m _really counting on you to step up._ **[It’s time to pick up the fight for America. clean_body: | | | Fellow American, We’re now in the 2024 election year, which means it’s officially time to PUSH! The clocking is counting down to the most important election of our lifetime, and I need your help. I needed a great team by my side serving America as a Green Beret, and I’ll need a great team to win this race and serve as your Congressman. A vote for Republicans this election cycle is a vote for border security, fixing inflation, safe communities, and protecting our children. And a vote for the Left is abandoning our American ideal in favor of the revisionist woke agenda. We cannot let America go down the path the radical Democrats have planned. I know I can trust you, and now that it matters most, I’m really counting on you to step up. Thank you, Pat Harrigan | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Katie Porter
subject: Is your 2024 goal to become a more engaged citizen?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I’m here to help!
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=35865%2E3422442%2Ee7VcIm)
Derek,
It’s goal setting season, and if you’re looking to be a more engaged citizen in this important election year, I’m here to help!
1. Attend a city council meeting or elected official’s town hall. You might be surprised by what you learn!
2. Stay up to date on the news, or take a deep dive into a new topic. I recommend checking a reliable news source before you check your social media feed. [And a shameless plug—follow me on Substack!](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19217?t=2&akid=35865%2E3422442%2Ee7VcIm) The newsletters will come straight to your inbox, and there’s no charge for this subscription. While I’m going to have to send a lot of fundraising emails here over the next two months, **Substack is where I write more in depth about topics like housing affordability and airline policy.**
3. Volunteer with a campaign. If you’re in a swing state, you’ll find lots of opportunities to door knock through both the Biden campaign or your state party, or through down ballot Democrats. If you’re in a deep-blue area, consider phone banking or texting for a campaign that inspires you. [Future volunteer opportunities for our campaign will be listed here.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19218?t=3&akid=35865%2E3422442%2Ee7VcIm)
4. Donate to candidates who you believe in. Yes, another plug for my campaign here–but candidates (like me) who have never taken corporate PAC money *really* count on the support of grassroots donors. **[You can click here if you’d like to donate today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240103-1?refcode=EMAP24_1_TY_20240103_V1_F&refcode2=35865_3422442_e7VcIm&akid=35865%2E3422442%2Ee7VcIm)**

2024 is a critical year. And no matter where you live, there’s a way to get involved.
Onward!
Katie Porter
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240103-1?refcode=EMAP24_1_TY_20240103_V1_F&refcode2=35865_3422442_e7VcIm&akid=35865%2E3422442%2Ee7VcIm)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAP24_1_TY_20240103_V1_F&t=4&refcode2=35865_3422442_e7VcIm&akid=35865%2E3422442%2Ee7VcIm)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=5&akid=35865%2E3422442%2Ee7VcIm)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=35865%2E3422442%2Ee7VcIm)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Stop the Insurrectionists (via DLCC.org)
subject: The reason why so many Trump-enablers have run for state office...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
DLCC is paying attention — and we know that you are too | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Did you know that 15 state legislators who attended the January 6th insurrection are currently serving in statehouses across the country? And since January 6th, 2021, at least 59 Republicans who were in Washington, DC, that day have either ended up in state legislative office or ran for one?** We believe the reason why so many insurrectionists and election deniers have run in state legislative races is because _they're betting that nobody pays attention to local races_ – making it that much easier to win, gain power, and oversee the future of our elections. **But they’re wrong._We’re_ paying attention – we know that you are too – and we’re not going to make this easy for them. ** [But here's the hard truth: Increased awareness and attention is not enough – we need financial investment to organize for state Democrats and defeat these insurrectionists and their enablers. So will you please chip in $7 or anything you can to protect our democracy at the state level? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xaRu3n0cGNQE4QBeKFCbB9vE7lf25zn2xgqmQkZ2O5_Azxae0B_PRum8wA4roAnjYzrZqCfLApVj_AZHqNiK6y0FdPLCh0Bl9rD0zKNYJSdmoDs7uXRzj1KDVveGyt2a-ySlMgGwhECyu4pBY0NlYod8nIfGw7ujqcq5zDVQfZJURnSTeVNTmt2BqWiJys_o1mJv5beeUu_06O-iPgJ52kGWk_utTllwfKnONA4sXzbU8oII4MA-oy11WQ4Y19a6j2QMQ02c4amBkCJ-Dhsl3ucAqzXW35eyyDqKTjpL5CEIhJH4setLbSGxnEKE2r6qTqSH9dLIWOkY3PTP1J_lRbz6eShUJ6-5sQ99uS7S3ye8VmUzOh5ljwk3b8RvnokPsklB0KzcH6H9HNnZT6LBxXVwBYw2q6gsHyVxhxmCHst_dnPIJyto299KLmlQrxDU7qExWoauzRidxf61V45O_6/42o/i7IpGPvNTw6MhYE6Qbz4kQ/h0/LlQqsT1K0vtAS_MEC1ajoKlqnJfGMZB5cVfcqAptliY) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

The DLCC supports countless Democrats who run in incredibly close races against extremist Republicans threatening to restrict abortion access and gut voting rights.
The good news is that more and more people are realizing the importance of these state legislative races heading into 2024’s elections – and we’re so excited to be growing this team.
But at the end of the day, winning is going to come down to who can earn the most votes – not who has the most attention. **And our voter outreach and organizing work is powered by the contributions we receive from emails like this one.**

clean_body: Speaker Johnson and I are witnessing a humanitarian disaster. | Friend, I’m in Eagle Pass, Texas, with Speaker Mike Johnson right now, assessing the situation at our southern border. So let me tell you from a first-hand perspective – Joe Biden and the Democrats have facilitated a complete crisis at our southern border. The Biden Administration refuses to adopt common-sense policies to secure our border, which emboldens drug cartels and makes our communities less safe. We have a big opportunity coming this November to rid ourselves of the far-left open border policies that caused this mess to begin with. Until then, I’m going to continue doing everything in my power to SECURE the southern border and put an end to this humanitarian disaster. But dark money liberal groups are continuing to target me for supporting these common-sense policies and standing up to the Biden-Harris immigration agenda. I need your support so I can keep fighting to secure our southern border. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

body:
I wanted to take a moment to personally say thank you. We received an incredible amount of support ahead of our last-end-quarter fundraising deadline of 2023 and surpassed our goal. I really appreciate everyone who pitched in.

Happy New Year, team!

I wanted to take a moment to personally say thank you. We received an incredible amount of support ahead of our last end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2023 and _surpassed our goal._ **I really appreciate everyone who pitched in.**

And now, as we move full steam ahead into the election year, I’m so grateful to know that I have a strong group of committed supporters like you on my team.

There’s a lot of work to do this year, and our team is ready to go.

It means so much to me that you’ve chosen to be part of our grassroots movement. None of this would be possible without you.

_Andrea_

P.S. name: Rick Coplen
subject: Democracy = Freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
**Democracy = Freedom.**

We dare not forget it. What Scott Perry did in the months leading up to January 6, 2021 – and on J6 itself – sought to destroy American democracy and with it our most sacred freedoms. He committed insurrection and therefore should have no place on any ballot for the rest of his life.

Three years later, Perry and his hero, Donald Trump, are openly campaigning to destroy democracy. So we have to ask ourselves what it would mean for them to win. And the answer is in those they admire around the world – Russia’s Putin, Hungary’s Orban, and Brazil’s Bolsonaro. What has happened there in recent years with Perry and Trump cheering them on?
* The right to free and open elections? **Gone.**
* The rule of law? **Gone.**
* A national commitment to the equal rights of women and minorities? **Gone.**
* The right of women to bodily autonomy? **Gone.**
* The freedom to peacefully complain about the government without fear of arrest? **Gone.**
* The right to have courts whose decisions are based on “the truth, the whole truth and nothing but the truth”? **Gone.**
* The liberty of learning without book bans or political indoctrination masquerading as objective truth? **Gone.**
* The freedom of being welcomed by all for who you are, how you worship and who you love? **Gone.**

[America’s standing as the foremost country for freedom in the world. Gone? Not if I can help it. Are you with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76421369/447467955/616904455?amount=10&source=RC_EM_FR_WL_240103_1_1&refcode2=98c7fde7-87aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=B6ihGZZRkUTvvhMf8kdgbEI+mj3aAoAr1vndEJ9oIptofKgAi2neUwyDB/0PW26+&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGM3ZmRlNy04N2FhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtTpgZHLkIv8WFHu4GwiY15HrMe9cpcQ0rLXibjoH0U=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | **[DONATE $5 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76421370/447467956/616904455?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode2=98c7fde7-87aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&source=RC_EM_FR_WL_240103_1_1&contactdata=B6ihGZZRkUTvvhMf8kdgbEI+mj3aAoAr1vndEJ9oIptofKgAi2neUwyDB/0PW26+&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGM3ZmRlNy04N2FhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtTpgZHLkIv8WFHu4GwiY15HrMe9cpcQ0rLXibjoH0U=)**

After the events of J6, we must consider what Day One of a Trump-Perry regime would look like. I’ll get into that in my next email.

Meanwhile, Gene Stilp (a candidate for the state House, not the U.S. House) has filed a lawsuit seeking to bar Perry from the ballot based on the Constitution’s “insurrection clause.” Good luck, Gene. Sometimes it helps to state the obvious.

More to come,
Rick

We’re emailing to ask for $1 to help Adam Frisch replace Lauren Boebert in Congress.
No, that’s not a typo. Our first fundraising deadline of the year is coming fast, and we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to replace Boebert in Congress.
We know $1 might not seem like a lot – and it’s not. But combined with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors chipping in, your $1 has _enormous_ impact.
$1 lets us fill up the tank as Adam continues crisscrossing the district, meeting with voters who are fed up with Lauren Boebert’s angertainment antics.
$1 lets us invest early in staff and the critical resources it takes to build a winning campaign.
$1 lets us counter the Super PAC lies.

name: Raju Chinthala
subject: Join the Raju for Congress Campaign - Your Help Matters!
body:
Dear Friends,

Happy New Year! We hope this message finds you well and filled with the enthusiasm that comes with a fresh start. We sincerely appreciate your willingness to be part of the Raju for Congress campaign, and we are thrilled to have you on board.
To kick off your journey with us, we kindly ask you to [complete the volunteer form](https://forms.gle/vrrGaF1awQsW652B7) through the following link: [https://forms.gle/vrrGaF1awQsW652B7](https://forms.gle/vrrGaF1awQsW652B7) . This will help our Field Director, [Evan Davis](mailto:evan@rajuforcongress.com), tailor a virtual orientation session that aligns with your interests and strengths.
One specific request we have is for you to assist us in recruiting high school students, as well as reaching out to your friends and neighbors to join us as volunteers. Feel free to share the link on your social media. The more people we have supporting us, the greater our impact will be. Our goal is to have a dedicated volunteer captain in every neighborhood across the district, and we are confident that, with your support, we can make this happen.
Your efforts will play a crucial role in shaping the success of this campaign. Whether you have a few hours to spare each week or can contribute more, every bit helps. We are truly grateful for any assistance you can provide.
If you have any questions or need further information, please don't hesitate to reach out. You can contact me directly at raju@rajuforcongress.com or call me at 317-339-7461. Your feedback and ideas are always welcome.
Once again, thank you for being part of this exciting journey. Together, we can make a positive difference in our community. Absolutely, with dedicated volunteers like yourself, we are confident that we will achieve success on May 7th!
| Best RegardsRaju ChinthalaCandidate for Congress in Indiana's 5th DistrictRAJU FOR CONGRESS4000 W. 106th St. Ste.125 # 229 Carmel, IN 46032M: 317-339-7461 | [raju@rajuforcongress.com](mailto:raju@rajuforcongress.com)[www.RajuForCongress.com](http://www.rajuforcongress.com/)[](https://www.facebook.com/rajuforindiana)[](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rajuchinthala/)[](https://twitter.com/rajuchinthala)
---|---
I am Raju and I am For You.

| | Happy New Year!-Good News-In our California Assembly there are 80 members. 18 of them are Republican. In our Assembly District 30 there are 26% Registered Republicans. Yes, I do really have good news- actually it's GREAT news. Add in with the registered Republicans the No Party Preference, the Libertarians, and the American Independents- and we are at 52% registered Conservative Voters in my Assembly district 30!My district has about 90% of San Luis Obispo (very conservative), about 34% of Monterey, and only 27% of Santa Cruz. So what's the plan?I will saturate Monterey County with my name, what I stand for, and why I am definitely the better candidate.Help me by talking to your friends and neighbors about all that's going on in the schools. Send them to my website and have them sign up for these newsletters: [https://www.dalilaforassembly.com/](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/a7OpHOb-D/c?w=LtFrpm2DHIf-mmtkXX8NETzI7-8KX4_4SG2akV4k9MU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFsaWxhZm9yYXNzZW1ibHkuY29tLyIsInIiOiI4YTA4OWNjMS02MjZmLTQ4YmEtYThjMC00YjE1ZDE5MTRmYmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJiMTM1ZmQ0Ni05OTJhLTQyOGItYTljMC0yZjA0ZDk4MDU1Y2UifQ)Have them sign up to my podcast for exclusive interviews with local people about what's truly going down in their area: [https://rumble.com/v42ni1t-offshore-wind-energy-on-the-ca-central-coast.html](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/a7OpHOb-D/c?w=ivJraXnsiDRcmgvYoeYNSegg-ZjOxxXcvVU4rmhlFM4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ydW1ibGUuY29tL3Y0Mm5pMXQtb2Zmc2hvcmUtd2luZC1lbmVyZ3ktb24tdGhlLWNhLWNlbnRyYWwtY29hc3QuaHRtbCIsInIiOiI4YTA4OWNjMS02MjZmLTQ4YmEtYThjMC00YjE1ZDE5MTRmYmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJiMTM1ZmQ0Ni05OTJhLTQyOGItYTljMC0yZjA0ZDk4MDU1Y2UifQ)Between Parental Rights being taken away by the state, election integrity issues, energy going though the roof due to "climate change" green energy projects (such as the wind turbines they will be installing in our oceans)... Something has got to break- things are going the wrong way at 120 miles per hour! Find out what clicks for the people you're talking to, but get them on board with finding out who I am and why I'm running. Ask them to help. [$30 for District 30](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/a7OpHOb-D/c?w=mYqSEidOA5R5deswlu1fynPioCDwK7SUxy3_oC-xDqg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYWxpbGEtZm9yLWFzc2VtYmx5L2RvbmF0ZSIsInIiOiI4YTA4OWNjMS02MjZmLTQ4YmEtYThjMC00YjE1ZDE5MTRmYmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJiMTM1ZmQ0Ni05OTJhLTQyOGItYTljMC0yZjA0ZDk4MDU1Y2UifQ)! This is how they can quickly help. And this is how you can quickly help me as well. [$30 for District 30](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/a7OpHOb-D/c?w=mYqSEidOA5R5deswlu1fynPioCDwK7SUxy3_oC-xDqg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYWxpbGEtZm9yLWFzc2VtYmx5L2RvbmF0ZSIsInIiOiI4YTA4OWNjMS02MjZmLTQ4YmEtYThjMC00YjE1ZDE5MTRmYmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJiMTM1ZmQ0Ni05OTJhLTQyOGItYTljMC0yZjA0ZDk4MDU1Y2UifQ).Times are tough and we all pretty much understand it's going to get tougher before it gets better. So, [$30 for District 30](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/a7OpHOb-D/c?w=mYqSEidOA5R5deswlu1fynPioCDwK7SUxy3_oC-xDqg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYWxpbGEtZm9yLWFzc2VtYmx5L2RvbmF0ZSIsInIiOiI4YTA4OWNjMS02MjZmLTQ4YmEtYThjMC00YjE1ZDE5MTRmYmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJiMTM1ZmQ0Ni05OTJhLTQyOGItYTljMC0yZjA0ZDk4MDU1Y2UifQ) is what I'm asking so I can succeed in becoming the nineteenth Assembly member for California! Thank you and God bless. Dalila831-915-4667 Call me if you'd like to book an event for me!

clean_body: Good News | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Together We Will Win This Seat | | | | | | | Happy New Year!-Good News-In our California Assembly there are 80 members. 18 of them are Republican. In our Assembly District 30 there are 26% Registered Republicans. Yes, I do really have good news- actually it's GREAT news. Add in with the registered Republicans the No Party Preference, the Libertarians, and the American Independents- and we are at 52% registered Conservative Voters in my Assembly district 30!My district has about 90% of San Luis Obispo (very conservative), about 34% of Monterey, and only 27% of Santa Cruz. So what's the plan?I will saturate Monterey County with my name, what I stand for, and why I am definitely the better candidate.Help me by talking to your friends and neighbors about all that's going on in the schools. Send them to my website and have them sign up for these newsletters: them sign up to my podcast for exclusive interviews with local people about what's truly going down in their area: Parental Rights being taken away by the state, election integrity issues, energy going though the roof due to "climate change" green energy projects (such as the wind turbines they will be installing in our oceans)... Something has got to break- things are going the wrong way at 120 miles per hour! Find out what clicks for the people you're talking to, but get them on board with finding out who I am and why I'm running. Ask them to help. ! This is how they can quickly help. And this is how you can quickly help me as well. are tough and we all pretty much understand it's going to get tougher before it gets better. So, is what I'm asking so I can succeed in becoming the nineteenth Assembly member for California! Thank you and God bless. Dalila831-915-4667 Call me if you'd like to book an event for me! | | | | | | Share on social | | | | This email was sent from .

Happy New Year, Peter!

I hope you and your loved ones had a fun and safe New Year’s celebration.

I’m excited to let you know that our campaign is off to a great start this year. **Thanks to the hard work and generosity of this amazing grassroots team, Yadira was able to hit our online fundraising goal** just before our deadline on New Year’s Eve.

Peter, I speak for everyone on Team Caraveo when I say we’re incredibly humbled to have your support.

Thank you so much for being a part of this grassroots movement. Yadira can’t win without folks like you!

_Mary Alice_ , CO-08 Campaign Manager

Fellow Conservative,

We hope this email finds you well. Thank you for your dedication to the Conservative cause and for standing up for America.

As you know, the midterm elections did not go as planned. We did not see the red wave we expected. We did take back the House majority, but we did not flip the Senate.

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Battleground 2024
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Trust. Honesty. Authenticity. These are the characteristics of RFK Jr.

|
---
| | | **Trust. Honesty. Authenticity. These are the characteristics of RFK Jr.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=battle_1_3_24_email_1_2_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Robert F Kennedy Jr. rocked Arizona, and the Associated Press couldn’t help but report the news.
While we are pleased our campaign continues to garner great coverage, what we are most excited about are voters like you – _Americans who are going to pull the lever for RFK Jr_.
**Here are what a few of our supporters shared for the record (and you can read the entire post below):**
| _“I like that I can trust him. I think he’s honest.”_
---
_“And even if I don’t agree with him, I know that he came to his conclusions honestly. I can’t trust any of the other people.”_
_“I like that he talks to us like adults.”_
Trust. Honesty. Authenticity. These are the characteristics of RFK Jr.
These should be the characteristics of your next President.
[With your continued support, the MainStream Media and others will have no choice except to cover our campaign for the White House.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=battle_1_3_24_email_1_2_nd&n=2)
Together, we can heal the divide, restore a prosperous and healthy middle class, compete economically around the world, and protect our rights.
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=battle_1_3_24_email_1_2_nd&n=3)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=battle_1_3_24_email_1_2_nd&n=4)
**JONATHAN J. COOPER ASSOCIATED PRESS PHOENIX** | Some voted for Donald Trump, others for Joe Biden. A few had never wanted anything to do with politics before they heard Robert F. Kennedy Jr. on a podcast or YouTube video.
Lined up outside a Phoenix wedding hall tucked between a freeway, a railroad track and a U-Haul rental center, the hundreds of people who turned out Wednesday to hear Mr. Kennedy speak shared little in common ideologically. What united them was a deep-seated distrust — of the media, of corporations and especially of the government — and a belief that Mr. Kennedy is the only person in politics willing to tell them the truth.
“I like that he talks to us like adults,” said Gilbert Limon, a 48-year-old pharmacist from Phoenix. “He tells you the majority of what you need to know. Whereas I feel like [other politicians] just give you bits and pieces to try to fit their agenda. I’ve had enough of that.”
Voters are not enthusiastic about a Biden-Trump rematch, and alternatives like Mr. Kennedy or the No Labels third party movement, which would typically be long shots, see an opening. Mr. Kennedy’s appearance in a 2024 battleground state highlights how he could influence the election in ways that are tough to predict. Allies of both Mr. Trump and Mr. Biden have expressed concerns that Mr. Kennedy’s independent bid could pull votes from their candidate in next year’s expected general election rematch.
Candidates from outside the Republican and Democratic parties rarely make a splash, if they can make the ballot to begin with. But third-party candidates don’t usually carry a famous last name like Mr. Kennedy’s, or his existing network of supporters.
Mr. Kennedy made the stop in Phoenix as part of his laborious push to get access to the 2024 presidential ballot as an independent candidate, which he figures will require him to collect at least 1 million signatures across the country. Aides mingled in the crowd, filling up his petitions to qualify in Arizona.
Ballot access for independent and minor-party candidates is an expensive and complicated process, with each state setting its own rules. Campaigns usually hire people to collect signatures and enlist an army of lawyers to fight for ballot access.
American Values 2024, a super PAC supporting Mr. Kennedy, has pledged to spend $15 million to help him get on the ballot in 10 states. Mr. Kennedy secured a victory in Utah, where the lieutenant governor pushed back the deadline to qualify from January to March after Mr. Kennedy filed suit.
Mr. Kennedy is a member of one of the Democratic Party’s most famous families — his father was the attorney general for his uncle, President John F. Kennedy. But he’s more recently built closer ties to the far right, where his conspiratorial and isolationist views are at home.
Enriqueta Porras, a 52-year old physician from Phoenix, voted for Hillary Clinton in 2016 and Mr. Trump in 2020. She said she’s torn about the third-party conundrum. She’d like to vote for someone she believes in, like Mr. Kennedy, but also wants to make sure Mr. Biden loses and may vote strategically.
“I don’t want to be that person,” Ms. Porras said, “but I feel like there’s a lot at stake and that may just have to happen.”
One of the nation’s most prominent anti-vaccine activists, Mr. Kennedy has long had a loyal following of people who reject the scientific consensus that vaccines are safe and effective, and they form the backbone of his presidential campaign.
Among the dozen Kennedy supporters who spoke to The Associated Press in Phoenix, many share his view that corporations, especially drug companies, wield too much power.
Curt Eastin, a 65-year-old professional coach from Chandler, a Phoenix suburb, voted for Mr. Biden in 2020 but won’t again. If Mr. Kennedy weren’t running, he’d vote for Mr. Trump next year, he said.
“I like that I can trust him. I think he’s honest,” he said. “And even if I don’t agree with him, I know that he came to his conclusions honestly. I can’t trust any of the other people.”
Mr. Kennedy is keenly aware that his fans avoid the mainstream media. He said he’s drawing support from young people but struggling with people in his generation.
“The problem with the baby boomers, I think, is they get their news from MSNBC, Fox and CNN,” he told the crowd in Phoenix, which responded with boos. “Whereas young people are getting their news from podcasts and other alternative sources.”
Third party or independent candidates rarely do well in presidential contests. Even the most successful recent example, Ross Perot in 1992, didn’t win a single electoral vote despite winning 19% of the popular vote.
Sometimes, minor-party candidates will get enough votes that partisans will blame them for tipping the scales to elect the popular vote loser, like Ralph Nader in 2000 or Jill Stein in 2016, both Green Party candidates.
“One of the biggest reasons I like him is because of his stance on partisanship in our House and our Senate, and I like how he wants to try and reunite both of them,” said Michael Chacon, a 23-year-old student in Tempe who has never voted and still wasn’t sure whether he will in 2024. “I think that’s a really good idea. I think cooperation would go a long way.”

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: I’m running for Congress to restore the Michigan Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kristen for Michigan
body:
I’m a Michigan state Senator, lifelong advocate for kids and families, and proud mom of 6. And today, I’m launching my campaign for Congress in Michigan’s 8th District.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76422521/447470813/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTVkNDA3Zi04Y2FhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDnaBSpZbUqGhJqs4jvzgmgiyJL56APLVeHFZfGC6D4=) My name is Kristen McDonald Rivet. I’m a Michigan state Senator, lifelong advocate for kids and families, and proud mom of 6. **And today, I’m launching my campaign for Congress in Michigan’s 8th District.**

Experts say this race is a pure tossup after Democratic Rep. Dan Kildee announced his retirement, so I’m going to need your help from the very beginning to build a winning campaign. **[I’ll explain more about why I decided to run for Congress, but if you’re already with me, I hope you’ll contribute as much as you can today to get this campaign off the ground:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76422522/447470814/1433120897?refcode=email_010324_launch-1-new&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTVkNDA3Zi04Y2FhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDnaBSpZbUqGhJqs4jvzgmgiyJL56APLVeHFZfGC6D4=)** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76422524/447470816/1433120897?refcode=email_010324_launch-1-new&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTVkNDA3Zi04Y2FhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDnaBSpZbUqGhJqs4jvzgmgiyJL56APLVeHFZfGC6D4=)
---
**I’m running for Congress to restore what I call The Michigan Dream:** that if you work hard, you can own a home, pay your bills, put a little away for retirement, and maybe drive your family to Disney World every now and then.

I know this dream firsthand. Growing up in Portland, my dad worked construction, often clocking in 70 to 80 hours a week. When the construction season slowed down and it got cold, he worked snow removal to make ends meet. Like many people in this district, he showered at the end of his work day, not before it. Dad wasn’t afraid to get calluses on his hands through a tough day’s work. Thanks to him and my mom, my sisters and I were the first in our family to go to college, and I have been working to uplift families like ours ever since.

**Unfortunately, today, the Michigan Dream has become out-of-reach for too many Michiganders.** Combine that with extremists making us less safe by trying to take away the right to abortion and refusing to address the epidemic of gun violence, and it’s clear that we need to send real leaders to D.C. who we can trust to solve problems our community faces.

I have spent my adult life fighting to make it just a little easier for working families, like the one I grew up in, to achieve the Michigan Dream. Throughout my career and now in the state Senate, I’ve helped improve employment and educational opportunities for children across our state, pass historic tax cuts for working families, and enact public policy that’s helped level the playing field.

**I’m running for Congress because I am ready to help give hardworking families across the Great Lakes Bay Region the tools to succeed.**

**[But I can’t get there on my own. This is going to be one of the most competitive House races in the country – one that will determine whether or not Democrats take back the House. I’m counting on supporters like you to power this campaign from day one. So please, will you chip in today to launch my campaign for Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76422526/447470818/1433120897?refcode=email_010324_launch-1-new&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTVkNDA3Zi04Y2FhLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDnaBSpZbUqGhJqs4jvzgmgiyJL56APLVeHFZfGC6D4=)**

clean_body: I’m a Michigan state Senator, lifelong advocate for kids and families, and proud mom of 6. And today, I’m launching my campaign for Congress in Michigan’s 8th District. = My name is Kristen McDonald Rivet. I’m a Michigan state Senator, lifelong advocate for kids and families, and proud mom of 6. And today, I’m launching my campaign for Congress in Michigan’s 8th District. Experts say this race is a pure tossup after Democratic Rep. Dan Kildee announced his retirement, so I’m going to need your help from the very beginning to build a winning campaign. = | | = I’m running for Congress to restore what I call The Michigan Dream: that if you work hard, you can own a home, pay your bills, put a little away for retirement, and maybe drive your family to Disney World every now and then. I know this dream firsthand. Growing up in Portland, my dad worked construction, often clocking in 70 to 80 hours a week. When the construction season slowed down and it got cold, he worked snow removal to make ends meet. Like many people in this district, he showered at the end of his work day, not before it. Dad wasn’t afraid to get calluses on his hands through a tough day’s work. Thanks to him and my mom, my sisters and I were the first in our family to go to college, and I have been working to uplift families like ours ever since. Unfortunately, today, the Michigan Dream has become out-of-reach for too many Michiganders. Combine that with extremists making us less safe by trying to take away the right to abortion and refusing to address the epidemic of gun violence, and it’s clear that we need to send real leaders to D.C. who we can trust to solve problems our community faces. name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Dahlstrom=20for=20Alaska?=
subject: AK-AL Moves Towards Republicans after Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom’s Entrance into the Race
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/433ae0f18808/ak-al-moves-towards-republicans-after-lt-governor-nancy-dahlstroms-entrance-into-the-race?e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Contact: [press@nancyforalaska.com](mailto:press@nancyforalaska.com)

## **AK-AL Moves Towards Republicans after Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom’s Entrance into the Race**

**Anchorage, AK** \- Today, _Inside Elections_ [shifted](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=74914fe8eb&e=a20d8ad2ed) the race for Alaska’s at-large congressional seat towards Republicans, specifically noting that **“Lt. Gov. Nancy Dahlstrom’s entrance into the race gives Republicans a candidate who can appeal to the various wings of the state party.”** The update moves the seat from Lean Democrat to Tilt Democrat.
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=674edd825b&e=a20d8ad2ed)
Lt. Governor Dahlstrom announced her campaign at the end of last year, and has since gained [momentum](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=c468f9900f&e=a20d8ad2ed) as the Republican who has what it takes to defeat Mary Peltola.
“I decided to take on this challenge because Alaskans are tired of D.C. politicians telling us how to live our lives. I am a proud conservative who is stepping up to bring conservative leadership back to Congress,” stated Dahlstrom. “It is important that Alaska is represented by someone who understands the unique challenges and opportunities that our great State offers, and I look forward to earning the trust of voters who understand that as well.”
Both the National Republican Congressional Committee and the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee note Alaska as one of the top targets for the 2024 cycle. In 2020, Donald Trump won the state by over 10%.
_Nancy Dahlstrom currently serves as the Lt. Governor for the state of Alaska. The Dunleavy-Dahlstrom ticket was reelected in 2022 on the first ballot with over 50% of the vote. Nancy was first appointed to serve as a State Representative in 2003 and then served as a Senior Advisor for Military Affairs. In 2018, Nancy took on the role to serve as the Commissioner of Corrections and was a leader in cracking down on crime and ensuring criminals serve their time. As Lieutenant Governor, Nancy has prioritized public safety, energy security, and emergency preparedness._[_www.nancyforalaska.com_](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=36366cfe97&e=a20d8ad2ed) __
# # #
|
---

name: Josh Harder
subject: My resolutions for 2024
body:
"Stop eating ice cream"

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76422809/447471828/1806212802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzkwNzE3ZGUtOGVhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=d2riEt-twW-WvC1pLyNKgo5NztHHPkRfXoeEciyq4sM=) | Peter, With the New Year, I’ve been thinking a lot about my goals for 2024 and what I hope to accomplish. So today I want to share my resolutions with you (and I’d love for you to share yours with me [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76422810/447471829/-970662075?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzkwNzE3ZGUtOGVhYS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=d2riEt-twW-WvC1pLyNKgo5NztHHPkRfXoeEciyq4sM=&emci=c0cc5cb2-84aa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=390717de-8eaa-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=6455652).) For many people, a New Year's resolution is something personal like “stop eating cookies every night after dinner” or “spend more time outdoors.” Now that I think of it, both of those would actually be great for me... But this year there’s a bit more at stake. **So after a lot of thought, here’s my resolution for 2024:** This year, I will dedicate my energy to fighting for my family, my district and our country. They say politics is personal, and this year with Donald Trump on the ballot, it truly is. The future for my family and my community is genuinely on the line. Access to reproductive healthcare, a future for DREAMers, a functioning democracy (!) all are at stake. And it’s my responsibility as a Democrat in elected office to work my heart out to fight back. [_**To achieve these goals, I’m counting on your support now more than ever. clean_body: "Stop eating ice cream" | = | Peter, With the New Year, I’ve been thinking a lot about my goals for 2024 and what I hope to accomplish. So today I want to share my resolutions with you (and I’d love for you to share yours with me .) For many people, a New Year's resolution is something personal like “stop eating cookies every night after dinner” or “spend more time outdoors.” Now that I think of it, both of those would actually be great for me... But this year there’s a bit more at stake. So after a lot of thought, here’s my resolution for 2024: This year, I will dedicate my energy to fighting for my family, my district and our country. They say politics is personal, and this year with Donald Trump on the ballot, it truly is. The future for my family and my community is genuinely on the line. Access to reproductive healthcare, a future for DREAMers, a functioning democracy (!) all are at stake. And it’s my responsibility as a Democrat in elected office to work my heart out to fight back. = = = I’m REALLY excited about the future! (More to come on that soon...) \- Josh *

name: Christie
subject: re: I need your opinion ASAP!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Please don't delay...
Hi team -- It's Christie, the Executive Director here at the DSCC. I wanted to make sure you saw that James Carville reached out yesterday and requested your input for an exclusive strategy interview.

**The battle for the Senate is really heating up, and we need to stay on top of public opinion if we're going to win. But James is still waiting on your answer -- and his _urgent_ interview closes at midnight!**

[**James still needs _at least_ 25 more responses from Democrats in Pennsylvania before locking in any results, so please, will you take 3 minutes and help us WIN? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-ND-20240103-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240103-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13088%2E9716520%2ETYUNsp)

| | [START YOUR INTERVIEW](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-ND-20240103-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240103-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13088%2E9716520%2ETYUNsp)
---

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you for being a part of this team,

Christie
DSCC Executive Director

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

\------ Forwarded message ------
From: James Carville
Date: Jan 2, 2024
Subject: I need your opinion ASAP!!
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m gonna level with you: **This might be the most important email I've sent your way in a while.**

See, in my decades working in politics, **I don’t think I've ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.**

That's why I'm holding strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- but time's running out before the interview closes, and **I don't see your response![So please click here to get started right now and take the survey:](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-ND-20240103-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240103-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13088%2E9716520%2ETYUNsp)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-ND-20240103-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240103-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13088%2E9716520%2ETYUNsp)
---

I'll be honest: If we lose the Senate, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all President Biden's progress to a halt -- and that'll just be the beginning!**

Republicans are out there taking away a woman's right to choose, restricting the right to vote, flat-out denying climate change... **And unless Democrats get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans are gonna control the Senate pretty soon.**

That's where you come in. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political insiders -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you join my interview by completing a quick survey?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewJanuary/](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-ND-20240103-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240103-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13088%2E9716520%2ETYUNsp)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-ND-20240103-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240103-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13088%2E9716520%2ETYUNsp)
---

Thank you.

– James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&code=DPE-ND-20240103-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240103-Christie-ChristieCarvilleBumpRF-Pros-sl1&akid=13088%2E9716520%2ETYUNsp)
