subject: BREAKING: Lauren Boebert is running against me in CO-04
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
Boebert is moving to my district and I’m the Democrat running against her |
---
Peter - it’s Ike McCorkle, Defeat Republicans asked me to reach out to you with this breaking news.

Lauren Boebert just announced that she is abandoning Colorado’s 3rd Congressional district and **will now be running against me in Colorado's 4th** in a last ditch attempt to save her fledgling campaign.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76423032/447472687/815683027?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240103_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMyNTZjZWZjLThmYWEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w94UvOHXmOF4LHhlpaEqVuo0p1ZIlpoj_5d1C0bkEWY=) I am the Democrat who has been running to flip Colorado’s 4th Congressional district blue since 2020 and as a retired Marine Corps Officer and Purple Heart recipient - **I am ready for a fight.**

We are now taking on one of the GOP’s biggest fundraisers and we need to supercharge our fundraising immediately. Lauren Boebert just announced that she is abandoning Colorado’s 3rd Congressional district and will now be running against me in Colorado's 4th in a last ditch attempt to save her fledgling campaign. = I am the Democrat who has been running to flip Colorado’s 4th Congressional district blue since 2020 and as a retired Marine Corps Officer and Purple Heart recipient - I am ready for a fight. Lauren Boebert is beyond vulnerable and has no ties to this district - we have name recognition, over 22,000 grassroots donations, and a coalition of thousands of volunteers and supporters from across the district and state. subject: 🚨ALERT - A State's Silent Revolt: The Untold Story of Illinois' Gun Owners
body:
Unpacking the Surprising Backlash Against the New Firearms Registration Law

view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/2b5f8db472e1/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-9597448?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=b4c0ae2b2d) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=b4c0ae2b2d)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b4c0ae2b2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
This Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b4c0ae2b2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Dear Peter,

As the debate over firearm regulations intensifies across the nation, a dramatic turn of events in Illinois has caught the attention of both supporters and critics of gun control. In a stunning display of civil disobedience, a staggering 98.8% of firearm owners in Illinois have chosen to defy a major gun law. This is more than just a news story; it's a powerful statement about the state of our nation's ongoing conversation around the Second Amendment.

Pritzker's Epic Failure: Inside Illinois' Startling Gun Registry Stats (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/01/pritzkers-epic-failure-inside-illinois-startling-gun-registry-stats.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b4c0ae2b2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/01/pritzkers-epic-failure-inside-illinois-startling-gun-registry-stats.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b4c0ae2b2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker, seen in a file photo. (Derik Holtmann/Belleville News-Democrat)

By Illinois Review

In an unprecedented move, only a tiny fraction of Illinois' 2.4 million Firearm Owners Identification (FOID) card holders complied with Gov. JB Pritzker's controversial assault weapons ban. The Illinois State Police's final count post-deadline has revealed a massive, statewide act of defiance.

Why did so many law-abiding citizens choose to risk felony charges over registration? What does this mean for the future of firearm legislation not just in Illinois, but across the United States? And how is this impacting the political landscape as we know it?

Find out the full story, the perspectives involved, and the potential implications of this bold act of resistance. Click through to read our in-depth analysis, witness firsthand accounts, and understand the possible legal and societal repercussions of this significant event.

Stay informed,
Illinois Review

It’s time to put a _STOP_ to all of these vicious attempts to **REMOVE** my name from the ballot.
